Toggle Spirit Mode.name: 切换灵魂模式 Toggle Spirit Mode

J20 - Belcorra's Grasp.name: J20 - 贝科拉的掌控 J20 - Belcorra's Grasp

Cheery Man's Hum.name: 笑面人的哼唱 Cheery Man's Hum

Jodi.name: 乔迪 Jodi

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Speak with Plants.name: 与植物交谈 Speak with Plants
Speak with Plants.description:
你可以向植物提问并获得它们的回答，但该法术不会让它们比平常更友善或更聪明。大多数普通植物对周围世界有其独特的看法，因此它们无法识别有关生物的细节，也不知道其周边近处之外的任何事情。狡猾的植物怪物很可能言辞简略且闪烁其词，而较不聪明的则常常会发表愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal. Most normal plants have a distinctive view of the world around them, so they don't recognize details about creatures or know anything about the world beyond their immediate vicinity. Cunning plant monsters are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Earthbind.name: 缚地术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你借助土的重量妨碍一个目标的飞行，其效果取决于其强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，则不会受到坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120英尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120英尺。如果它撞到地面，则在1轮内不能飞行、施放浮空术，或以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120英尺。如果它撞到地面，则在1分钟内不能飞行、施放浮空术，或以其他方式离开地面。

Using the weight of earth, you hamper a target's flight, with effects based on its Fortitude save. If the creature reaches the ground safely, it doesn't take falling damage.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target falls safely up to 120 feet.

Failure The target falls safely up to 120 feet. If it hits the ground, it can't Fly, levitate, or otherwise leave the ground for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target falls safely up to 120 feet. If it hits the ground, it can't Fly, levitate, or otherwise leave the ground for 1 minute.

Entangle.name: 纠缠 Entangle
Entangle.description:
区域内的植物缠绕生物。该区域视为困难地形。每一轮中，当某个生物在该区域内开始其回合时，它必须尝试一次反射豁免。失败时，它的速度在离开该区域前受到 -10 尺的环境减值；大成功或大失败时，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} 1 轮。生物可以以纠缠的 DC 尝试逃脱以移除这些效果。

Plants in the area entangle creatures. The area counts as difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the area, it must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Creatures can attempt to Escape at entangle's DC to remove these effects.

Pass Without Trace (Constant).name: 无痕潜行（恒定） Pass Without Trace (Constant)
Pass Without Trace (Constant).description:
你遮蔽自己留下的踪迹，并让其他人更难找到你。用于追踪你的检定DC获得+4状态加值，或等于你的法术DC，以使DC更高者为准。你同一时间只能从一个“不留痕迹”法术中获益。

升阶（2环） 持续时间增加至8小时。

升阶（4环） 持续时间增加至8小时。该法术的射程为20英尺，区域为20英尺散发，影响该区域内你所选择的至多10个生物。

You obscure the tracks you leave behind and make it harder for others to find you. The DC of checks to Track you gains a +4 status bonus or is equal to your spell DC, whichever results in a higher DC. You can benefit from only one pass without trace spell at a time.

Heightened (2nd) The duration increases to 8 hours.

Heightened (4th) The duration increases to 8 hours. The spell has a range of 20 feet and an area of a 20-foot-emanation, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within that area.

Speak with Animals (Constant).name: 动物交谈（恒定） Speak with Animals (Constant)
Speak with Animals (Constant).description:
你可以向动物提问、从它们那里得到回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。该法术不会让它们比平常更友善。狡猾的动物很可能言简意赅、闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的动物则常常发表一些愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. The spell doesn't make them more friendly than normal. Cunning animals are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Tree Shape.name: 树形形态 Tree Shape
Tree Shape.description:
你变形为一棵大型树。察觉检定不会揭示你的真实本质，但以你的法术DC为对抗DC成功进行一次自然或求生检定，会发现你看起来像是一棵对该区域而言异常崭新的树。处于树形态时，你能够观察周围的一切，但你无法采取行动，除了结束该法术以及你的回合；结束该法术需使用一个带有专注（特征）的单动作。作为一棵树，你的AC为20，且只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值与环境减值会影响你。你在反射豁免上掷骰得到的任何成功与大成功都视为失败。

You transform into a Large tree. Perception checks don't reveal your true nature, but a successful Nature or Survival check against your spell DC reveals that you appear to be a tree that is strangely new to the area. While in tree form, you can observe everything around you, but you can't act other than to end the spell, and your turn, by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait. As a tree, your AC is 20, and only status bonuses, status penalties, circumstance bonuses, and circumstance penalties affect you. Any successes and critical successes you roll on Reflex saves are failures.

+1 Composite Longbow.name: +1 复合长弓 +1 Composite Longbow
+1 Composite Longbow.description:
这种投射武器由角、木材和筋腱层压结合而成，以增强拉力与弹射物的动能。与所有长弓一样，其巨大的体型也提升了弓的射程与威力。你必须用双手发射它，并且在骑乘时不能使用。任何明确限定于长弓的能力（例如埃拉斯蒂尔的偏好武器），除非另有说明，也同样适用于复合长弓。

This projectile weapon is made from horn, wood, and sinew laminated together to increase the power of its pull and the force of its projectile. Like all longbows, its great size also increases the bow's range and power. You must use two hands to fire it, and it cannot be used while mounted. Any time an ability is specifically restricted to a longbow, such as Erastil's favored weapon, it also applies to composite longbows unless otherwise stated.

Hide.name: 躲藏 Hide
Hide.description:
这种护甲由皮毛、结实的皮革，有时还有定型的煮制皮革混合制成。它通过多层皮革提供防护，但其笨重会减慢穿戴者并降低机动性。

A mix of furs, sturdy hide, and sometimes molded boiled leather, this armor provides protection due to its layers of leather, though its bulkiness slows the wearer down and decreases mobility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭的箭杆由木头制成。箭在飞行时通过一端的羽翎保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Piercing Shot.name: 穿刺射击 Piercing Shot
Piercing Shot.description:
木巨人向一个目标射出一支箭，使其擦过第一个目标并击中其身后另一个目标。木巨人选择在一条直线上两个目标，其中一个必须为另一个提供较小掩蔽，然后用其长弓对两个目标进行一次单独的远程打击。这次攻击无视第一个目标为第二个目标提供的较小掩蔽。木巨人只掷骰一次伤害，并将其应用于它命中的每个生物。穿刺射击在计算木巨人的多重攻击减值时算作两次攻击。

The wood giant shoots an arrow at a target so that it glances off the first target to strike another target behind the first one. The wood giant chooses two targets in a direct line, one of which must be giving lesser cover to the other, then makes a single ranged Strike with its longbow against both targets. This attack ignores the lesser cover the first target provides to the second. The wood giant rolls damage only once, and applies it to each creature it hits. Piercing Shot counts as two attacks for the wood giant's multiple attack penalty.

Jodi.publicNotes:
木巨人是世界上最幽深、最原始森林的居民与守护者。他们将一生都奉献于自然的保存——这是他们相信由自然本身选定并交付给他们履行的职责。对于那些尊重并爱护荒野之地的人，木巨人耐心而仁慈。尽管大多数木巨人认为文明也只是世界的一部分，但他们珍视那些未被永久建筑与密集的人形生物聚居地所触及的地方。

木巨人有着又长又下垂的耳朵，体态也比多数巨人更为修长。尽管体型庞大，他们依旧优雅而敏捷，能够几乎无声地穿行于茂密的森林与灌木丛中。人们知道他们常与德鲁伊以及其他同样敬重荒野地区神圣性的人紧密合作。木巨人将白昼用于巡逻广阔的领地、采集食物，并警惕任何想要玷污其土地之人。虽然他们尊重自己与许多精类生物共享的自然联系，并与其保持良好关系，但木巨人认为大多数精类过于轻浮，不足以参与任何长期计划。

一名普通的木巨人身高14英尺，体重1,200磅。

Wood giants are the denizens and protectors of the deepest, most primeval forests in the world. They dedicate their entire lives to the preservation of nature-a role that they believe nature itself has selected them to carry out. Wood giants are patient and kind to those who show respect and care for wild places. Although most wood giants consider civilization as simply another part of the world, they value places untouched by permanent structures and dense humanoid settlements.

Wood giants have long, drooping ears and more slender builds than most giants. Despite their size, they are graceful and agile, able to move through dense forests and brush with little sound. They have been known to work closely with druids and others who share their respect for the sanctity of wilderness regions. Wood giants spend their days patrolling vast swaths of territory, foraging, and keeping an eye out for any who would despoil their lands. While they respect the connection to nature they share with many fey creatures and remain on good terms with them, wood giants see most fey as far too flighty to take part in any long-term plans.

An average wood giant stands 14 feet tall and weighs 1,200 pounds.

Bag of Weasels.name: 鼬鼠袋 Bag of Weasels
Bag of Weasels.description:
此物品看起来是并如同一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.jaEEvuQ32GjAa8jy]{宽敞小袋（I型）}般运作，直到你试图从袋中取出一件物品为止。每当你从鼬鼠袋中取出一件物品时，掷骰一次@Check[flat|dc:11]。若成功，你照常取出该物品。若失败，你取出的物品会被转化为一只鼬鼠；这不会影响神器、诅咒物品或其他难以摧毁的物品。

这只鼬鼠使用鼬鼠的数据，或使用巨鼠的数据，并散发出魔法灵光。鼬鼠对你毫无忠诚，通常会尝试尽快逃脱。若该鼬鼠被反制，它会变回从鼬鼠袋中取出的原本物品。若它死亡或被杀死，鼬鼠会消失，且该物品将被永久摧毁。由于鼬鼠是由物品转化而来，你不会获得任何你因攻击生物、击败生物、对其造成伤害或类似行为而会获得的任何益处，但你会获得任何你因摧毁一件物品而会获得的益处。

This item appears to be and functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.jaEEvuQ32GjAa8jy]{Spacious Pouch (Type I)}, until you try to retrieve an item from the bag. Whenever you retrieve an item from the bag of weasels, roll a @Check[flat|dc:11]. On a success, you retrieve the item as normal. On a failure, the item you retrieve is transformed into a weasel; this doesn't affect artifacts, cursed items, or other hard-to-destroy items.

This weasel uses either the weasel statistics or a giant rat statistics and exudes an aura of magic. The weasel has no loyalty to you and typically attempts to escape as quickly as possible. If the weasel is counteracted, it transforms back into the original item that was taken from the bag of weasels. If it dies or is slain, the weasel disappears and the item is permanently destroyed. Because the weasel is a transformed item, you don't gain any benefit you would receive from attacking a creature, defeating one, damaging one, or the like, but you do gain any benefit you would gain from destroying an item.

Ring of Danger Sense.name: 危险感知戒指 Ring of Danger Sense
Ring of Danger Sense.description:
这枚戒指可以感知佩戴者面临的危险。

This ring can sense danger to the user.

Tree Phrasebook.name: 树木短语手册 Tree Phrasebook
Tree Phrasebook.description:
一本包含常见树木短语指南的书。

A book containing a guide to common tree phrases.

Amulet of Flame Detection.name: 火焰侦测护符 Amulet of Flame Detection
Amulet of Flame Detection.description:
这枚护身符具有侦测火焰的能力。

This Amulet has the ability to detect flames.

Water.name: 水 Water
Water.description:
这只是一瓶水

This is just a bottle of water

Cloak of Billowing.name: 飘扬斗篷 Cloak of Billowing
Cloak of Billowing.description:
穿上这件斗篷后，它会如同在风中鼓起般飘动。

启动—鼓荡 A（操作）

效果 你摆出一个戏剧性的姿势，使斗篷在你身后夸张地翻飞。

This cloak flows as if billowing in the wind when worn.

Activate—Billow A (manipulate)

Effect You strike a dramatic pose which causes the cloak to billow dramatically behind you.

Bagpipes of Invisibility.name: 隐形术风笛 Bagpipes of Invisibility
Bagpipes of Invisibility.description:
这些风笛使使用者隐形。

These bagpipes makes the user invisible.

Trapfinding Chicken.name: 寻陷鸡 Trapfinding Chicken
Trapfinding Chicken.description:
这只鸡擅长探测陷阱。

This chicken is good for detecting traps.

Faulty Healing Potion (Lesser).name: 故障的治疗药水（次级） Faulty Healing Potion (Lesser)
Faulty Healing Potion (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶宝石红色的液体，饮用者的伤口会迅速愈合，并带来刺痛般的感觉。当你喝下故障治疗药水时，掷骰 [[/r d10]]

[[/r 1d10]]

结果

1 - 3

你受到 @Damage[(1d8)[poison]] 伤害

4 - 6

无事发生

7 - 10

你恢复 @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] 生命值。




Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a Faulty healing potion roll a [[/r d10]]

[[/r 1d10]]

Result

1 - 3

You take @Damage[(1d8)[poison]] damage

4 - 6

Nothing Happens

7 - 10

You regain @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] Hit Points.

Shiver.name: 战栗 Shiver
Shiver.description:
一种由某些蜘蛛的致幻毒液制成的复合物，战栗在黑市中很常见。对战栗的成瘾具有恶性（特征）。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

最大持续时间 4小时

阶段 1 每当你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 时，将该状态的数值减少1（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}（1小时）

阶段 3 睡着（1小时）

A compound produced from the hallucinogenic venom of certain spiders, shiver is common in black markets. The addiction to shiver has the virulent trait.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 4 hours

Stage 1 whenever you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, reduce that condition's value by 1 (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 hour)

Stage 3 asleep (1 hour)

Fool's Dust.name: 愚者之尘 Fool's Dust
Fool's Dust.description:
愚者之尘，闻起来略带木质香。

The dust of fools, smells slightly woody.

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III.name: 扎凯厄斯·奎格迈尔三世博士 Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III
Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III.tokenName: 扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士 Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Assassin Vine Wine.name: 刺客藤葡萄酒 Assassin Vine Wine
Assassin Vine Wine.description:
启动 1 交互

用刺客藤浆果酿造葡萄酒是个危险的过程，但最终得到的红宝石般的红色饮品浓郁而醇厚。在发酵过程中加入的炼金试剂会将藤蔓与其环境的联系凝聚起来，并将这种联系赋予饮用者。饮用一杯刺客藤葡萄酒后的 1 分钟内，你获得射程为 30 尺的震颤感知。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.QCqYiSIR9DVPAHgR]{效果：刺客藤葡萄酒}

Activate 1 Interact

Crafting wine from assassin vine berries is a dangerous process, but the resulting ruby-red drink is rich and heady. Alchemical reagents added during fermentation concentrate the vine's connection to its environment and impart them onto the imbiber. For 1 minute after drinking a glass of assassin vine wine, you have tremorsense at a range of 30 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.QCqYiSIR9DVPAHgR]{Effect: Assassin Vine Wine}

Bottled Roc.name: 瓶装洛克鸟 Bottled Roc
Bottled Roc.description:
启动 2 交互

这个瓶子里装着一只被缩小的鸟，羽毛完整地被保存着。打开后，内容物会复原为一只巨型的巨鹏的巨型偶像，它可以出现在空中而非地面上。巨鹏会抓住至多两名生物，然后飞行最多90尺并释放这些生物。生物必须在巨鹏15尺内，它才能抓住他们；如果其中任何一名不愿意被@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓住}，巨鹏必须以[[/r 1d20+17 #Grapple]]{+17}运动调整值对其进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}，否则无法把他们抓起。

制作需求 提供一具巨鹏的尸体。

Activate 2 Interact

This bottle contains a shrunken bird preserved with its feathers intact. When opened, the contents reconstitute into a Gargantuan effigy of a great roc, which can appear in the air instead of on the ground. The roc Grabs up to two creatures, then Flies up to 90 feet and Releases the creatures. The creatures must be within 15 feet of the roc for it to Grab them; if any of them are unwilling to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, the roc must @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} them with a [[/r 1d20+17 #Grapple]]{+17} Athletics modifier or fail to pick them up.

Craft Requirements Supply the corpse of a roc.

Careless Delight.name: 漫不经心的愉悦 Careless Delight
Careless Delight.description:
启动 1 交互

有时被称为液体劝服，这种甜味酊剂会引发欣快感，降低戒心并增加信任。因该毒药导致的迟钝所造成的状态减值在应用于用于说谎的欺瞒检定、用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{察言观色} 的察觉检定，以及用于识破说谎的察觉DC时加倍。

豁免投掷 @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 10分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}（1分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 3}，且受害者对他人的态度改善一级（1分钟）

Activate 1 Interact

Sometimes called liquid persuasion, this sweet-tasting tincture induces euphoria that lowers inhibitions and increases trust. The status penalty from being stupefied due to this poison doubles when applied to Deception checks to Lie, Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}, and Perception DCs to detect a Lie.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 10 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}, and the victim's attitude toward others improves by one step (1 minute)

Cheetah's Elixir (Greater).name: 猎豹药剂（强效） Cheetah's Elixir (Greater)
Cheetah's Elixir (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

这瓶灵药中的酶化合物会强化并刺激你腿部的肌肉。你在1小时内获得+10尺的速度状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.PeuUz7JaabCgl6Yh]{效果：猎豹灵药（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Enzymatic compounds in this elixir strengthen and excite the muscles in your legs. You gain a +10 foot status bonus to your Speed for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.PeuUz7JaabCgl6Yh]{Effect: Cheetah's Elixir (Greater)}

Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Lesser).name: 虹彩水母油（次级） Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Lesser)
Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Lesser).description:
启动 1 交互

这种油由数种不同色泽的油制成，这些油从水母与稀有植物中萃取而来。虹彩水母油的多层色彩在瓶中堆叠，形成一道彩虹。饮用虹彩水母油后的10分钟内，你获得对精准伤害与来自重击的额外伤害的抗力5。当该效果持续期间，你无视因穿行于狭窄空间而造成的困难地形（这些空间还不至于迫使你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤入空间}），并且当你成功挤入空间时每轮可以移动5尺（大成功或大失败时则为每轮10尺）。你也可以以你速度的一半进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Tj055UcNm6UEgtCg]{匍匐}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.YUj20zJ4bNAoc0nJ]{效果：虹彩水母油（次级）}

Activate 1 Interact

Made from several oils of differing hues extracted from jellyfish and rare plants, the layers of chromatic jellyfish oil stack to form a rainbow within their vial. For 10 minutes after consuming chromatic jellyfish oil, you gain resistance 5 to precision damage and extra damage from critical hits. While the effect lasts, you ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}, and you can move 5 feet per round when you successfully Squeeze (or 10 feet per round on a critical success). You can also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Tj055UcNm6UEgtCg]{Crawl} at half your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.YUj20zJ4bNAoc0nJ]{Effect: Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Lesser)}

Crackling Bubble Gum (Moderate).name: 噼啪作响泡泡糖（中等） Crackling Bubble Gum (Moderate)
Crackling Bubble Gum (Moderate).description:
这种酸爽的口香糖在你咀嚼时会在口中噼啪作响、爆裂。咀嚼噼啪泡泡糖期间，持续至多10分钟，你对抗听觉与音波效果的豁免获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GUHNFlNYiR38sTDE]{效果：噼啪泡泡糖}

次要效果 2（音波）

效果 你用口香糖吹起一个泡泡直到它爆裂，此后口香糖变得无效。爆裂对所有位于@Template[cone|distance:15]内的生物造成@Damage[6d4[sonic]]，并可进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:25|basic]豁免。豁免失败的生物还会被黏稠的口香糖束缚，其速度承受–10英尺物品减值，持续1分钟。该生物可以用总计3个交互动作移除口香糖。这些动作不必连续，且其他生物也可以提供这些动作。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.bMZ6Gw58sK8sFp5n]{效果：噼啪泡泡糖（失败）}

This tangy gum cracks and pops in your mouth as you chew it. While you're chewing crackling bubble gum, for up to 10 minutes, you have a +2 item bonus to saving throws against auditory and sonic effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GUHNFlNYiR38sTDE]{Effect: Crackling Bubble Gum}

Secondary Effect 2 (sonic)

Effect You blow a bubble with the gum until it pops, after which it becomes inert. The pop deals @Damage[6d4[sonic]] to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:15] with a @Check[fortitude|dc:25|basic] save. A creature that fails its save is also bound with sticky gum, taking a –10-foot item penalty to its Speed for 1 minute. The creature can remove the gum with a total of 3 Interact actions. These actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.bMZ6Gw58sK8sFp5n]{Effect: Crackling Bubble Gum (Failure)}

Elixir of Life (Moderate).name: 生命灵药（中等） Elixir of Life (Moderate)
Elixir of Life (Moderate).description:
激活 A (操作)

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用该灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[(5d6+12)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(5d6+12)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Emetic Paste (Moderate).name: 催吐膏（中等） Emetic Paste (Moderate)
Emetic Paste (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）}的生物吞咽困难，因此你可以通过将催吐膏涂抹在你自己的皮肤上，或涂抹在触及范围内一个恶心（状态）生物的皮肤上来启动它，通常涂在喉咙处。该膏体使恶心（状态）生物更容易呕吐排出，使其立即进行一次强韧豁免以降低其恶心（状态）。该膏体给予目标该次豁免以及在1小时内所有用于降低恶心（状态）的豁免检定+3物品加值。

Activate 1 Interact

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} creatures have difficulty swallowing, so you can Activate emetic paste by applying it to your skin or that of a sickened creature within reach, typically on the throat. The paste makes it easy for the sickened creature to purge, granting it an immediate Fortitude save to reduce its sickened condition. The paste grants the target a +3 item bonus to that save and to all saving throws to reduce the sickened condition for 1 hour.

Enervating Powder.name: 衰弱粉末 Enervating Powder
Enervating Powder.description:
启动 A（操控）

这种精心调制的混合物由真菌孢子与研磨骨粉组成，具有致麻痹的特性，使其成为一种有价值的毒药。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

潜伏期 10分钟

最大持续时间 6分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}（1分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[5d6[poison]] 伤害且疲乏（1分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[5d6[poison]] 伤害、疲乏，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}（1分钟）

Activate A (manipulate)

This carefully concocted mixture of fungal spores and ground bones has paralytic properties that make it a valuable poison.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage and fatigued (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage, fatigued, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 minute)

Numbing Tonic (Moderate).name: 麻木药剂（中等） Numbing Tonic (Moderate)
Numbing Tonic (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

麻木补剂让你更容易挺过战斗的痛楚，并无视本会使你衰弱的打击。当你饮用该灵药时，你获得10点临时生命值；此外，在接下来的1分钟内，你在自己每个回合开始时再次获得10点临时生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EqXWI80FBz59VC6v]{效果：麻木补剂（中等）}

Activate 1 Interact

Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows. You gain 10 temporary Hit Points when you drink the elixir, and again at the start of each of your turns for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EqXWI80FBz59VC6v]{Effect: Numbing Tonic (Moderate)}

Spider Root.name: 蛛根 Spider Root
Spider Root.description:
一种将某种蔓生藤本植物细如丝线的根部捣碎制成的糊状物，蛛根会使受害者变得笨拙且不灵巧。

启动 A（操作）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 6分钟

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}（1分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}（1分钟）

A paste made by mashing the fine, threadlike roots of a certain creeper vine, spider root renders a victim clumsy and maladroit.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} (1 minute)

Spiderfoot Brew (Moderate).name: 蛛足酿（中等） Spiderfoot Brew (Moderate)
Spiderfoot Brew (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

这种胶状、黏稠的液体由巨型蜘蛛的丝腺制成。当你饮用蜘蛛足酿时，细小的黏附绒毛会在你的手脚上生长，使你获得20尺的攀爬速度，并在10分钟内对用于攀爬的运动检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.YI7QQqXO6nosaAKr]{效果：蜘蛛足酿（中等）}

Activate 1 Interact

This gelatinous, sticky fluid is made from the silk glands of giant spiders. When you drink a spiderfoot brew, tiny clinging hairs grow on your hands and feet, granting you a climb Speed of 20 feet and a +2 item bonus to athletics checks made to climb for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.YI7QQqXO6nosaAKr]{Effect: Spiderfoot Brew (Moderate)}

Addiction Suppressant (Greater).name: 成瘾抑制剂（强效） Addiction Suppressant (Greater)
Addiction Suppressant (Greater).description:
启动 A 交互

当你使用一剂成瘾抑制剂时，它会在1天内抑制该成瘾的效果，如同你服用了一剂真正的药物但不产生该药物的任何效果，并且不会提高成瘾DC。你还会根据成瘾抑制剂的类型，针对该药物成瘾的持续豁免获得+3物品加值。

针对每一种药物，都必须制作特定的抑制剂——目前尚不存在通用的成瘾抑制剂。为了制作成瘾抑制剂，你必须先以一剂要被抑制的药物为起始材料，然后使用炼金试剂生成一种可用于对抗该药物成瘾的灵药。成瘾抑制剂必须比其意图抑制的药物具有更高的等级才能生效。

Activate A Interact

When you use a dose of addiction suppressant, it suppresses the effects of that addiction for 1 day, as if you had taken an actual dose of the drug but without any of the drug's effects, and it doesn't increase the addiction DC. You also gain a +3 item bonus against the ongoing save against the drug's addiction depending on the type of addiction suppressant.

For every drug, a specific suppressant must be crafted- no generalized addiction suppressant yet exists. In order to create an addiction suppressant, you must begin with a dose of the drug to be suppressed, then use alchemical reagents to generate an elixir that can be used to fight that drug's addiction. An addiction suppressant must be a higher level than the drug it is meant to suppress in order to work.

Antidote (Greater).name: 解毒剂（强效） Antidote (Greater)
Antidote (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在6小时内对抗毒药的强韧豁免检定获得+4物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +4 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

Antiplague (Greater).name: 抗疫药（强效） Antiplague (Greater)
Antiplague (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

抗疫剂可以强化身体对抗疾病的防御。饮用抗疫剂后，你在24小时内获得对抗疾病的强韧豁免检定+4物品加值；这也适用于你对抗疾病进展的每日豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{效果：抗疫剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +4 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{Effect: Antiplague}

Bone Dreadnought Plate.name: 骸骨无畏战舰板甲 Bone Dreadnought Plate
Bone Dreadnought Plate.description:
启动 1 交互

这套以骨骼为基的要塞板甲是炼金科学的杰作。这件护甲带有一个容纳器，可容纳一枚磁石炸弹，安装需要3个交互动作。一套装载了磁石炸弹的骨骸无畏板甲可以被启动，使炸弹驱动众多小型甲片与铰链移位，提供多种防护，使你获得对寒冷、电击、火焰、穿刺与挥砍伤害的抗力，数值等于所装载磁石炸弹的溅射伤害。这些效果持续20分钟，但每当你被一次攻击命中且其造成上述类型之一的伤害时，将剩余持续时间减少1分钟。一旦启动，护甲无法被停用。护甲会在持续时间内消耗磁石炸弹，且在安装新的磁石炸弹之前无法再次启动。

Activate 1 Interact

This suit of bone-based fortress plate is a masterpiece of alchemical science. This armor has a receiver that can hold a single lodestone bomb, which takes 3 Interact actions to install. A loaded suit of bone dreadnought plate can be activated to cause the bomb to shift numerous small plates and hinges, offering a wide variety of protections, granting you resistance to cold, electricity, fire, piercing, and slashing damage equal to the loaded lodestone bomb's splash damage. These effects last for 20 minutes, but each time you're hit by an attack that deals damage of one of these types, decrease the remaining duration by 1 minute. Once activated, the armor can't be deactivated. The armor uses up the lodestone bomb during the duration and can't be activated again until a new one is installed.

Bravo's Brew (Moderate).name: 布拉沃的酿造物（中等） Bravo's Brew (Moderate)
Bravo's Brew (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

这只装满泡沫啤酒的烧瓶能赐予勇气。在饮用该炼金灵药后的接下来1小时内，你的意志豁免获得+2物品加值；若进行对抗恐惧术的意志豁免，则改为+3。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{效果：勇者之酿}

Activate A (manipulate)

This flask of foaming beer grants courage. For the next hour after drinking this elixir, you gain a +2 item bonus to Will saves, or +3 when attempting Will saves against fear.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{Effect: Bravo's Brew}

Delve Scale.name: 探研尺度 Delve Scale
Delve Scale.description:
启动 1 交互

若进行油炸，土兽厚实的前足鳞片会被炸制成酥脆的零食。炼金术师会在炸油中加入试剂以增强鳞片的性质与风味。食用一片探掘鳞后，在接下来的 1 分钟内，你获得 15 尺的掘地速度，以及对用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{高跳}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{远跳}的运动检定获得 +2 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.rQV8Azb3FeUJJ3fG]{效果：探掘鳞}

Activate 1 Interact

If fried, a bulette's thick forefoot scales render into crunchy snacks. Alchemists add reagents to the frying oil to enhance the scales' properties and flavor. For 1 minute after eating a delve scale, you gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet and a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.rQV8Azb3FeUJJ3fG]{Effect: Delve Scale}

Eagle Eye Elixir (Greater).name: 鹰眼药剂（强效） Eagle Eye Elixir (Greater)
Eagle Eye Elixir (Greater).description:
激活 A（操作）

你喝下此炼金药剂后，会注意到细微的视觉细节。在接下来的1小时内，你在察觉检定上获得+3物品加值；当尝试寻找隐藏门与陷阱时，该加值为+4。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kgotU0sFmtAHYySB]{效果：鹰眼炼金药剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

After you drink this elixir, you notice subtle visual details. For the next hour, you gain a +3 item bonus to Perception checks, or +4 when attempting to find secret doors and traps.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kgotU0sFmtAHYySB]{Effect: Eagle Eye Elixir (Greater)}

Life Shot (Moderate).name: 生命射击（中等） Life Shot (Moderate)
Life Shot (Moderate).description:
弹药 轮

Activate 1 Interact

生命射击是一种特殊的弹药筒，内含少量生命灵药。一名生物被已启动的生命射击命中后，不会从这次成功的攻击中受到伤害，而是获得 @Damage[(5d4+7)[healing]] 治疗，并在 1 分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免掷骰获得 +2 物品加值。若为大成功或大失败命中，将获得的治疗掷骰两次并取较好的结果（这是一个命运效果）。一个愿意被这次攻击命中的目标会对该攻击处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GPWMktaOERQIx83M]{效果: 生命射击}

Ammunition round

Activate 1 Interact

Life shot is a special cartridge that carries a small dose of elixir of life. A creature hit by activated life shot takes no damage from the successful attack, instead receiving @Damage[(5d4+7)[healing]] healing and gaining a +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 1 minute. On a critical hit, roll the healing received twice and take the better result (this is a fortune effect). A target willing to be hit by this attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GPWMktaOERQIx83M]{Effect: Life Shot}

Mistform Elixir (Greater).name: 雾形灵药（强效） Mistform Elixir (Greater)
Mistform Elixir (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

一层淡淡的薄雾从你的皮肤散发出来，使你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，持续5分钟。

与通常情况一样，当你的位置仍然很明显时处于隐蔽状态，你无法利用这种隐蔽来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A faint mist emanates from your skin, making you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} for 5 minutes.

As usual being concealed when your position is still obvious, you can't use this concealment to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}.

Nethershade.name: 幽影 Nethershade
Nethershade.description:
启动 2（操控）

从幽冥界蒸馏而成，这种油状物质会施加幽暗的效果。来自幽冥影的力竭（状态）持续 24 小时。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:29]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害和 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[3d6[void]] 伤害、@Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[3d6[void]] 伤害、@Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 2}（1 轮）

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Distilled from the Netherworld, this oily substance imposes tenebrous effects. The enfeebled condition from nethershade lasts for 24 hours.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:29]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[void]] damage, @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d6[void]] damage, @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Olfactory Obfuscator (Greater).name: 嗅觉遮蔽器（高等） Olfactory Obfuscator (Greater)
Olfactory Obfuscator (Greater).description:
启动 A 交互

这种起泡的液体会使饮用者的身体渗出可吸收微量气味的油脂。饮用该炼金灵药后的8小时内，你的气味几乎无法被察觉。

具有不精确嗅觉的生物不会用该感官侦测到你，除非它们为你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}，并且对于以精确嗅觉察觉你的生物，你处于隐蔽状态。你获得+4物品加值，以对抗仅使用基于气味的感官来搜寻你的生物的搜寻尝试；若它们也使用任何其他感官，则该加值不适用。

Activate A Interact

This frothing fluid causes the drinker's body to exude trace odor absorbing oils. For 8 hours after drinking this elixir, your scent is nearly unnoticeable.

Creatures with imprecise scent don't detect you with that sense unless they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} for you, and you are concealed from creatures that perceive you with precise scent. You gain a +4 item bonus against attempts to Seek you by creatures using only scent-based senses; if they use any other senses as well, the bonus doesn't apply.

Poison Concentrator (Moderate).name: 毒素浓缩器（中等） Poison Concentrator (Moderate)
Poison Concentrator (Moderate).description:
该压缩装置可以将两份毒药浓缩为一份更高浓度的剂量。以一个具有操作（特征）的10分钟行动，你可以使用毒药浓缩器将两剂同一种9级或更低等级的炼金毒素合并，制造出一剂浓缩毒药，使其DC获得+1物品加值。

This compression apparatus can reduce two poisons into a more concentrated dose. As a 10-minute activity that has the manipulate trait, you can use a poison concentrator to combine two doses of the same alchemical poison of level 9 or lower, creating a single concentrated poison with a +1 item bonus to its DC.

Soothing Tonic (Greater).name: 舒缓补剂（强效） Soothing Tonic (Greater)
Soothing Tonic (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

舒缓补剂是一种令人愉悦的咸香调配饮品，能加速你的自然治疗，使你的伤口随着时间更快恢复。你获得快速治疗5，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Vj2vytSr9jEtesYu]{效果：舒缓补剂（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

Soothing tonic is a pleasantly savory concoction that speeds your natural healing, so your wounds recover faster over time. You gain fast healing 5 for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Vj2vytSr9jEtesYu]{Effect: Soothing Tonic (Greater)}

Tyrant Ampoule.name: 暴君安瓿 Tyrant Ampoule
Tyrant Ampoule.description:
启动 2 互动

一头可怖的暴龙的身体被缩小并封存在这只瓶子里，它干枯的形态在玻璃中几乎难以被约束。当你打开瓶子时，会形成一头巨型暴龙的偶像，它横冲直撞，造成毁灭。暴龙疾走最多40英尺。它可以穿过大型或更小生物的空间，并且可以尝试践踏其进入的空间中的每个生物，以 @Check[reflex|dc:27|basic] 造成 @Damage[(2d10+12)[bludgeoning]]。它对每个生物只能尝试践踏一次。

制作需求 提供一具暴龙的尸体。

Activate 2 Interact

The body of a fearsome tyrannosaurus is shrunken and contained in this bottle, its desiccated form barely constrained within the glass. The effigy of a Gargantuan tyrannosaurus forms when you open the bottle, causing devastation as it rampages. The tyrannosaurus Strides up to 40 feet. It can move through the spaces of Huge or smaller creatures and can attempt to Trample each creature whose space it enters, dealing @Damage[(2d10+12)[bludgeoning]] with a @Check[reflex|dc:27|basic]. It can attempt to Trample each creature only once.

Craft Requirements Supply the corpse of a tyrannosaurus.

Wolfsbane.name: 狼毒草 Wolfsbane
Wolfsbane.description:
乌头草因与狼人等兽化生物的联系而出现在民间传说中。如果你感染了兽化症并在乌头草的第3阶段中存活下来，你会立刻被治愈兽化症。

启动 A（操作）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

潜伏期 10分钟

最大持续时间 6分钟

阶段 1 @Damage[3d10[poison]] 伤害（1分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d10[poison]] 伤害（1分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[5d10[poison]] 伤害（1分钟）

Wolfsbane appears in folklore for its link to werecreatures. If you are afflicted with lycanthropy and survive Stage 3 of wolfsbane, you're immediately cured of the lycanthropy.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 @Damage[3d10[poison]] damage (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d10[poison]] damage (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Damage[5d10[poison]] damage (1 minute)

Acid Flask (Greater).name: 强效强酸瓶 Acid Flask (Greater)
Acid Flask (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

这个装满腐蚀性酸液的瓶子造成1点酸液伤害、3d6点持续酸液伤害，以及3点酸液飞溅伤害。你获得+2物品加值于攻击掷骰。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 3d6 persistent acid damage, and 3 acid splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Alchemist's Fire (Greater).name: 炼金术士之火（强效） Alchemist's Fire (Greater)
Alchemist's Fire (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

炼金术士之火是一种由易挥发液体混合而成的组合物，暴露在空气中便会点燃。炼金术士之火造成 3d8 火焰伤害、3 持续火焰伤害，以及 3 火焰飞溅伤害。你获得 +2 物品加值于攻击掷骰。

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 3d8 fire damage, 3 persistent fire damage, and 3 fire splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Animal Pheromones (Moderate).name: 动物信息素（中等） Animal Pheromones (Moderate)
Animal Pheromones (Moderate).description:
启动 1分钟（交互）

这些化学物质传递无数信号。存在许多种这类炼金鸡尾酒，每一种都针对某一特定种类动物的独特化学性质而调制。举例来说，你可以制作狼信息素，但不能制作能影响所有动物的信息素。这些信息素对与该特定动物相似、但实际上并非动物的生物不起作用——例如，狼信息素对狼人不起作用。当你学会动物信息素的配方时，你也学会所有常见动物的配方。若某一类动物都不是常见动物，你必须分别学习其配方，并且该配方的稀有度与该类中稀有度最低的生物相同。

你通过将动物信息素擦在自己身上，或擦在触及内的一个生物身上来启动动物信息素。信息素会持续24小时，或直到用1分钟的工作（由多次交互动作构成）擦洗干净为止。在这段时间内，信息素会在一个 @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15英尺半径} 内散发出淡淡的气味，用以安抚并影响所指定的动物。一个被指定的动物若在受影响区域内结束其回合，则必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:27] 意志豁免检定，并产生以下效果。之后，该动物会在24小时内对该信息素暂时免疫。该效果在信息素的持续时间内有效，即使该生物离开受影响区域后也是如此。

大成功或大失败成功 该动物不受影响。它不一定会察觉到信息素，尽管聪明的动物若观察到同类受到影响，可能会产生怀疑。

成功 该动物对受影响生物的态度改善一个快步。若这使其态度至少变为不关心，它就不能对受影响生物采取敌对动作；不过，只要受影响生物对该动物或其盟友采取一个敌对动作，态度变化就会立刻结束。

失败 同成功，但态度提升两个快步。

大成功或大失败失败 同成功，但态度提升至乐于助人。

Activate 1 minute (Interact)

These chemicals convey myriad signals. Many varieties of these alchemical cocktails exist, each tailored for the unique chemistry of a specific type of animal. You can, for example, make wolf pheromones, but not pheromones that affect all animals. The pheromones don't work on creatures that are similar to the specific kind of animal, but aren't actually animals—for example, wolf pheromones don't work on werewolves. When you learn the formula for animal pheromones, you learn the formulas for all common animals. If no animals of a kind are common, you must learn the formula for it separately, and the formula has the same rarity as the least-rare creature of that kind.

You Activate animal pheromones by rubbing them on yourself or a creature within reach. The pheromones last for 24 hours or until scrubbed clean with 1 minute of work (consisting of multiple Interact actions). During this time, the pheromones exude a subtle aroma in a @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15-foot radius} that calms and influences the designated animals. A designated animal that ends its turn within the affected area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] saving throw with the following effects. The animal is then temporarily immune to the pheromones for 24 hours. The effect lasts for the duration of the pheromones, even after the creature leaves the affected area.

Critical Success The animal is unaffected. It doesn't necessarily become aware of the pheromones, although intelligent animals might become suspicious if they observe others of their kind being affected.

Success The animal's attitude toward the affected creature improves by one step. If this improves its attitude to at least indifferent, it can't take hostile actions against the affected creature, though the change in attitude ends as soon as the affected creature takes a hostile action against the animal or its allies.

Failure As success, but the attitude increases by two steps.

Critical Failure As success, but the attitude increases to helpful.

Bane Ammunition (Greater).name: 绝望术弹药（强效） Bane Ammunition (Greater)
Bane Ammunition (Greater).description:
弹药 任意

启动 1 交互

怪物猎人偏爱绝望术弹药，其中包含一枚装有试剂的胶囊，这些试剂针对特定类型的生物——畸变、动物、野兽、龙类、精类、巨人、泥怪，或同时针对真菌与植物。每种类型都需要不同的配方。当启动后的绝望术弹药命中一个其特征与所选类型相匹配的目标时，除去该次攻击通常造成的伤害外，它还会受到 @Damage[3d6[persistent,poison]] 伤害。

Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

Monster hunters favor bane ammunition that contains a capsule of reagents tailored to a particular type of creature—aberration, animal, beast, dragon, fey, giant, ooze, or both fungus and plant. Each type requires a different formula. When activated bane ammunition hits a target that has a trait matching the selected type, it takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,poison]] damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

Bestial Mutagen (Greater).name: 野兽突变药剂（强效） Bestial Mutagen (Greater)
Bestial Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你的特征转化为某种野兽般、笨重的形态。

增益 你获得+3物品加值至运动检定和徒手攻击掷骰。你获得一次爪徒手攻击（3d8挥砍伤害），具有灵巧特征，以及一次啃咬徒手攻击（3d10穿刺伤害）。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} 符文不会修改这些攻击造成的伤害。

劣势 你在反射豁免、特技检定和隐匿检定上承受-2减值。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kwD0wuW5Ndkc9YXB]{效果：野兽突变剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Your features transform into something bestial and lumbering.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Athletics checks and unarmed attack rolls. You gain a claw unarmed attack (3d8 slashing damage) with the agile trait and a jaws unarmed attack (3d10 piercing damage). @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} runes don't modify the damage caused by these attacks.

Drawback You take a -2 penalty to Reflex saves, Acrobatics checks, and Stealth Checks.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kwD0wuW5Ndkc9YXB]{Effect: Bestial Mutagen (Greater)}

Blasting Stone (Greater).name: 爆破石（强效） Blasting Stone (Greater)
Blasting Stone (Greater).description:
启动 1 打击

当这颗卵石击中一个生物或坚硬表面时，它会以震耳欲聋的巨响爆炸。一颗爆破石造成所列的音波伤害与音波溅射伤害，并且每个在石头爆炸的空间周围10英尺内的生物都必须以所列DC进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:28|name:Greater Blasting Stone|showDC:all]豁免检定，否则将获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{失聪}状态，直到其下一回合结束。

你在攻击掷骰上获得+2物品加值。该炸弹造成3d4音波伤害与3点音波溅射伤害，DC为28。

Activate 1 Strike

When this pebble hits a creature or a hard surface, it explodes with a deafening bang. A blasting stone deals the listed sonic damage and sonic splash damage, and each creature within 10 feet of the space in which the stone exploded must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28|name:Greater Blasting Stone|showDC:all] saving throw with the listed DC or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of its next turn.

You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls. The bomb deals 3d4 sonic damage and 3 sonic splash damage, and the DC is 28.

Blight Bomb (Greater).name: 枯萎炸弹（强效） Blight Bomb (Greater)
Blight Bomb (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

枯萎炸弹包含会腐烂血肉的挥发性剧毒化学物质。一枚枯萎炸弹造成3d4毒素伤害、3d4持续性毒素伤害以及3点毒素溅射伤害。你在攻击掷骰上获得+2物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Blight bombs contain volatile toxic chemicals that rot flesh. A blight bomb deals 3d4 poison damage, 3d4 persistent poison damage, and 3 poison splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Blightburn Resin.name: 枯灼树脂 Blightburn Resin
Blightburn Resin.description:
这种黏稠、硬化的树脂采自感染真菌疫病并暴露在明火中的树木。

启用 A（操作）

豁免掷骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

潜伏期 1 分钟

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[9d6[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

This tacky, hardened sap is harvested from trees infected by fungal blights and exposed to open flames.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[9d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Blister Ammunition (Moderate).name: 起泡弹药（中等） Blister Ammunition (Moderate)
Blister Ammunition (Moderate).description:
弹药 任意

启动 1 交互

起泡弹药装填有经过炼金处理的刺激物，例如花粉、胡椒和蚁酸。被启动的起泡弹药命中的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:28] 豁免，否则除了受到该攻击正常造成的伤害外，还会开始无法控制地瘙痒，持续 6 轮。若为重击，将强韧 DC 提高 2（@Check[fortitude|dc:30]），且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。在持续时间内，目标每次尝试一个专注动作时，都必须进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:8] 纯骰检定，在失败时失去该动作。受影响的生物可以使用一次交互动作来抓挠并打喷嚏，使其自动通过该纯骰检定。一旦受影响的生物花费 3 次交互动作抓挠并打喷嚏，该效果会提前结束。这些交互动作不需要连续。

Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

Blister ammunition is loaded with alchemically processed irritants, such as pollen, pepper, and formic acid. A creature hit by activated blister ammunition must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or begin to itch uncontrollably for 6 rounds in addition to damage the attack normally deals. On a critical hit, increase the Fortitude DC by 2 (@Check[fortitude|dc:30]), and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. For the duration, each time the target attempts a concentrate action, it must attempt a @Check[flat|dc:8], losing the action on a failure. An affected creature can use a single Interact action to scratch and sneeze, allowing it to automatically pass the flat check. The effect ends early once an affected creature spends 3 Interact actions scratching and sneezing. These Interact actions don't need to be consecutive.

Blood Booster (Moderate).name: 血液增幅剂（中等） Blood Booster (Moderate)
Blood Booster (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

该炼金灵药强化你身体的自然防御与抵抗通过血液传播或影响血液的病症的能力。持续10分钟，你获得对持续性流血与持续性毒素伤害的抗力10，并且你为结束持续性流血或持续性毒素伤害所进行的任何纯骰检定的DC降低，如同你获得了格外恰当的援助。

由GM酌情决定，血液强化剂灵药也可以自动反制那些明确依赖稀释饮用者血液的非魔法效果，例如剥颅者的抗凝剂。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LfhCO3rP5ImzPyNY]{效果：血液强化剂}

Activate 1 Interact

This elixir bolsters your body's natural defenses and ability to resist maladies that travel through or affect blood. For 10 minutes you receive resistance 10 to persistent bleed and persistent poison damage, and you lower the DC for any flat checks to end persistent bleed or persistent poison damage as if you received particularly appropriate aid.

At the GM's discretion, blood booster elixirs can also automatically counteract non-magical effects that specifically rely on thinning the drinker's blood, such as a skull peeler's anticoagulant.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LfhCO3rP5ImzPyNY]{Effect: Blood Booster}

Bloodhound Mask (Greater).name: 寻血猎犬面具（强效） Bloodhound Mask (Greater)
Bloodhound Mask (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

持续时间 8小时

这款宽大的单次使用面具被设计为可用单手将其套在你的口鼻上，并同时启动其炼金过滤器。一旦启动，该面具会强化气味，使你获得射程60尺的不精确嗅觉。佩戴寻血猎犬面具期间，你不能佩戴其他面具。

当你使用生存来通过气味对一个生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪} 时，即使你未受训，你的熟练度加值也等同于你的等级，并且该面具使你的生存检定获得+3物品加值。GM基于该区域保留气味的能力来设定生存DC，而非如常依赖视觉线索，这是使用嗅觉时的通常规则。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.MI5OCkF9IXmD2lPF]{效果：寻血猎犬面具（高等）}

Activate 1 Interact

Duration 8 hours

This wide, single-use mask is designed to be slipped over your mouth and nose and its alchemical filter activated all with one hand. Once activated, the mask sharpens odors, giving you imprecise scent with a 60 foot range. You can't wear other masks while you're wearing a bloodhound mask.

When you use Survival to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} a creature by its scent, your proficiency bonus is equal to your level even if you're untrained, and the mask grants you a +3 item bonus to your Survival check. The GM sets the Survival DC based on the area's ability to hold scent rather than on visual clues, as normal for using scent.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.MI5OCkF9IXmD2lPF]{Effect: Bloodhound Mask (Greater)}

Bottled Lightning (Greater).name: 瓶装闪电（高等） Bottled Lightning (Greater)
Bottled Lightning (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

瓶装闪电装满了不稳定的试剂，一旦暴露在空气中就会引发电能爆炸。瓶装闪电造成3d6电击伤害与3点电击溅射伤害。命中时，目标在你下个回合开始前变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。你获得攻击掷骰的+2物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 3d6 electricity damage and 3 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Choker-Arm Mutagen (Greater).name: 锁喉臂突变剂（强效） Choker-Arm Mutagen (Greater)
Choker-Arm Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

持续1小时，你的四肢变得异常柔韧，让你能够以极端幅度伸展与扭转，但代价是精细动作能力下降。

增益 你在用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤入空间}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越}的特技检定中获得+3物品加值，且你的触及增加10尺。

缺点 你在运动检定、隐秘检定、盗窃检定与攻击掷骰中承受–1减值，且所有武器与徒手攻击伤害的每个伤害骰承受–1减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.HlUL7FmGLyS35Jpp]{效果：锁喉臂突变剂（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

For 1 hour your limbs become extremely limber, letting you stretch and twist to extreme degrees at the cost of fine motor skills.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}, and you increase your reach by 10 feet.

Drawback You take a –1 penalty to Athletics checks, Stealth checks, Thievery checks, and attack rolls, and a –1 penalty per damage die to all weapon and unarmed attack damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.HlUL7FmGLyS35Jpp]{Effect: Choker-Arm Mutagen (Greater)}

Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Moderate).name: 幻色水母油（中等） Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Moderate)
Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

由从水母与稀有植物中萃取的数种不同色泽的油制成，虹彩水母油的各层在瓶中堆叠，形成一道彩虹。饮用虹彩水母油后的10分钟内，你获得10点对精准伤害以及来自大成功或大失败的额外伤害的抗力。该效果持续期间，你无视因穿过狭窄空间移动而导致的困难地形（这些空间尚不足以迫使你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤入空间}），且你在成功挤入空间时每轮可移动5尺（若为大成功或大失败则为每轮10尺）。你也可以以你速度的一半进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Tj055UcNm6UEgtCg]{匍匐}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.vdNgW5I9AnI1x4Nq]{效果：虹彩水母油（中等）}

Activate 1 Interact

Made from several oils of differing hues extracted from jellyfish and rare plants, the layers of chromatic jellyfish oil stack to form a rainbow within their vial. For 10 minutes after consuming chromatic jellyfish oil, you gain resistance 10 to precision damage and extra damage from critical hits. While the effect lasts, you ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}, and you can move 5 feet per round when you successfully Squeeze (or 10 feet per round on a critical success). You can also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Tj055UcNm6UEgtCg]{Crawl} at half your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.vdNgW5I9AnI1x4Nq]{Effect: Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Moderate)}

Cognitive Mutagen (Greater).name: 认知诱变剂（强效） Cognitive Mutagen (Greater)
Cognitive Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你的思维变得清晰，但身体层面的事物似乎变得虚幻。

增益 你获得对奥术、制造、传说、神秘学和社会检定以及所有用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的检定的+3物品加值。你在回忆知识检定上的大失败改为失败。你在创建时选择一项以智力为关键属性的技能[奥术、制造、传说、神秘学、社会]，并在该技能上变为受训。

缺陷 你在武器和徒手攻击掷骰、运动检定以及特技动作检定上承受-2减值。在变为负载过重之前，你能携带的负载比正常少2，并且你能携带的最大负载减少4。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.qit1mLbJUyRTYcPU]{效果：认知诱变剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Your mind becomes clear, but physical matters seem ephemeral.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society checks and all checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}. Your critical failures on Recall Knowledge checks become failures instead. You become trained in one Intelligence-based skill [Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, Society], chosen at creation.

Drawback You take a -2 penalty to weapon and unarmed attack rolls, Athletics checks, and acrobatics checks. You can carry 2 less Bulk than normal before becoming encumbered, and the maximum Bulk you can carry is reduced by 4.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.qit1mLbJUyRTYcPU]{Effect: Cognitive Mutagen (Greater)}

Contagion Metabolizer (Moderate).name: 传染代谢器（中等） Contagion Metabolizer (Moderate)
Contagion Metabolizer (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

传染代谢剂会在血液中搜寻毒素，并试图将其净化为人体可自然处理的体液。当你饮用该灵药时，它会以[[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19}调整值进行一次反制检定，以移除影响你的最高等级毒药或疾病。该灵药的反制阶位为6。对于疾病而言这需要更久——你饮用灵药后直到10分钟后才会进行反制检定。饮用后，你会在1小时内对传染代谢剂获得暂时免疫。

如果你是一名外科医师炼金术师且拥有强力炼金术，当你使用快速炼金术制造传染代谢剂时，若你的数据更高，你可以改用你的数据。这会将反制阶位替换为你等级的一半（向上取整），并将反制调整值替换为你的职业DC – 10。

Activate 1 Interact

Contagion metabolizers seek out toxins in the bloodstream and attempt to purify them into humors the body processes naturally. When you drink this elixir, it attempts a counteract check with a [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} modifier to remove the highest-level poison or disease afflicting you. The elixir has a counteract rank of 6. This takes longer for a disease—the counteract check doesn't happen until 10 minutes after you drink the elixir. After drinking, you become temporarily immune to contagion metabolizers for 1 hour.

If you're a chirurgeon alchemist and have powerful alchemy, you can substitute your statistics when you create a contagion metabolizer using Quick Alchemy, if your stats are higher. This replaces the counteract rank with half your level rounded up and the counteract modifier with your class DC – 10.

Dancing Lamentation.name: 哀歌之舞 Dancing Lamentation
Dancing Lamentation.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒素会不规则地刺激四肢，迫使动量产生意外的变化。其结果类似一种四肢细长、踉跄的舞蹈。在每个回合开始时，若受害者能够，则会随机朝一个方向进行一次或多次快步。此移动为强迫移动，且不计入受害者本轮的动作。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 且 1 次快步的强迫移动（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，且 1 次快步的强迫移动（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，且 2 次快步的强迫移动（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This toxin erratically stimulates the limbs, forcing unexpected shifts in momentum. The result resembles a gangly, lurching dance. At the start of each turn, the victim takes one or more Steps in a random direction if able. This movement is forced and doesn't count against the victim's actions for the round.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[4d6[poison]] and 1 Step of forced movement (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and 1 Step of forced movement (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, 2 Steps of forced movement (1 round)

Deadweight Mutagen (Greater).name: 死重突变剂（高等） Deadweight Mutagen (Greater)
Deadweight Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

1小时内，你的关节变得松弛、骨骼变得粗厚，使你的身体异常沉重，难以被挪动或绕开。

增益 你在进行用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}的运动检定时获得+3物品加值；在对抗试图推撞或绊摔你的尝试时，你的强韧与反射DC获得+3物品加值；在对抗试图强迫你移动或将你击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}的效果之豁免检定上获得+3物品加值。你可以尝试推撞或绊摔体型最多比你大两个等级的生物。

劣势 你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{超载（状态）}状态，且在诱变剂效果持续期间无法移除它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.IFHqrbQUOT2LzNDB]{效果：自重诱变剂（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

For 1 hour your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}, to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to Shove or Trip you, and to saving throws against effects that attempt to force you to move or knock you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. You can attempt to Shove or Trip creatures up to two sizes larger than you.

Drawback You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} condition and can't remove it while under the effects of the mutagen.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.IFHqrbQUOT2LzNDB]{Effect: Deadweight Mutagen (Greater)}

Drakeheart Mutagen (Greater).name: 龙心变异药剂（强效） Drakeheart Mutagen (Greater)
Drakeheart Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你的皮肤长出如同双足飞龙般的鳞片，你的视力变得锐利、瞳孔变成竖缝，但你的心智与反应变得迟缓。

增益 你获得AC+6物品加值，敏捷上限+2（照常，如果你有多个敏捷上限则使用其中最低者），以及察觉检定+3物品加值。如果你正穿着护甲，即使龙心突变剂具有更高的物品加值，你仍然根据你对所穿护甲的熟练度来计算你对AC的熟练度加值。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EHa0owz6mccnmSBf]{最终激增}动作。

缺陷 你在意志豁免、反射豁免，以及所有用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的技能检定上承受-1减值。

持续时间 1小时，或直到你使用最终激增为止，以先发生者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.qwoLV4awdezlEJ60]{效果：龙心突变剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Your skin grows scales like a drake, and your eyesight become sharp and your pupils slitted, but your mind and reflexes slow.

Benefit You gain +6 item bonus to AC, a Dexterity cap of +2 (as usual, use your lowest Dexterity cap if you have more than one), and a +3 item bonus to Perception checks. If you're wearing armor, you still calculate your proficiency bonus to AC based on your proficiency in the armor you're wearing, even if the drakeheart mutagen has a higher item bonus. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EHa0owz6mccnmSBf]{Final Surge} action.

Drawback You take a -1 penalty to Will saves, Reflex saves, and all skill checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}.

Duration 1 hour or until you use Final Surge, whichever comes first.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.qwoLV4awdezlEJ60]{Effect: Drakeheart Mutagen (Greater)}

Dread Ampoule (Greater).name: 恐惧安瓿（高等） Dread Ampoule (Greater)
Dread Ampoule (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

这个瓶子里装满了浑浊的紫色气体，会短暂干扰正常的大脑活动。恐惧安瓿造成 3d6 精神伤害以及 3 精神溅射伤害。

命中时，目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}，若为大成功命中则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。许多类型还会给予攻击掷骰的物品加值。

你获得攻击掷骰 +2 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask is filled with a murky purple gas that briefly interferes with normal brain activity. A dread ampoule deals 3d6 mental damage and 3 mental splash damage.

On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit. Many types also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Elemental Ammunition (Greater).name: 元素弹药（强效） Elemental Ammunition (Greater)
Elemental Ammunition (Greater).description:
弹药 任意

启动 1 交互

启动时，元素弹药中的炼金试剂储槽在命中时雾化，除攻击通常造成的伤害之外，还会对目标造成 @Damage[3d4[persistent,damageType]] 酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或毒素伤害，并造成 @Damage[(3[splash])[damageType]]{3溅射伤害}。每种伤害类型都需要不同的配方，且弹药获得与该伤害类型相匹配的特征。

Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

When activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing @Damage[3d4[persistent,damageType]] acid, cold, electricity, fire, or poison damage to the target and @Damage[(3[splash])[damageType]]{3 splash damage} in addition to the damage the attack normally deals. Each damage type requires a different formula, and the ammunition gains a trait matching the damage type.

Energy Mutagen (Greater).name: 能量诱变剂（强效） Energy Mutagen (Greater)
Energy Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A 交互

在制造时，该突变剂会调谐至四种能量类型之一：酸液、寒冷、电击或火焰。被饮用后，突变剂以能量充盈你的身体，使其在你进行攻击时溢散而出。在更高等级时，它甚至能赋予你以可控的爆发释放这些能量的能力。

增益 你获得对所调谐能量类型的抗力15。每当你用近战武器命中一次时，额外造成[[/r 1d6]]点所调谐能量类型的伤害。此外，你可以终止该突变剂的增益，以2-行动的行动释放一个30尺锥形的能量@Template[cone|distance:30]。对区域内每个生物造成[[/r 2d6]]点所调谐类型的伤害，且每剩余完整10分钟的持续时间，该伤害再增加[[/r 2d6]]（最大8d6）；目标需进行一次@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|name:Greater Energy Mutagen]豁免。

缺陷 你获得对另外三种能量类型的弱点5。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.JbJykktAYMR4BRav]{效果: Energy Mutagen (Greater)}

Activate A Interact

When created, this mutagen is attuned to one of four energy types: acid, cold, electricity, or fire. When consumed, the mutagen suffuses your body with energy that spills out whenever you attack. At higher levels, it can even grant you the ability to unleash the energy in controlled bursts.

Benefit You gain resistance 15 to the attuned energy type. Whenever you score a hit with a melee weapon, add [[/r 1d6]] damage of the attuned energy type. In addition, you can end the benefits of this mutagen to unleash a @Template[cone|distance:30] of energy as a 2-action activity. This deals [[/r 2d6]] damage of the attuned type for every full 10 minutes of duration remaining (maximum 8d6) to each creature in the area, with a @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|name:Greater Energy Mutagen] save.

Drawback You gain weakness 5 to the other three energy types.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.JbJykktAYMR4BRav]{Effect: Energy Mutagen (Greater)}

Frost Vial (Greater).name: 霜冻小瓶（高等） Frost Vial (Greater)
Frost Vial (Greater).description:
激活 1 打击

这瓶小瓶中的亮蓝色液体试剂在暴露于空气中时会迅速吸收热量。寒霜小瓶会造成所列的寒冷伤害与寒冷溅射伤害。命中时，目标的速度在其下一回合结束前受到状态减值。

你获得+2物品加值于攻击掷骰，炸弹造成3d6寒冷伤害与3点寒冷溅射伤害，且目标承受-10英尺减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.nJRoiSyd67eQ1dYj]{效果: 寒霜小瓶（强效）}

Activate 1 Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals the listed cold damage and cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn.

You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls, the bomb deals 3d6 cold damage and 3 cold splash damage, and the target takes a -10-foot penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.nJRoiSyd67eQ1dYj]{Effect: Frost Vial (Greater)}

Ghost Charge (Greater).name: 幽灵冲锋（强效） Ghost Charge (Greater)
Ghost Charge (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

这些弹簧装置的金属容器内装有化学物质与盐类的混合物，能汲取并瓦解附近的不死生物。

幽灵弹使攻击掷骰获得+2物品加值，造成3d8活力伤害与3点活力飞溅伤害；不过依照活力伤害的常规，此伤害只会伤害不死生物与具有虚空治疗的生物。因幽灵弹受到伤害的主要目标，会成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}，直到你下个回合开始。

幽灵弹被设计为即使接触到灵性物质也会爆炸，使其非常适合用来伤害无实体的不死生物。

Activate A Strike

These spring-loaded metal canisters contain a mixture of chemicals and salts that drain and disintegrate nearby undead creatures.

A ghost charge gives a +2 item bonus to attack rolls, deals 3d8 vitality damage and 3 vitality splash damage, though as usual for vitality damage, this damage harms only undead and creatures with void healing. A primary target that takes damage from a ghost charge becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the start of your next turn.

Ghost charges are designed to explode even on contact with a spiritual substance, making them ideal for damaging incorporeal undead.

Glue Bomb (Greater).name: 黏胶炸弹（强效） Glue Bomb (Greater)
Glue Bomb (Greater).description:
启动 1 打击

黏胶炸弹是一种无害的爆炸装置，会迸裂出黏稠物质。当你用黏胶炸弹击中一个生物时，该生物的各项速度在1分钟内受到–15英尺的状态减值。你在攻击掷骰上获得+2物品加值，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} DC为28。

在大成功或大失败时，与坚固表面接触的生物会被黏在表面上，并在1轮内@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}；而通过翅膀飞行的生物其翅膀会被缠住，导致其安全地落到地面，并在1轮内无法再次飞行。在水中的生物不受黏胶炸弹的有效影响。

目标可以通过逃脱，或花费总计3个交互动作小心移除黏稠物质来结束任何效果。这些交互动作不必连续进行，其他生物也可以提供这些动作。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.csA4UAD2tQq7RjT8]{效果：黏胶炸弹（高等）}

Activate 1 Strike

A glue bomb is a harmless explosive mechanism bursting with sticky substances. When you hit a creature with a glue bomb, that creature takes a –15-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls, and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC is 28.

On a critical hit, a creature in contact with a solid surface becomes stuck to the surface and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round, and a creature flying via wings has its wings tangled, causing it to fall safely to the ground and become unable to Fly again for 1 round. Glue bombs are not effective when used on a creature that is in water.

The target can end any effects by Escaping or spending a total of 3 Interact actions to carefully remove the sticky substances. These Interact actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.csA4UAD2tQq7RjT8]{Effect: Glue Bomb (Greater)}

Juggernaut Mutagen (Greater).name: 主宰突变剂（强效） Juggernaut Mutagen (Greater)
Juggernaut Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你的身体变得坚实且笨重。

增益 你获得对强韧豁免的+3物品加值以及30点临时生命值。每当你在至少1整分钟内保持最大生命值时，你会恢复这些临时生命值。每当你在一次强韧豁免中掷骰获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

劣势 你在意志豁免、察觉检定与先攻掷骰上承受-2减值。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xLilBqqf34ZJYO9i]{效果：主宰变异药剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Your body becomes sturdy and ponderous.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude saves and 30 temporary Hit Points. Whenever you are at maximum Hit Points for at least 1 full minute, you regain the temporary Hit Points. When you roll a success on a Fortitude save, you get a critical success instead.

Drawback You take a -2 penalty to Will saves, Perception checks and initiative rolls.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xLilBqqf34ZJYO9i]{Effect: Juggernaut Mutagen (Greater)}

Necrotic Bomb (Greater).name: 暗蚀炸弹（高等） Necrotic Bomb (Greater)
Necrotic Bomb (Greater).description:
启动 1 打击

暗蚀炸弹混合了大多数人认为至多令人作呕、最坏则亵渎不洁的试剂，在接触空气时制造出一种吸取生命的瘴气。暗蚀炸弹造成所列的虚空伤害与溅射伤害，并在大成功或大失败命中时使主要目标陷入恶心。此伤害只会伤害活着的生物。

你在攻击掷骰获得+2加值。

该炸弹造成3d6虚空伤害和3虚空溅射伤害。在大成功或大失败命中时，目标为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心3}。

Activate 1 Strike

Necrotic bombs combine reagents most people consider disgusting at best and unholy at worst, creating a life-sucking miasma upon contact with air. A necrotic bomb deals the listed void damage and splash damage, and it sickens the primary target on a critical hit. This damage harms only living creatures.

You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls.

The bomb deals 3d6 void damage and 3 void splash damage. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}.

Pheromone Flare (Moderate).name: 信息素闪光（中等） Pheromone Flare (Moderate)
Pheromone Flare (Moderate).description:
启动 2（操作）

这支炼金蜡烛被固定在一根高杆与接地桩上。当信号弹被点燃时，它会喷洒一团高浓度的信息素云，以吸引特定种类动物的注意（见 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.erLH6cQYhyZB5CLM]{炼金信息素}）。与动物信息素类似，当你学会信息素信号弹的配方时，你也会学会所有常见动物的信息素配方。

信息素信号弹内置一个最长 1 小时的延迟启动计时器。当它被启动时，信号弹会在 @Template[emanation|distance:60] 内释放一团持续 1 小时的信息素云。强风会将此放射缩小为 @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15 英尺}，持续时间与风持续时间相同。在其启动后移动信号弹会结束该效果。进入该区域的指定动物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:27] 意志豁免，并承受下列效果。智力调整值为 –3 或更高的动物将其豁免结果提高一个等级。

大成功 该动物不受影响，并在 24 小时内暂时免疫。

成功 该动物不受影响，但只要它仍处于该区域内，就必须每 10 分钟尝试一次新的豁免。

失败 该动物被信息素吸引，沿着云团追随至其来源。该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂}，直到它抵达信号弹并花费 1 轮调查行动它为止。之后，它在 24 小时内暂时免疫。

大失败 同失败，但迷魂持续时间最长可达 1 小时，尽管该动物每 10 分钟可以再尝试一次对抗该效果的豁免。该动物在此豁免上承受 –1 状态减值；每次后续失败或大失败时，该减值增加 1，最大至 –3 状态减值

Activate 2 (manipulate)

This alchemical candle is attached to a tall pole and grounding stake. When the flare is lit, it sprays a concentrated cloud of pheromones to attract the attention of a specific kind of animal (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.erLH6cQYhyZB5CLM]{alchemical pheromones}). Similar to animal pheromones, when you learn the formula for a pheromone flare, you learn the formulas for all common animals.

A pheromone flare has a built-in delayed activation timer of up to 1 hour. When it's activated, the flare releases a cloud of pheromones in a @Template[emanation|distance:60] that lasts for 1 hour. A strong wind reduces the emanation to @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15 feet} for as long as the wind lasts. Moving the flare after it has been activated ends the effect. A designated animal that enters the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] save with the following effects. Animals with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher increase the result of their save by one step.

Critical Success The animal is unaffected and temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The animal is unaffected but must attempt a new save every 10 minutes it remains within the area.

Failure The animal is attracted by the pheromones, following the cloud to its source. The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} until it reaches the flare and spends 1 round investigating it. After this, it becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Critical Failure As failure, except the fascination lasts for up to 1 hour, though the animal can attempt a new save against the effect every 10 minutes. The animal takes a –1 status penalty to this save that increases by 1 with each subsequent failure or critical failure, up to a maximum of a –3 status penalty

Quicksilver Mutagen (Greater).name: 速银诱变剂（强效） Quicksilver Mutagen (Greater)
Quicksilver Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你变得更迅捷、更灵巧，但也更脆弱。

益处 你在杂技检定、隐匿检定、巧手检定、反射豁免以及基于敏捷的攻击掷骰上获得+3物品加值，并且你的速度获得+15尺状态加值。

劣势 你受到等同于你等级两倍的伤害；在诱变剂持续期间，你无法以任何方式恢复以此方式失去的生命值。你在强韧豁免上承受-2减值。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2Bds6d4UGQZqYSZM]{效果：速银诱变剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

You become swifter and nimbler but also fragile.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Acrobatics checks, Stealth checks, Thievery checks, Reflex saves, and Dexterity-based attack rolls, and you gain a +15 foot status bonus to your Speed.

Drawback You take damage equal to twice your level; you can't recover Hit Points lost this way by any means while the mutagen lasts. You take a -2 penalty to Fortitude saves.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2Bds6d4UGQZqYSZM]{Effect: Quicksilver Mutagen (Greater)}

Sanguine Mutagen (Greater).name: 血红诱变剂（强效） Sanguine Mutagen (Greater)
Sanguine Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 1 互动

在1小时内，你的造血能力大幅提升，能过滤传染源并增强你的耐力，但也会使你的身体因血液而肿胀。

增益 你在强韧与反射豁免上获得+3物品加值。若你尝试对抗具有疾病（特征）、毒素（特征）的效果，或会使你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏（状态）}状态的效果进行豁免时，该加值提升至+4。

当你在对抗疾病、毒素，或会使你获得疲乏（状态）状态的效果进行豁免时掷出成功，你改为获得大成功。

缺陷 每当你受到穿刺或挥砍伤害时，你会受到@Damage[1d6[bleed]]。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.FtBfE4yrbg9fxtxr]{效果：血红诱变剂（强效）}

Activate 1 Interact

For 1 hour you gain greatly increased blood production, filtering out contagions and boosting your endurance but causing your body to bloat with blood.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves. This bonus improves to +4 when you attempt a save against an effect that has the disease trait, poison trait, or would give you the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition.

When you roll a success on a save against a disease, poison, or effect that would give you the Fatigued condition, you get a critical success instead.

Drawback Whenever you take piercing or slashing damage, you take @Damage[1d6[bleed]].

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.FtBfE4yrbg9fxtxr]{Effect: Sanguine Mutagen (Greater)}

Serene Mutagen (Greater).name: 宁静诱变剂（强效） Serene Mutagen (Greater)
Serene Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你获得内心的宁静，但你觉得暴力令人反感。

益处 你在意志豁免和察觉、医疗、自然、宗教与求生检定上获得+3物品加值。当你尝试对抗心灵效果的意志豁免时，此加值提升至+4。当你在对抗心灵效果的意志豁免上掷出成功时，你改为获得大成功。

缺陷 你在攻击掷骰与进攻性法术的豁免DC上承受-1减值，并且你对所有武器、徒手攻击与法术伤害在每个伤害骰上承受-1减值。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.jw6Tr9FbErjLAFLQ]{效果：宁静突变剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

You gain inner serenity, but you find violence off-putting.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Will saves and Perception, Medicine, Nature, Religion, and Survival checks. This bonus improves to +4 when you attempt Will saves against mental effects. When you roll a success on a Will save against a mental effect, you get a critical success instead.

Drawback You take a -1 penalty to attack rolls and save DCs of offensive spells, and a -1 penalty per damage die to all weapon, unarmed attack, and spell damage.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.jw6Tr9FbErjLAFLQ]{Effect: Serene Mutagen (Greater)}

Silencing Shot.name: 沉默射击 Silencing Shot
Silencing Shot.description:
弹药 任意

启动 1 构想

这种闪烁的金色调弹药从不会发出任何声音。被沉默射击命中的生物会受到4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{沉默术} 法术（法术DC 25）的效果影响。

制作需求 提供一次以4环施放的沉默术。

Ammunition any

Activate 1 envision

This shimmering, golden-hued ammunition never makes any sound. A creature hit by a silencing shot is subject to the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence} spell (DC 25).

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of silence at 4th rank.

Silver Crescent (Moderate).name: 银色新月（中等） Silver Crescent (Moderate)
Silver Crescent (Moderate).description:
酸爽的罗望子与青柠辣椒风味注入一枚银色新月，其最初被制作出来以援助那些与不死生物作战的人。持续1小时，你如同火把般散发清冷的白色光亮术，并且你获得对抗嗅觉效果的豁免检定+2物品加值。在散发此光亮术期间，若你可见，则你不能处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}状态；若你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}状态，则你改为处于隐蔽而非未察觉。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.qWeEmDft3tRWlIwy]{效果：银色新月（中等）}

次要效果 2

效果 一道光线降下，照射你在120尺内选择的一个5尺方形区域。任何位于该空间内的生物承受@Damage[7d6[vitality]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic]；在豁免失败时，该生物将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}状态直到其下个回合结束。就弱点、抗力等用途而言，此效果视为银。该银色新月变为惰性。

A piquant tamarind and chili-lime flavor infuses a silver crescent, which was first created to aid those battling the undead. For 1 hour, you shed cool, white light like a torch, and you gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against olfactory effects. While shedding this light, you can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} if you're visible, and if you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, you're concealed instead rather than being undetected.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.qWeEmDft3tRWlIwy]{Effect: Silver Crescent (Moderate)}

Secondary Effect 2

Effect A ray of light descends on a 5-foot square of your choice within 120 feet. Any creature in that space takes @Damage[7d6[vitality]] with a @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic] and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn on a failed save. This is treated as silver for the purposes of weaknesses, resistances, and the like. The silver crescent becomes inert.

Silvertongue Mutagen (Greater).name: 银舌诱变剂（强效） Silvertongue Mutagen (Greater)
Silvertongue Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你的五官变得更加醒目，你的嗓音变得如音乐般悦耳而富有号令力，不过情绪会蒙蔽你的理智。

增益 你获得+3物品加值，适用于欺瞒、交涉、威吓与表演检定。你在这些技能上的任何大失败改为失败。

缺陷 你在奥术、制造、学识、秘学与社会检定上承受-2物品减值。选择一项你已受训的技能；在持续时间内，你在该技能上变为未受训。你所有用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的失败都变为大失败。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.oAewXfq9c0ecaSfw]{效果：银舌诱变剂（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Your features become striking, and your voice becomes musical and commanding, though emotion clouds your reason.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation and Performance checks. Your critical failures with any of these skills become failures instead.

Drawback You take a -2 item penalty to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society checks. Choose one skill in which you are trained; for the duration, you become untrained in that skill. All your failures to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} become critical failures.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.oAewXfq9c0ecaSfw]{Effect: Silvertongue Mutagen (Greater)}

Skunk Bomb (Greater).name: 臭鼬炸弹（强效） Skunk Bomb (Greater)
Skunk Bomb (Greater).description:
启动 1 打击

臭鼬炸弹由地蜥人（特征）、赫兹罗恶魔以及其他具有自然或超自然恶臭的生物之浓缩气味制成。该炸弹给予攻击掷骰+2物品加值，并造成3d4毒素伤害与3点毒素溅射伤害。任何被炸弹命中的生物，或处于其溅射区域内的生物，都必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:28]豁免。在溅射区域内的生物将其豁免结果视为提高一级。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）1}。

失败 目标陷入恶心（状态）1，并在处于恶心（状态）期间获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

大失败 目标在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）2}，并在处于恶心（状态）期间获得迟缓 1。

因该炸弹而恶心（状态）的生物会散发气味，在恶心（状态）结束后仍持续10分钟（若其同时目盲，则持续1小时）。该气味可通过使用魔法伎俩或类似魔法移除或中和，或花费10分钟用充足的肥皂与清水擦洗来去除。气味持续期间，30尺内的生物都能闻到目标，使得即便嗅觉较弱者也能侦测其存在；并且所有生物在该受影响生物仍带有气味期间，对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}它获得+1物品加值。拥有模糊嗅觉或精确嗅觉的生物，使用此嗅觉侦测目标时，其可侦测的距离加倍。

Activate 1 Strike

Skunk bombs are made from the concentrated odors of xulgaths, hezrous, and other creatures with natural or supernatural stench. The bomb grants a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and deals 3d4 poison damage and 3 poison splash damage. Any creature hit by the bomb or in its splash area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] saving throw. Creatures in the splash area treat the results of their saving throw as one step better.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The target is sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while sickened.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and slowed 1 while sickened.

Creatures sickened by the bomb emit an odor that lasts 10 minutes after the sickened condition ends (or 1 hour if they were also blinded). The odor can be removed or neutralized by using prestidigitation or similar magic or by spending 10 minutes scrubbing with ample soap and water. While the odor lasts, creatures within 30 feet can smell the target, enabling even those with a weak sense of smell to detect its presence, and all creatures gain a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the affected creature for as long as it has the odor. A creature that has imprecise or precise scent doubles the range at which it can detect the target using this scent.

Soothing Powder (Greater).name: 舒缓粉末（强效） Soothing Powder (Greater)
Soothing Powder (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

舒缓粉末是一种用于阻止特定类型持续伤害的疗法。每种伤害类型都需要不同的配方，其中最常见的是流血舒缓粉末、毒素舒缓粉末、火焰舒缓粉末和酸液舒缓粉末。你通过将其撒在自己身上或触及范围内的另一名生物身上来启动舒缓粉末。目标可以立刻尝试一次新的纯骰检定，以移除该粉末所针对的持续伤害。该粉末将DC降低至10，这与针对某种特别合适的援助的常规效果一致。

除了上述效果外，该粉末会持续1分钟，由于特别有效的协助，它会降低针对该类型持续伤害的纯骰检定DC。

Activate 1 Interact

Soothing powders are remedies made to stop a particular type of persistent damage. Each damage type requires a different formula, with the most popular being bleed soothing powder, poison soothing powder, fire soothing powder, and acid soothing powder. You Activate soothing powder by sprinkling it on yourself or another creature within reach. The target can immediately attempt a new flat check to remove persistent damage the powder works against. This powder lowers the DC to 10, as normal for a particularly appropriate type of help.

In addition to the effects described above, the powder persists for 1 minute, lowering the DCs of flat checks against that type of persistent damage due to particularly effective assistance.

Sticky Algae Bomb (Greater).name: 黏性藻类炸弹（强效） Sticky Algae Bomb (Greater)
Sticky Algae Bomb (Greater).description:
启动 1 打击

这些炸弹混入了会发光并散发毒素的黏性藻类。使用该炸弹进行的攻击不会因在水中或水下使用而承受通常的减值与限制。你获得 +2 物品加值于攻击掷骰。该炸弹造成 3d8 毒素伤害以及 3 点毒素溅射伤害。此外，目标会被这种生物发光物质标记，并在接下来 1 小时内留下高度可见的痕迹。通过这条痕迹对一个生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪} 的 DC 为 19，但该痕迹只会在水中显现。

Activate 1 Strike

These bombs have been mixed with sticky algae that glow and emit poison. Attacks with this bomb don't take the normal penalties and restrictions for being used in water or underwater. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls. The bomb deals 3d8 poison damage and 3 poison splash damage. In addition, the target is tagged by the bioluminescent substance and leaves a highly visible trail for the next hour. The DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} a creature using this trail is 19, but the trail appears only in water.

Theatrical Mutagen (Greater).name: 戏剧突变剂（强效） Theatrical Mutagen (Greater)
Theatrical Mutagen (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

戏剧突变剂由欧帕拉基萨罗迪亚学院的学生研发并广泛使用，它会刺激你大脑中的创造力中枢。这会使你的动作变得夸张，你的声音变得清晰。然而，不稳定的灵感激增会使你的感官过载，使你难以专注于日常任务。持续10分钟。

益处 你在特技检定、制作检定和表演检定中获得+3物品加值。若你在这些技能中的任意一项未受训，你的熟练度加值等于你的等级，而非+0。你还获得+10尺状态加值至你的速度。
