劣势 你在察觉检定与意志豁免中承受–1减值。在任何一轮中，若你没有至少花费1个动作与一个物体进行交互，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}，迈步或疾行，则你将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，直到你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.o2yteYPGqEjpPAZ5]{效果: 戏剧突变剂（高等）}

Activate 1 Interact

Developed and widely used by students at the Kitharodian Academy in Oppara, the theatrical mutagen stimulates the creative centers of your brain. This causes your movements to become exaggerated and your voice to become clear. However, the erratic surges of inspiration overload your senses, making it difficult to focus on mundane tasks. This lasts for 10 minutes.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Acrobatics checks, Crafting checks, and Performance checks. If you're untrained in any of these skills, your proficiency bonus is equal to your level instead of +0. You also gain a +10 feet status bonus to your Speed.

Drawback You take a –1 penalty to Perception checks and Will saves. After any round where you don't spend at least 1 action to Interact with an object, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}, Step, or Stride, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.o2yteYPGqEjpPAZ5]{Effect: Theatrical Mutagen (Greater)}

Viperous Elixir (Greater).name: 蝮蛇灵药（强效） Viperous Elixir (Greater)
Viperous Elixir (Greater).description:
启动 A（操作）

你的牙齿延长成带有沟槽的獠牙，可将致命毒液导入其中。你获得一次獠牙徒手攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害，除非你已经拥有造成更高伤害的徒手啃咬攻击。当你用獠牙或其他啃咬攻击进行打击时，你在徒手攻击与伤害掷骰上获得所列的物品加值。

该加值为+3，你的獠牙施加@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.WL4O32qFifxnMj0H]{双足飞龙毒液}，且持续时间为10分钟，或直到你用獠牙命中并造成伤害三次，以先发生者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zW8adCNIRo46mfEH]{效果：毒蛇灵药（强效）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Your teeth elongate into fangs with grooves that can channel a deadly venom. You gain a fangs unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage, unless you already have an unarmed bite attack that deals more damage. You gain the listed item bonus to unarmed attack and damage rolls when you Strike with your fangs or another bite attack.

The bonus is +3, your fangs inflict @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.WL4O32qFifxnMj0H]{Wyvern Poison}, and the duration is 10 minutes or until you hit and deal damage with your fangs three times, whichever comes first.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zW8adCNIRo46mfEH]{Effect: Viperous Elixir (Greater)}

Whirlwind Vial.name: 旋风小瓶 Whirlwind Vial
Whirlwind Vial.description:
启动 2 交互

打开这只小瓶会释放出一阵强劲的狂风，凝聚成一场可怕的巨型元素飓风。该元素吐出一道 @Template[cone|distance:30] 的气流。锥形范围内的每个生物都必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:28] 豁免中成功，否则会被从元素身边击退。若某个生物被击退撞到坚固的物体上，则会停止移动并受到 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]]。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被推开10尺。

失败 该生物被推开20尺。

大失败 该生物被推开20尺并被击倒 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

制作需求 提供来自被杀死的元素飓风的魔法残渣。

Activate 2 Interact

Opening this vial releases a mighty gust, forming into a fearsome Huge elemental hurricane. The elemental breathes a @Template[cone|distance:30] of air. Each creature in the cone must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or be knocked away from the elemental. A creature knocked into a solid object stops moving and takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]].

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pushed 10 feet.

Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Craft Requirements Supply magical residue from a slain elemental hurricane.

Absolute Solvent (Moderate).name: 绝对溶剂（中等） Absolute Solvent (Moderate)
Absolute Solvent (Moderate).description:
启动 1（操作）

这种强效溶剂最初被配制用于溶解 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.7IrQPyMm76nLVoXx]{恒久黏合剂}，几乎可以破除任何黏合剂的黏着。由于绝对溶剂对恒久黏合剂尤其有效，它会自动溶解恒久黏合剂。它会以6环尝试反制其他任何黏合剂，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.T6Appwwl6nUl56Xj]{胶水炸弹}，其反制调整值为 [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Originally formulated as a means of dissolving @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.7IrQPyMm76nLVoXx]{Everlasting Adhesive}, this powerful solvent can break almost any adhesive's grip. As absolute solvent is particularly effective against everlasting adhesive, it automatically dissolves everlasting adhesive. It attempts to counteract any other adhesives, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.T6Appwwl6nUl56Xj]{Glue Bombs}, at 6th-rank and has a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19}.

Aged Assassin Vine Wine.name: 陈年刺客藤葡萄酒 Aged Assassin Vine Wine
Aged Assassin Vine Wine.description:
启动 1 交互

用刺客藤浆果酿酒是个危险的过程，但最终得到的红宝石般深红饮品浓郁而醇烈。发酵过程中加入的炼金试剂会浓缩藤蔓与其环境的联系，并将其赋予饮用者。饮用一杯刺客藤酒后的1分钟内，你获得射程为30尺的震动感知。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.QCqYiSIR9DVPAHgR]{效果：刺客藤酒}

陈放数年之久的刺客藤酒——或用炼金术人为加速陈化的——会同时发展出更复杂的风味，以及更强的、与刺客藤自然羁绊的联系。你饮用该酒时，你周围 @Template[emanation|distance:20] 内的植被开始扭动，变为困难地形，直到你下个回合开始。

Activate 1 Interact

Crafting wine from assassin vine berries is a dangerous process, but the resulting ruby-red drink is rich and heady. Alchemical reagents added during fermentation concentrate the vine's connection to its environment and impart them onto the imbiber. For 1 minute after drinking a glass of assassin vine wine, you have tremorsense at a range of 30 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.QCqYiSIR9DVPAHgR]{Effect: Assassin Vine Wine}

Assassin vine wine that has been aged for several years—or artificially aged with alchemy—develops both a greater complexity of flavor and a stronger connection to an assassin vine's bond with nature. When you drink the wine, vegetation in a @Template[emanation|distance:20] around you begins to writhe, becoming difficult terrain until the start of your next turn.

Alchemical Chart (Moderate).name: 炼金表（中等） Alchemical Chart (Moderate)
Alchemical Chart (Moderate).description:
这张坚固、硬挺的炼金表格包含用于快速混合试剂以获得最大效果的速记参考。如果你在使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.yzNJgwzV9XqEhKc6]{快速炼金术} 时手持此图表，你制造的 12级或更低等级的物品将额外保持效力 1轮。

This sturdy, rigid alchemical chart contains shorthand references on quickly mixing reagents for maximum effect. If you hold this chart while using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.yzNJgwzV9XqEhKc6]{Quick Alchemy}, the items you create of 12th level or lower remain potent for 1 additional round.

Animal Nip (Major).name: 动物轻咬（强效） Animal Nip (Major)
Animal Nip (Major).description:
启动 1（操作）

动物薄荷混合了多种草本芳香植物，研磨成带有强烈气味的粗粉，能吸引范围广泛的动物。你通过将动物薄荷撒在地上或你选择的一个目标上来启动它。在接下来的1分钟内，30尺内所有具有动物（特征）的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:30] 意志豁免，否则会因动物薄荷的气味而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂} 1轮。大失败时，它们还会倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 并在地上打滚。如果该目标受到敌对行为影响，迷魂立刻结束。无论该生物的豁免结果如何，它随后都会对动物薄荷免疫1小时。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Animal nip contains a mix of herbaceous, fragrant plants, ground into a coarse powder with a strong scent that attracts a broad spectrum of animals. You activate animal nip by sprinkling it on the ground or a target of your choice. For the next minute, all creatures within 30 feet that have the animal trait must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the smell of the animal nip for 1 round. On a critical failure, they also fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and roll about on the ground. If the target is subject to a hostile act, the fascination ends immediately. Regardless of the result of the creature's save, it's then immune to animal nip for 1 hour.

Animal Repellent (Greater).name: 驱兽剂（高等） Animal Repellent (Greater)
Animal Repellent (Greater).description:
动物驱避剂是一种恶臭的炼金物质，会让你对某一种动物而言变得令人作呕。比如，你可以制造猿类驱避剂、熊类驱避剂或蛇类驱避剂，但不能制造影响所有动物的驱避剂。该驱避剂对与该类动物相似但实际上并非动物的生物无效——例如，熊类驱避剂对熊狼人无效。动物驱避剂对智力调整值为–3或更高的动物无效，例如觉醒动物。当你最初学会动物驱避剂的配方时，你会学会所有常见动物的配方。若某一类动物都不属于常见，例如海蛇，你必须分别学会该类的配方，且其稀有度与该类中稀有度最低的生物相同。

你通过将动物驱避剂洒在自己身上或一名触及范围内的生物身上，或将其涂抹在一个最大为10尺见方的区域表面上来启用它。该驱避剂持续24小时，或直到用1分钟的工作（由多个互动动作构成）将其刷洗干净为止。被指定的那类动物能在正常距离的三倍远处闻到驱避剂的气味。

被指定的那类生物通常会避开被涂覆的生物或区域，因为其气味恶臭且会令其感到不安。若处于战斗中或其他受惊状态，该生物只有在成功通过一次意志豁免（其DC由动物驱避剂的类型决定）时，才能接近到受影响的生物或区域20尺以内。一旦成功通过此豁免，该动物会获得1分钟的暂时免疫。若该动物以会使其品尝到或吞入驱避剂的方式进行攻击，则必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:29]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（若为大失败则为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。

Animal repellent is a noxious alchemical substance that makes you repulsive to a certain kind of animal. You can, for example, make ape repellent, bear repellent, or snake repellent, but not a repellent that affects all animals. The repellent doesn't work on creatures that are similar to the kind of animal, but not actually animals—for example, bear repellent wouldn't work on werebears. Animal repellent is ineffective against animals with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher, such as awakened animals. When you initially learn the formula for animal repellent, you learn the formulas for all common animals. If no animals of a kind are common, such as sea serpents, you must learn the formula for that kind separately, and it has the same rarity as the least-rare creature of that kind.

You Activate animal repellent by sprinkling it on yourself or a creature within reach, or by spreading it on a surface in an area up to 10 feet square. The repellent lasts for 24 hours or until scrubbed clean with 1 minute of work (consisting of multiple Interact actions). The designated kind of animal can smell the repellent from three times as far away as normal.

The designated kind of creature typically avoids the coated creature or area, which smells foul and feels unnerving to it. If in combat or otherwise distressed, the creature can approach within 20 feet of the affected creature or area only if it succeeds at a Will save with a DC determined by the type of animal repellent. Once it succeeds at this save, the animal is temporarily immune for 1 minute. If the animal attacks in a way that causes it to taste or ingest the repellent, it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Astringent Venom.name: 收敛毒液 Astringent Venom
Astringent Venom.description:
启动 3 交互

这种油腻的深紫色粉末散发出煮沸皮革的独特气味。投放后，毒素会迅速起效，紧缩受害者的血流，使其四肢末端供血受限，并将其肺部变成柔软的胶冻。涩味毒液的受害者可通过其双手呈现如同冻伤般的色泽辨认出来；随着四肢末端循环流失，他们更难握持物件。在每轮其回合开始时，受涩味毒液影响的生物必须在一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 中成功，否则会掉落其正持有的一件随机物品。

豁免掷骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

潜伏期 1 轮

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]]（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[8d6[poison]]（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[10d6[poison]] 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}（1 轮）

Activate 3 Interact

This oily, dark-purple powder gives off the distinct odor of boiled leather. When delivered, the poison acts quickly to constrict the victim's blood flow to their extremities and turn their lungs into a soft jelly. A victim of astringent venom is recognizable by the frostbite-like hue of their hands as they loose circulation to their extremities, making it difficult for them to hold things. Each round at the beginning of their turn, a creature affected by astringent venom must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] or drop one random item they're holding.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Onset 1 round

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[8d6[poison]] (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[10d6[poison]] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} (1 round)

Bottled Catharsis (Greater).name: 瓶装宣泄（高等） Bottled Catharsis (Greater)
Bottled Catharsis (Greater).description:
启用 1（操作）

这种饮品会释放出汹涌的情绪，帮助重置你的精神状态。当你饮用这份炼金灵药时，该灵药会以6环阶尝试反制你身上的每个具有情绪（特征）或正在对你施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）}状态 的效果，并使用所列出的反制环阶与调整值。该灵药拥有一个 [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} 的反制调整值。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This drink unlocks a flood of emotions that helps reset your mental state. When you drink this elixir, the elixir attempts to counteract at 6th-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} counteract modifier each effect on you that has the emotion trait or is inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition on you, using the listed counteract rank and modifier.

Bottled Sunlight (Greater).name: 瓶装阳光（高等） Bottled Sunlight (Greater)
Bottled Sunlight (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

这个镜面瓶子里装有溶解在两种互不相溶溶剂中的多种化学物质。摇晃瓶子会引发化学反应，使其发光。持续1小时，瓶子在20尺半径内散发明亮光照（并在其后40尺内提供昏暗光照）。

在这1小时内，它可以像炸弹一样被投掷。这需要以一次单动作启动并以打击进行，如同其他炸弹一般，并造成如下所述的伤害。若在首次启动后的1小时内未被投掷，它会无害地失效并被消耗。

这枚炸弹造成3d4活力伤害与3点活力飞溅伤害，并额外造成3d4火焰伤害。按常规，活力伤害仅伤害不死生物以及其他具有虚空治疗的生物。对阳光具有特定弱点的不死生物（如吸血鬼（特征）或缚灵）会承受最大值的活力伤害（@Damage[12[vitality]]而非3d4）。对于任何取决于瓶装阳光拥有的武器骰数量的能力，只计算活力伤害骰。

Activate 1 Interact

This mirrored bottle contains various chemicals dissolved in two immiscible solvents. Shaking the bottle induces chemical reactions that cause it to glow. For 1 hour, the bottle sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 40 feet).

During this hour, it can be thrown like a bomb. This requires a single action to Activate with a Strike, like other bombs, and deals the damage below. If it's not thrown within an hour of the first activation, it defuses harmlessly and is consumed.

The bomb deals 3d4 vitality damage and 3 vitality splash damage, as well as 3d4 additional fire damage. As normal, vitality damage harms only undead and other creatures with void healing. Undead with a particular vulnerability to sunlight (such as vampires or wraiths) take the maximum amount of vitality damage from bottled sunlight (@Damage[12[vitality]] instead of 3d4). For any ability that depends on the number of weapon dice bottled sunlight has, count only the vitality damage dice

Boulder Seed.name: 巨石种子 Boulder Seed
Boulder Seed.description:
启动 1 打击

这枚炸弹由挥发性流体制成，暴露在空气中会迅速膨胀并硬化。根据炸弹的类型，巨石种子给予攻击掷骰+2物品加值，并造成3d4钝击伤害以及3点钝击溅射伤害。启动时，炸弹会以硬化泡沫填满一个5尺立方体，制造出一块如同木头般坚硬的巨石（硬度5，HP 20），并推开中型或更小的目标。若为大成功或大失败命中，目标还会倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。溅射区域会充满碎石瓦砾，形成困难地形。炸弹制造出的“巨石”自动大失败所有豁免掷骰，并且每轮失去1点硬度；当巨石的硬度降至0时，它会分解成细粉。到那时，炸弹制造的困难地形也会消失。

Activate 1 Strike

This bomb is made of volatile fluids that rapidly expand and harden when exposed to air. A boulder seed grants a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and deals 3d4 bludgeoning damage and 3 bludgeoning splash damage, according to the bomb's type. When activated, the bomb fills a 5-foot cube with hardened foam, it creates a boulder as hard as wood (Hardness 5, HP 20) that pushes Medium or smaller targets. On a critical hit, the target also falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The splash zone fills with rubble, creating difficult terrain. The "boulder" the bomb creates fails all saving throws and loses 1 Hardness per round, disintegrating into fine powder when the boulder's Hardness is reduced to 0. At that time, the difficult terrain the bomb created also disappears.

Cave Worm Venom.name: 洞穴蠕虫毒液 Cave Worm Venom
Cave Worm Venom.description:
启动 2（操作）

巨大洞穴蠕虫的毒液会使受害者虚弱。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[5d6[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]]伤害且衰弱 2（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]]伤害且衰弱 2（1轮）

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Venom from enormous cave worms leaves a victim weakened.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Clubhead Poison.name: 杆头毒药 Clubhead Poison
Clubhead Poison.description:
启动 2 交互

这种毒药以其蒸馏来源的真菌菌株命名。镜花水月侵袭受害者的心智，使其看见虚构的敌人。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[3d8[poison]]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，且无法采取反应动作（）（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d8[poison]]，off-guard，无法采取反应动作（），@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[5d8[poison]]，off-guard，无法采取反应动作（），且 stunned 1（1 轮）

Activate 2 Interact

This poison is named for the strain of fungi from which it's distilled. Hallucinations assail the victim's mind, causing them to see imaginary foes.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d8[poison]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, and can't take reactions (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d8[poison]], off-guard, can't take reactions, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[5d8[poison]], off-guard, can't take reactions, and stunned 1 (1 round)

Cooling Elixir (Moderate).name: 冷却药剂（中等） Cooling Elixir (Moderate)
Cooling Elixir (Moderate).description:
激活 1（操作）

这种药剂由火蜥蜴的鳞片制成，用以抵御火焰。持续24小时，你会免受酷热的效果影响。你也会免受极端高温影响。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This elixir is made from salamander scales to withstand fire. For 24 hours, you are protected from the effects of severe heat. You're also protected from extreme heat.

Crystal Shards (Greater).name: 水晶碎片（高等） Crystal Shards (Greater)
Crystal Shards (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

这只烧瓶中装有加压的红褐色气体，其中点缀着些许升华结晶的碎屑。你获得+2物品加值于攻击掷骰。当炸弹爆炸时，它造成@Damage[3d4[piercing]]伤害以及@Damage[(5[splash])[piercing]]{5 piercing splash damage}，因为混合物突然变为以高速飞行的固体晶体。

命中时，目标因晶体嵌入其血肉而受到@Damage[1[persistent,bleed]]伤害。只要流血伤害持续，目标的速度还会受到–5英尺的减值。目标可以花费一个交互动作移除晶体，降低停止流血的DC。

Activate A Strike

This flask holds a pressurized red-brown gas flecked with bits of sublimated crystal. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls. When the bomb explodes, it deals @Damage[3d4[piercing]] damage and @Damage[(5[splash])[piercing]]{5 piercing splash damage} as the mixture suddenly turns into solid crystals flying at high speeds.

On a hit, the target takes @Damage[1[persistent,bleed]] damage from the crystals embedded in its flesh. As long as the bleed damage persists, the target also takes a –5-foot penalty to its speed. The target can spend an Interact action to remove the crystals, reducing the DC to stop the bleeding.

Exsanguinating Ammunition (Major).name: 放血弹药（强效） Exsanguinating Ammunition (Major)
Exsanguinating Ammunition (Major).description:
弹药 任意

启动 1 交互

该弹药包含一个小型储槽，内装一种黏稠的红色物质，当你启动它时会涂覆在弹药上。该物质会使生物更容易出血。在你用已启动的放血弹药对一个生物造成伤害后的1分钟内，该生物获得对持续性流血伤害的弱点5。此外，为结束持续性流血伤害所进行的任何纯骰检定的DC从15提高至17（在接受特别有效的协助时从10提高至12），持续时间内有效。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mrwg2XftLtSLj197]{效果: 放血弹药（强效）}

Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

This ammunition includes a small reservoir of a tacky red substance that coats the ammunition when you activate it. The substance makes a creature bleed more freely. For 1 minute after you deal damage to a creature with an activated exsanguinating ammunition that creature gains weakness 5 to persistent bleed damage. In addition, the DC of any flat checks to end persistent bleed damage increases from 15 to 17 (from 10 to 12 when receiving particularly effective assistance) for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mrwg2XftLtSLj197]{Effect: Exsanguinating Ammunition (Major)}

Fury Cocktail (Moderate).name: 狂怒鸡尾酒（中等） Fury Cocktail (Moderate)
Fury Cocktail (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

狂怒鸡尾酒是一种强身的姜味啤酒，加入朗姆酒和调和饮料。据传它起源于一家热门蜜酒馆举办的野蛮人主题节庆，该蜜酒馆以炼金饮料见长。

收益 你获得对近战攻击掷骰的+3物品加值，并根据在酿制时所选的添加物获得一个额外效果。这些效果持续1小时。

  • 兽性 在鸡尾酒中加入柠檬汁与研磨的爪或趾爪粉末。你获得一种徒手攻击（搏斗组），可在以下两者中择一：啃咬攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害；或爪击攻击，具有灵巧特征，造成1d4挥砍伤害。
  • 双倍 这款鸡尾酒更烈，加入更多姜与更多朗姆酒。你获得对物理伤害的抗力2。
  • 哀伤 少量花瓣为饮品增添强烈香气。你获得对虚空伤害的抗力5；若你具有虚空治疗，则改为获得对活力伤害的抗力5。
  • 怀疑 少许苦精让饮品风味更复杂。你获得对抗魔法的豁免的+2物品加值。
  • 泰坦 在鸡尾酒中加入柚子汁与研磨的巨人毛发粉末。若你为中型或更小，获得以下效果：你变为大型，获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}，并使你的触及增加5尺（若你起始为超小型，则增加10尺）。
  • 巨龙鳞肤 在鸡尾酒中加入石榴汁与元素试剂。你获得对酸、寒冷、电击、火焰与毒素伤害的抗力5。

缺点 你对AC承受–1减值，并对反射豁免承受–2减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.QaiSmpjSUhORG800]{效果：狂怒鸡尾酒（中等）}

Activate 1 Interact

A fury cocktail is a fortifying ginger beer spiked with rum and a mixer. It's rumored to have originated from a barbarian-themed festival in a popular mead hall specializing in alchemical beverages.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to melee attack rolls and an additional effect depending on the additive chosen when the brew is created. The effects last 1 hour.

  • Animalistic Lemon juice and powdered claws or talons are added to the cocktail. You gain an unarmed attack in the brawling group of your choice between a jaws attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage or a claw attack that has the agile trait and deals 1d4 slashing damage.
  • Double This cocktail is just stronger, with more ginger and more rum. You gain resistance 2 to physical damage.
  • Mournful A few flower petals add a powerful aroma to the drink. You gain resistance 5 to void damage, or resistance 5 to vitality damage if you have void healing.
  • Skeptical A splash of bitters gives the drink a more complex flavor. You gain a +2 item bonus to saves against magic.
  • Titanic Yuzu juice and powdered giant hair are added to this cocktail. If you're Medium or smaller, you gain the following effects: you become Large, are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and increase your reach by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you started out Tiny).
  • Wyrmhide Pomegranate juice and elemental reagents are added to the cocktail. You gain resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, and poison damage.

Drawback You take a –1 penalty to AC and a –2 penalty to Reflex saves.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.QaiSmpjSUhORG800]{Effect: Fury Cocktail (Moderate)}

Gearbinder Oil (Moderate).name: 齿轮束缚油（中等） Gearbinder Oil (Moderate)
Gearbinder Oil (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

齿轮粘结油装在一个密封泵中，可以将油喷射到短距离处。这种油被设计为能流过复杂的机械结构，并在机械动作的搅动下起泡并形成一种将机构黏结起来的膏状物。该油对具有关节的构装体与机械装置有效，包括许多构装体、发条装置与机械陷阱。你将油涂抹在你想要黏结的目标上，该目标必须在你10英尺内。油被涂抹后，在任意一轮结束时，只要该轮中目标进行了带有攻击、操作或移动（特征）的动作，它就必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:29] 豁免。被齿轮粘结油施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 2} 或更高的机构也无法使用反应动作（）。齿轮粘结油最多持续6轮，之后会变为惰性的油性残留物。

大成功 油变为惰性，效果结束。

成功 目标的缓慢（状态）降低1。若缓慢（状态）的数值为0，则效果结束。

失败 目标的缓慢（状态）增加1，至多为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 3}。

大失败 目标的缓慢（状态）增加2，至多为缓慢 3。

Activate 1 Interact

Gearbinder oil comes in a sealed pump that can squirt the oil a short distance. The oil is designed to flow through complex mechanisms and, agitated through mechanical action, foam up and form a paste that binds the works. The oil is effective against articulated constructs and machinery, including many constructs, clockworks, and mechanical hazards. You apply the oil to the target you want to bind, which must be within 10 feet of you. After the oil is applied, at the end of any round during which the target took an action with the attack, manipulate, or move trait, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save. A mechanism that's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} or more by gearbinder oil also can't use reactions. Gearbinder oil functions for up to 6 rounds before becoming an inert, oily residue.

Critical Success The oil becomes inert, and the effect ends.

Success The target reduces its slowed condition by 1. If the slowed condition's value is 0, the effect ends.

Failure The target increases its slowed condition by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 3}.

Critical Failure The target increases its slowed condition by 2, to a maximum of slowed 3.

Healing Vapor (Greater).name: 治疗蒸汽（高等） Healing Vapor (Greater)
Healing Vapor (Greater).description:
启动 3 交互

治疗蒸汽是一种通过散布注入多种通常用于治疗与恢复的试剂的雾气，从而加速自然恢复过程的物质。从密封容器中释放时，蒸汽充满一个@Template[burst|distance:5]，持续时间为10分钟，并且同一时间最多能影响四个活着的生物。超过最初四个的任何生物都不会获得益处；不过，如果某个生物在持续时间结束前离开，那么新进入的一个生物可以从雾气中获益。受蒸汽益处的生物每分钟恢复2点生命值。受影响期间，该生物还会在对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定上获得+2物品加值。若多个治疗蒸汽的区域重叠，则重叠区域内的生物只适用其中最强的效果。强风会驱散雾气，使其在风持续吹拂期间失效。

Activate 3 Interact

Healing vapor is a substance that accelerates natural recovery processes by dispersing a mist infused with a variety of reagents typically used for healing and recovery. When deployed from a sealed container, the vapors fill a @Template[burst|distance:5], last for 10 minutes, and can affect up to four living creatures at one time. Any creatures beyond the first four gain no benefit, though if a creature leaves before the duration is over, a new creature that enters can benefit from the mist. A creature benefiting from the vapors regains 2 Hit Points every minute. While affected, a creature also gains a +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons. If the areas of more than one healing vapor overlap, only the strongest applies to creatures inside overlapping areas. Strong wind disperses the mist, rendering it ineffective while the wind blows.

Implosion Dust (Moderate).name: 内爆尘（中等） Implosion Dust (Moderate)
Implosion Dust (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

被密封在一个小包中，以便在加压喷散时释放，内爆粉尘会通过使其物理形态中的液体成分硬化，甚至蒸发，使无定形的生物被压缩并缩小。它能有效削弱水元素、风元素、泥怪，以及GM判定同样无定形的其他生物，其中甚至可能包括特别胶质的异怪。你将粉尘朝向你5尺内的一个生物释放，该生物必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:29]豁免检定。该目标必须在其每个回合结束时重复进行该豁免检定。内爆粉尘最多持续6轮。随后它会变为惰性，且该生物恢复其正常体型。

大成功 粉尘变为惰性，且该生物恢复其正常体型。

成功 目标的体型增大一个级阶，最多增至其正常体型。若其在增大后已为正常体型，则效果结束。

失败 目标的体型减小一个级阶，最小至微型。其每个打击的触及减少5尺；若该生物为小型或更大，则最小为5尺；若该生物为微型，则最小为0尺。缩小还会对该生物的物理近战伤害施加状态减值。该减值为其体型每比正常体型低一个级阶即–2。

大失败 同失败，但目标的体型减小两个级阶。

Activate 1 Interact

Sealed in a packet so it can be released in a pressurized puff, implosion dust causes amorphous creatures to compress and shrink by hardening and even evaporating the liquid components of their physical forms. It's effective at weakening water elementals, air elementals, oozes, and other creatures the GM determines are similarly amorphous, which can even include particularly gelatinous aberrations. You release the dust toward one creature within 5 feet of you, which must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] saving throw. The target must repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. Implosion dust functions for up to 6 rounds. It then becomes inert, and the creature returns to its normal size.

Critical Success The dust becomes inert, and the creature returns to its normal size.

Success The target increases in size one step, up to its normal size. If it's at its normal size after the increase, the effect ends.

Failure The target decreases in size one step, to a minimum of Tiny. The reach of each of its Strikes decreases by 5 feet, to a minimum of 5 feet if the creature is Small or larger, or a minimum of 0 feet if the creature is Tiny. Shrinking also imposes a status penalty to the creature's physical melee damage. This penalty is –2 for every step lower than its normal size the creature is.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target decreases in size by two steps.

Insight Coffee (Moderate).name: 洞见咖啡（中等） Insight Coffee (Moderate)
Insight Coffee (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

洞见咖啡是研究炼金术的调查员常选的饮品，在萃取过程中会注入炼金调味。你饮用洞见咖啡后的1小时内，若你拥有战略打击职业特性，你的战略打击职业特性所提供的额外伤害将改用d8而非d6。你还会获得+3物品加值，用于以该物品制作时所选混合口味决定的技能来进行回忆知识的检定。

  • 双倍咖啡 宗教
  • 榛果 自然
  • 摩卡 奥秘
  • 香草 社会
  • 南瓜香料 秘法
  • 太妃糖 医学

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kkXy5JWC7OTBqTKg]{效果: 洞见咖啡（中等）}

Activate 1 Interact

A popular choice for investigators studying alchemy, insight coffee is infused with alchemical flavoring during percolation. For 1 hour after you drink an insight coffee, you use d8s instead of d6s for your extra damage from the strategic strike class feature, if you have it. You also gain a +3 item bonus to checks to Recall Knowledge with a skill determined by the blend chosen when the item is crafted.

  • Double Coffee Religion
  • Hazelnut Nature
  • Mocha Arcana
  • Vanilla Society
  • Pumpkin Spice Occultism
  • Toffee Medicine

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kkXy5JWC7OTBqTKg]{Effect: Insight Coffee (Moderate)}

Lodestone Bomb.name: 磁石炸弹 Lodestone Bomb
Lodestone Bomb.description:
启动 1 打击

磁石炸弹装有反应性的电离矿物，在被打破前会以休眠状态保存。该炸弹为攻击掷骰提供+2物品加值，并造成3d4力场伤害以及2点力场溅射伤害。此外，由金属制成、穿着金属护甲或使用金属武器的目标会受到@Damage[2d4[persistent,force]]，并且在承受该持续伤害期间处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}状态。该持续伤害最多可持续1分钟。

Activate 1 Strike

Lodestone bombs hold reactive ionized minerals preserved in a dormant state until broken. The bomb grants a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and deals 3d4 force damage and 2 force splash damage. In addition, a target made of metal, wearing metal armor, or using metal weapons takes @Damage[2d4[persistent,force]] and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} while taking the persistent damage. The persistent damage can last up to 1 minute.

Ooze Ammunition (Greater).name: 软泥弹药（高等） Ooze Ammunition (Greater)
Ooze Ammunition (Greater).description:
弹药 任意

启动 1 交互

软泥弹药是一个装有黏性物质的胶囊。若你用已启动的软泥弹药命中一个生物，它造成酸蚀伤害而非其正常伤害类型，且该生物随后直到其结束这些效果前，速度受到-10尺减值，并承受 @Damage[3d4[persistent,acid]] 伤害。若为重击，除其他效果外，该生物还会在1轮内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}。目标可以通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}（DC 29）这团黏性泡沫来结束这些效果。其他生物也可以提供这些动作，但这样做会使协助的生物承受该弹药持续酸蚀伤害的一半。结束该效果的生物仍会在该回合承受持续伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.6Pwdim01PH447CeS]{效果：软泥弹药（高等）}

Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

Ooze ammunition is a capsule containing a sticky substance. If you hit a creature with activated ooze ammunition, it deals acid damage instead of its normal damage type, and the creature then takes a -10-foot penalty to Speed and @Damage[3d4[persistent,acid]] damage until it ends the effects. On a critical hit, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round in addition to the other effects. The target can end the effects by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaping} (DC 29) the sticky foam. Other creatures can provide the actions, although doing so deals half the ammunition's persistent acid damage to the assisting creature. A creature that ends the effect still takes the persistent damage that turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.6Pwdim01PH447CeS]{Effect: Ooze Ammunition (Greater)}

Poison Fizz (Moderate).name: 毒液气泡（中等） Poison Fizz (Moderate)
Poison Fizz (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

由蜂蜜与炼金试剂的特殊混合物制成，毒泡泡糖是一种酸甜有劲的硬糖，在你口中噼啪作响。持续1小时，你对抗毒素与石化的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

次要效果 2（毒素）

效果 你咬碎毒泡泡糖，释放其有毒的液态内芯，并喷出一团绿色雾气，形成一个@Template[cone|distance:15]。这造成@Damage[4d6[poison]]，并带有@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|traits:poison]。重度失败的生物还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}直到你下个回合结束，随后其在1小时内暂时免疫由毒泡泡糖造成的目盲。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.AJNUrLJgTC0AdBhS]{效果：毒泡泡糖}

Activate 1 Interact

Made from a special mixture of honey and alchemical reagents, poison fizz is a zesty, sweet rock candy that pops and crackles in your mouth. For 1 hour, you have a +2 item bonus to saving throws against poison and being petrified.

Secondary Effect 2 (poison)

Effect You bite the poison fizz to release its poisonous liquid center and spray green mist in a @Template[cone|distance:15]. This deals @Damage[4d6[poison]] with a @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|traits:poison]. A creature that critically fails is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of your next turn and is then temporarily immune to being blinded by poison fizz for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.AJNUrLJgTC0AdBhS]{Effect: Poison Fizz}

Sea Touch Elixir (Moderate).name: 海之接触灵药（中等） Sea Touch Elixir (Moderate)
Sea Touch Elixir (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

这种咸涩的混合液改变你手脚上的皮肤。你手指与脚趾间的空间长出蹼，使你获得20尺的游泳速度，持续1小时，并且你可以在水下呼吸。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.9keegq0GdS1eSrNr]{效果：海之接触灵药（中等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

This briny concoction alters the skin on your hands and feet. The spaces between your fingers and toes become webbed, granting you a swim Speed of 20 feet for 1 hour, and you can breathe underwater.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.9keegq0GdS1eSrNr]{Effect: Sea Touch Elixir (Moderate)}

Sense-Dulling Hood (Greater).name: 迟钝感官兜帽（强效） Sense-Dulling Hood (Greater)
Sense-Dulling Hood (Greater).description:
启动 1 交互

有时，敌人危险的特殊能力会让相对标准的感官能力变成负担。从食腐怪的恶臭到鹰身女妖的歌声，许多生物会利用其猎物的感官来对付他们。钝感兜帽是一种宽大的单次使用面罩，设计为从密封包装中拉出并套到头上。该面罩使你在对抗听觉、嗅觉与视觉效果的豁免检定上获得+4 物品加值，持续1小时。由于它会钝化你的感官而非剥夺它们，该面罩还会使你在使用察觉进行的掷骰与检定上承受–1 减值，持续时间相同。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VDSJn9vhVRh5V4Kq]{效果: 钝感兜帽（高等）}

Activate 1 Interact

Sometimes, an enemy's dangerous special ability makes relatively standard sensory capabilities a liability. From otyugh stench to a harpy's song, plenty of creatures use their prey's senses against them. A sense-dulling hood is a wide, single-use mask designed to be pulled from an airtight package and slipped over the head. The mask grants you a +4 item bonus to saving throws against auditory, olfactory, and visual effects for 1 hour. Since it dulls your senses without depriving you of them, the mask also imposes a –1 penalty to rolls and checks using Perception for the same duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VDSJn9vhVRh5V4Kq]{Effect: Sense-Dulling Hood (Greater)}

Shatterstone.name: 碎石石 Shatterstone
Shatterstone.description:
启动 1 打击

碎裂石是一种小型陶瓷球体，很像雷鸣石。其内部装有反应性药剂，当石头破裂时会产生强烈的音波振动场。该炸弹使攻击掷骰获得+2物品加值，并造成3d6音波伤害以及3点音波溅射伤害。其大部分声音为超声波；具有音波弱点且因该炸弹受到伤害的生物必须在@Check[fortitude|dc:30] 豁免中成功，否则将获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}状态，直到其下个回合结束。

Activate 1 Strike

A shatterstone is a small ceramic orb, much like a thunderstone. Inside are reactive agents that set up an intense field of sonic vibration when the stone breaks. The bomb grants a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and deals 3d6 sonic damage and 3 sonic splash damage. Much of the sound is ultrasonic, and creatures with sonic weakness that take damage from the bomb must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of their next turn.

Slumber Wine.name: 沉眠酒 Slumber Wine
Slumber Wine.description:
沉眠酒在阴谋诡计的游戏中用途最大，因为缺席可能比受伤更具毁灭性。因沉眠酒而陷入昏迷的角色在毒素持续期间无法以任何方式醒来，以这种方式昏迷时不需要进食或饮水，并且除非检查者在一次 @Check[medicine|dc:40|name:Identify Slumber Wine] 检定中成功，否则看起来像是刚刚死亡。

启动 A（操作）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

潜伏期 1小时

最大持续时间 7天

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（1天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（2天）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（3天）

Slumber wine sees its greatest use in games of intrigue, where an absence can be more devastating than injury. Characters unconscious from slumber wine can't wake up by any means while the poison lasts, don't need to eat or drink while unconscious in this way, and appear to be recently dead unless an examiner succeeds at a @Check[medicine|dc:40|name:Identify Slumber Wine] check.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Onset 1 hour

Maximum Duration 7 days

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (2 days)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (3 days)

Stone Body Mutagen (Moderate).name: 石化身躯变异剂（中等） Stone Body Mutagen (Moderate)
Stone Body Mutagen (Moderate).description:
启动 A 交互

这种诱变剂使你的身体钙化，变得如石头般坚硬。

增益 你获得对物理伤害的抗力5（钝击除外）。

缺陷 你的速度降低10尺（最低5尺），且你的反射豁免承受-2减值。

持续时间 1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1xHHvQlW4pRR89qj]{效果：石化之躯诱变剂（中等）}

Activate A Interact

This mutagen calcifies your body making it as hard as stone.

Benefit You gain resistance 5 to physical damage (except bludgeoning).

Drawback Your speeds are reduced by 10 feet (minimum 5 feet) and you take a -2 penalty to Reflex saves.

Duration 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1xHHvQlW4pRR89qj]{Effect: Stone Body Mutagen (Moderate)}

Surging Serum (Greater).name: 涌动血清（强效） Surging Serum (Greater)
Surging Serum (Greater).description:
启动 1（操作）

当它恢复正常的肌肉控制时，非自愿的抽动与能量脉冲穿过饮用者的身体。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，它以6环进行反制，并具有[[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19 反制调整值}来移除来自单一来源的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态）}状态，并使用该状态的来源来决定反制环阶与DC。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control. When you drink this elixir, it counteracts at 6th-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19 Counteract Modifier} to remove the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled} condition from a single source, using the source of that condition to determine the counteract rank and DC.

Trueshape Bomb.name: 真形炸弹 Trueshape Bomb
Trueshape Bomb.description:
启动 1 打击

真实形态炸弹中装满了浓缩的狼毒草和其他反变形者试剂。这些炸弹为攻击掷骰提供+2物品加值，并造成3d6毒素伤害、3d4持续性毒素伤害，以及3点毒素溅射伤害。如果主要目标正处于变形或变体效果的效果之下，它必须在一次@Check[fortitude|dc:30]豁免中成功，否则这些效果结束，且该生物回归其正常形态。因该炸弹而承受持续性毒素伤害的目标，必须在相同DC下再进行一次豁免检定，才能使用变形或变体效果来变形。持续性伤害最多可持续1分钟。

Activate 1 Strike

Concentrated wolfsbane and other anti-shapechanger reagents fill trueshape bombs. These bombs grant a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and deal 3d6 poison damage, 3d4 persistent poison damage, and 3 poison splash damage. If the primary target is under the effects of a morph or polymorph effect, it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] saving throw, or else the effects end and the creature returns to its normal form. Targets taking persistent poison damage from this bomb must succeed at another Fortitude saving throw at the same DC to change shape using a morph or polymorph effect. The persistent damage can last up to 1 minute.

Witchwarg Elixir (Moderate).name: 巫战灵药（中等） Witchwarg Elixir (Moderate)
Witchwarg Elixir (Moderate).description:
启动 1（操作）

这剂炼金灵药温暖你的核心并改善你的血液循环。持续24小时，你会受到保护，免受严重寒冷的效果影响。你也会受到保护，免受极度寒冷影响。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This elixir warms your core and improves your circulation. For 24 hours, you are protected from the effects of severe cold. You're also protected from extreme cold.

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III.prototypeToken: 扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士 Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Seventh Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire.name: 扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第七封信 Seventh Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Seventh Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特和西奥多拉：

恐怕我在这里可能遇到了一点麻烦。我正匆忙写下这封信，但我的追兵或许正随着我写信而步步逼近。我不愿承认，但在没有等你们就下到这么深的地方，或许确实有些鲁莽。

不过别怕！我确信自己曾从比这更糟的困境中脱身。你们看，下面有一间老旧的狩猎小屋，而我似乎无意间惊扰了一群卡利尼武者。

看来我们已抵达幽暗地域的上层区域。附近所有建筑似乎都是刻意围绕中央立柱而建。我有理由相信它确实有一处基座，而这基座就在不远的下方。人们只能猜想它可能藏有何等秘密、何等谜团！

如果你们下到更低的等级，给你们一点建议：卓尔可以讲道理；透肌魔人不行。和往常一样，当心怪物，但下面的怪物尤其凶猛。另外，一个力量非凡的幽灵在这些洞窟里徘徊。你们或许已经注意到了。她似乎因某事而相当愤怒。
啊，看来我的时代所剩无几了。夏洛特和西奥多拉，我深深爱着你们二人。


永远向前！

你们越来越谨慎的叔叔，

扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

I am afraid I may be in a spot of bother, here. I am hastily writing this letter, but my pursuers may be closing in even as I do so. I hate to admit it, but it may have been a bit reckless of me to come down this far without waiting for you.

Never fear, however! I have come out of worse scrapes than this, I am sure. There is an old hunting lodge down below, you see, and I seem to have inadvertently disturbed a group of caligni warriors.

It seems we have reached an upper region of the Darklands. All structures nearby seem built intentionally around the central column. I have reason to believe that it does indeed have a base, and that this base is not far below. One can only speculate what secrets, what mysteries it may contain!

A bit of advice if you descend to the lower level: the drow can be reasoned with; the urdefhan can not. As usual, beware of monsters, but they are particularly fierce below. As well, a ghostly spirit of extraordinary power prowls these caverns. You may have noticed. She is rather angry about something.
Ah, it seems that my time is running out. Charlotte and Theodora, I love you both dearly.


Ever onward!

Your Increasingly Cautious Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire

Potion of Shared Life.name: 共命药水 Potion of Shared Life
Potion of Shared Life.description:
启动 1 交互

两种旋涡状的液体充满这只瓶子，每一种在颜色与亮度上都与另一种略有差异。当你饮用这瓶药水时，你只会喝下其中一半的内容物。若另一名自愿的生物在 1 分钟内饮用剩余的内容物，从你们之中第二个饮用者饮用的那一刻起，你们的生命力将连接 1 分钟。你们两者共享呼吸，因此只要彼此距离不超过 60 英尺，除非你们两者都处于窒息状态，否则你们任意一方都无法开始窒息。你们两者都获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MY6z2b4GPhAD2Eoa]{Share Life} 反应动作（）。

Activate 1 Interact

Two swirling liquids fill this flask, each slightly distinct in color and brightness from the other. When you drink this potion, you consume only half of the contents. If another willing creature consumes the remainder of the contents within 1 minute, your vitalities become linked for 1 minute from the moment the second one of you drinks. The two of you share breath, so as long as you're within 60 feet of one another, neither of you can begin suffocating unless you're both suffocating. You both gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MY6z2b4GPhAD2Eoa]{Share Life} reaction.

Potion of Quickness.name: 加速药水 Potion of Quickness
Potion of Quickness.description:
启动 A（操作）

饮用这瓶银色药水会使你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{加速术} 的效果，持续 1 分钟。

Activate A (manipulate)

Drinking this silver potion grants you the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} for 1 minute.

5 - Under Loose Floor Tile.name: 5 - 在松动的地砖下 5 - Under Loose Floor Tile
5 - Under Loose Floor Tile.tokenName: 5 - 在松动的地砖下 5 - Under Loose Floor Tile

Fifth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第五封信 Fifth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Fifth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：


多么离奇的发展！你们知道我一般是多么受不了邪魔——还记得老鸬鹚上校那次事件吗？但魔鬼倒也没那么糟，至少就其本性而言。只要他们觉得能从你身上得到些什么，就不会立刻跳到杀了你这一步——而这，我亲爱的孩子们，就是基础经济学。说真的，他们几乎算是文明的。


不过，他们很可能终究会在某个时候杀了你，所以要为此做好准备。至少下面又暖和又舒服！我敢肯定你们俩在竞技场等级的桑拿房里玩得很开心，尽管同伴有些可疑。好吧，我把下一封信留在这下面最温暖的房间里，就在那道圆环的正下方。你瞧，我还和那里的魔鬼就异界传送门背后的理论进行了一场精彩的讨论。当然，那是在他们开始试图杀我之前——正如我在上面提到的那样。


我相信你们会喜欢见到那位魔鬼头目。人们总爱谈论什么天界圣咏、天使合唱之类的东西，却从不谈更地狱的歌者。无需恐惧术，你们在这里会听个够！这地方结果竟如此富有音乐性。正如我一直所说：千万别只凭其最上层的肮脏废墟，就去评判一个阴森、层层向下延伸的地下超级建筑群。


永远前行！


你们善于闪躲的叔叔，

扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora, 


What a curious development! You know how I just can’t stand fiends, generally – remember the incident with old Colonel Cormorant? But devils aren’t so bad, as far as they go. They won’t jump straight to killing you if they think they can get something from you – and that, my dears, is basic economics. Why, they’re nearly civilized.


They will, however, most likely get around to killing you at some point, so be ready for that. At least it’s nice and warm down here! I’m sure you two enjoyed the sauna on the arena level, despite the questionable company. Well, I left my next letter in the warmest room down here, right under the circle. Why, I had a fine discussion with the devils in there about the theory behind extraplanar portals. That was before they got around to trying to kill me, of course, as I mentioned above.


I’m sure you’ll enjoy meeting the boss devil. You always hear talk about heavenly choirs and angelic choruses and whatnot, but you never hear about the more infernal vocalists. Never fear, you’ll get an earful down here! What a musical place this is turning out to be. It is just as I have always said: never judge a sinister multi-level subterranean supercomplex by the squalid ruination of its uppermost level.


Ever onward!


Your Evasive Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Ghostly Portal Paint.name: 幽灵传送门涂料 Ghostly Portal Paint
Ghostly Portal Paint.description:
启动 3 交互

这涂料半透明且几乎没有重量，这种乳白色涂料若凝视过久，似乎会逐渐显现为神秘学符号。将其用于覆盖一段宽5尺、高10尺的墙面时，涂料会使该段墙面在深达10尺的范围内变得幽灵般且无实体，从而允许有实体的生物与物体穿过。该传送门持续10分钟。当此效果结束时，任何仍留在传送门内的东西都会被挤出到最近的出口。

力场效果、其他无实体的物体与生物，以及幽冥武器都无法穿过这面墙，这与无实体的常规规则一致。若在使用涂料时有无实体生物位于墙内，则它会被挤出到最近的出口。

Activate 3 Interact

Translucent and nearly weightless, this opalescent paint seems to resolve into occult symbols if stared at too long. When used to cover a 5-foot-wide, 10-foot-tall section of a wall, the paint turns that section of wall ghostly and incorporeal to a depth of 10 feet, allowing corporeal creatures and objects to pass through it. The portal persists for 10 minutes. When this effect wears off, anything remaining within the portal is shunted to the nearest exit.

Force effects, other incorporeal objects and creatures, and ghost touch weapons can't cross through the wall, as is normal for incorporeality. An incorporeal creature that's inside the wall when the paint is used is shunted to the nearest exit.

Skeptic's Elixir (Moderate).name: 怀疑者灵药（中等） Skeptic's Elixir (Moderate)
Skeptic's Elixir (Moderate).description:
持续时间 10分钟

启用 1 交互

这瓶灵药能磨砺你的心智，使你能够看穿说谎、虚假陈述与魔法诡计。你在用于察觉虚假之处的察觉检定与察觉DC上获得+2物品加值，无论是口头说谎还是书面欺诈。你在意志豁免上也获得同样的物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mG6S6zm6hxaF7Tla]{效果：怀疑者灵药（中等）}

Duration 10 minute

Activate 1 Interact

This elixir sharpens your mind and allows you to see through lies, falsehoods, and magical trickery. You gain a +2 item bonus to Perception checks and Perception DCs to notice falsehoods, whether they're spoken lies or written deceit. You gain this same item bonus to Will saves.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mG6S6zm6hxaF7Tla]{Effect: Skeptic's Elixir (Moderate)}

5 - Under Loose Floor Tile.prototypeToken: 5 - 在松动的地砖下 5 - Under Loose Floor Tile

Third Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎丘斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第三封信 Third Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Third Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特和西奥多拉，


你们有没有注意到那根巨大的中央立柱有什么古怪？它几乎坚不可摧。多么有趣！这里有深邃的魔法在起作用。我希望东边那个狼男没有给你们添麻烦。也就是说，我希望你们没有给他添麻烦。他看起来相当忧伤。我说，他需要的是呼吸一些新鲜空气。这里下面相当霉闷。


说到“必须”，你们可一定要去看看下面的竞技场！它就在大楼梯间正南方。夏洛特，我敢肯定你会玩得很开心。也许你已经解决了这里西北方那间秘密密室里的那些野兽。尽管放心，下面有数量众多的怪物，其中包括许多经历过骇人实验的不幸者。


这里曾经风光更盛。下方一层的中部附近聚集着一些废弃的起居区。其中有一间并没有你所希望的那么废弃！它让我想起了老奶奶菲莉丝的厨艺。我在从那一间起逆时针数第三间卧室里给你们留了点东西。


永远前行！


你们好奇的叔叔，扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,


Have you noticed anything odd about that great central column? It is quite indestructible. How interesting! There is deep magic at work here. I hope that wolf man over to the east didn’t give you any trouble. That is, I hope you didn’t give him any trouble. He seems rather sad. I say, what he needs is some fresh air. It is rather musty down here.


And speaking of must, you simply must have a look at the arena below! It is straight south from the large stairwell. Charlotte, I am sure you will have a wonderful time. Perhaps you have already taken care of those beasts in the secret chamber northwest of here. Rest assured, there are numerous monsters below, including many unfortunates who have undergone abhorrent experimentation.


This place has seen better days. A number of abandoned living quarters are clustered together near the middle of the level below. One of them is not quite as abandoned as you might hope! It reminds me of old granny Phyllis’s cooking. I left something for you in the third bedroom counter-clockwise from that one.


Ever onward!


Your Inquisitive Uncle, Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Bottled Sunlight (Moderate).name: 瓶装阳光（中等） Bottled Sunlight (Moderate)
Bottled Sunlight (Moderate).description:
启动 1 互动

这个带镜面的瓶子内含多种溶解在两种互不相溶溶剂中的化学物质。摇晃瓶子会引发化学反应，使其发光。持续1小时，瓶子在20尺半径内散发明亮光照（并在接下来的40尺内提供昏暗光照）。

在这1小时内，它可以像炸弹一样投掷。这需要以带有打击的方式启动，并花费一个单动作，和其他炸弹一样，并造成下述伤害。若在首次启动后的1小时内未被投掷，它会无害地失效并被消耗。

该炸弹造成2d4活力伤害与2点活力溅射伤害，并额外造成2d4点火焰伤害。与常规相同，活力伤害只会伤害不死生物以及其他拥有虚空治疗的生物。对阳光具有特定弱点的不死生物（例如具有吸血鬼（特征）或缚灵（特征）的）会受到最大值的活力伤害（@Damage[8[vitality]] 而非2d4）。对于任何依赖瓶装阳光所具有的武器骰数量的能力，仅计算活力伤害骰。

Activate 1 Interact

This mirrored bottle contains various chemicals dissolved in two immiscible solvents. Shaking the bottle induces chemical reactions that cause it to glow. For 1 hour, the bottle sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 40 feet).

During this hour, it can be thrown like a bomb. This requires a single action to Activate with a Strike, like other bombs, and deals the damage below. If it's not thrown within an hour of the first activation, it defuses harmlessly and is consumed.

The bomb deals 2d4 vitality damage and 2 vitality splash damage, as well as 2d4 additional fire damage. As normal, vitality damage harms only undead and other creatures with void healing. Undead with a particular vulnerability to sunlight (such as vampires or wraiths) take the maximum amount of vitality damage from bottled sunlight (@Damage[8[vitality]] instead of 2d4). For any ability that depends on the number of weapon dice bottled sunlight has, count only the vitality damage dice.

Stone Body Mutagen (Lesser).name: 石身变异剂（次级） Stone Body Mutagen (Lesser)
Stone Body Mutagen (Lesser).description:
启动 A 交互

这种突变药剂使你的身体钙化，变得如石头般坚硬。

增益 你获得对物理伤害（钝击除外）的抗力 5。

缺陷 你的速度降低 10 尺（最低 5 尺），并且你的反射豁免承受 -2 减值。

持续时间 10 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.PEPOd38VfVzQMKG5]{效果：石化身躯突变药剂（次等）}

Activate A Interact

This mutagen calcifies your body making it as hard as stone.

Benefit You gain resistance 5 to physical damage (except bludgeoning).

Drawback Your speeds are reduced by 10 feet (minimum 5 feet) and you take a -2 penalty to Reflex saves.

Duration 10 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.PEPOd38VfVzQMKG5]{Effect: Stone Body Mutagen (Lesser)}

Sixth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第六封信 Sixth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Sixth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：

亲爱的孩子们，当我们带着这些发现回去汇报时，历史学会一定会羡慕不已！我等不及想看看卡莱尔教授那张浮肿的脸会是什么表情了。那根坚不可摧的中央柱——它究竟向下延伸到多深？直到土的中心吗？其中死灵能量显著增加，毫无疑问令人担忧。

希望你们已经准备好迎接一次景色的变化，不过我不会破坏惊喜。我只会说，我的下一封信将藏在一株非常巨大的担子菌标本之中。它会在梯子附近（你们一看到就会知道那就是梯子），并且很可能是唯一一株被标上我们这善良而光荣的学会徽记的此类标本。

下方危机四伏，险象环生。我建议你们特别留意 A.O.U.S.——我相信你们还记得课上学过的——其意为“非同寻常体型的两栖动物”。务必提防水。务必提防头顶的幽影。事实上，要提防一切。

永远前行！

你们越来越谨慎的叔叔，

扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

My dears, we shall be the envy of the Historical Society when we report back with these findings! I can’t wait to see the look on Professor Carlisle’s bloated face. That indestructible central column – just how far down does it go? To the center of the earth? The noticeable increase in necromantic energy within it is cause for concern, without doubt.

I hope you are prepared for a change in scenery, but I won’t spoil the surprise. I will only say that my next letter will be concealed within a very large specimen of basidiomycota. It will be near the ladder (you’ll know the ladder when you see it), and very likely the only such specimen to be marked with the symbol of our good and honorable society.

Many and diverse are the dangers below. I suggest you keep particular watch for A.O.U.S., which, as I’m sure you remember from your lessons, means Amphibians Of Unusual Size. Be wary of the water. Be wary of the shadows overhead. Be wary, in fact, of everything.

Ever onward!

Your Increasingly Cautious Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire

Stormfeather.name: 风暴羽毛 Stormfeather
Stormfeather.description:
用法 附着于护甲

启动 1 交互

需求 你在杂技中为专家。

即使在附着时，这根电蓝色羽毛也会在空气中轻轻摇曳，仿佛总是伴随着微风。启动时，该护符对你施放飞行，不过持续时间为1分钟。你可以解消此次启动。若你这么做，你会受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH]{轻柔着陆} 的影响。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate 1 Interact

Requirements You're an expert in Acrobatics.

Even while affixed, this electric blue feather sways lightly in the air, as if always accompanied by a breeze. When activated, the talisman casts fly on you, though the duration is 1 minute. You can Dismiss this activation. If you do, you're affected by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH]{Gentle Landing}.

Potion of Swimming.name: 游泳药水 Potion of Swimming
Potion of Swimming.description:
启动 A（操作）

这种药水尝起来像盐水，砂砾会沉淀在容器底部。你饮用后，你获得等同于你陆地速度的游泳速度，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.W3xQBLj5hLOtb6Tj]{效果：游泳药水}

Activate A (manipulate)

This potion tastes like salt water, and sandy grit settles to the bottom of its container. When you drink it, you gain a swim Speed equal to your land Speed for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.W3xQBLj5hLOtb6Tj]{Effect: Potion of Swimming}

Second Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.name: 扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第二封信 Second Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Second Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：

恭喜你们解决了那些讨人厌的食尸鬼。你们见到那个友善的家伙了吗？这间房里的幽灵（特征）有点神经兮兮的——这么说吧——但只要你们假装坐下做点工作，她就会放你们一马。嗯，我就在这里待了一两天，不过确实总是有发生骚动的可能。就在这儿北边的那座神殿确实不同凡响，不过那些祭司很敏感。


不过天哪，多么棒的图书馆！我想你会想留下来四处看看，西奥多拉。事实上，你也许会想特别留意这间房里那幽灵（特征）的移动。


现在我可不愿剥夺你们发现的乐趣，但要知道，我们下面那位数量繁多的朋友相当喜欢毒药，而他似乎对此免疫。还有，哦，呵呵！那道楼梯！妙极了。如今在陵墓和神殿里已经很少见到如此真正的职业风范了。不过在那儿务必极其谨慎。记住我对你们说过的话：从你尚未准备好面对的东西面前撤退并不丢人。就像你一样，夏洛特——当你还只有十号的时候就对上了那只河流龙兽！可怜的生物。它本该逃走的。


我在一瓶特别上好的扎摩诔干白里留下了一样有用的东西。恐怕我无法评价其年份；就连我也没那么老！我写下这些时，那幽灵（特征）正从我肩头探视。我想她并没有在意。可怜的灵魂。


永远向前！


你们博学的叔叔，

扎该乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

Congratulations on dealing with those pesky ghouls. Did you meet the friendly one? The ghost in this room is a bit off her rocker, so to speak, but she’ll leave you well enough alone if you pretend to sit and do some work. Why, I stayed here for a day or two, though indeed there is always a chance of a disturbance. That temple just north of here really is something, though the priests are touchy.


But my, what a library! I expect you’ll want to stay and have a look around, Theodora. You may want to pay particular attention to the movements of the ghost in this very room, in fact.


Now I would hate to deprive you of the joy of discovery, but be aware that our multitudinous friend below rather enjoys poison, to which he seems to be immune. And oh, ho ho! That staircase! Marvelous. It’s rare to see true class like that in tombs and temples these days. But do be extremely cautious there. Remember what I have told you: there is no dishonor in fleeing from something you are not prepared to face just yet. Just like you, Charlotte, with that river drake when you were only ten! Poor creature. It should have fled.


I left something helpful in a bottle of a particularly good Jalmeray dry white. I’m afraid I cannot comment on the vintage. Even I am not quite that old! That ghost is looking over my shoulder as I write. I don’t think she’s paying attention, though. Poor soul.


Ever onward!


Your Scholarly Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Fear Gem.name: 恐惧宝石 Fear Gem
Fear Gem.description:
启动 2（专注）

黑暗的烟雾仿佛在这颗黑曜石宝石内部翻涌。当你启动这颗宝石时，进行一次近战打击。若你命中并造成伤害，则目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 1}，若为大成功则获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 2}。

若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lkcM4V3VDAtjlR9P]{威吓打击} 专长，则将该打击所造成的惊惧（状态）数值提高为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 2}，若为大成功则提高为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 3}。

Activate 2 (concentrate)

Dark smoke seems to writhe within this obsidian gem. When you activate the gem, make a melee Strike. If you hit and deal damage, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit.

If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lkcM4V3VDAtjlR9P]{Intimidating Strike} feat, increase the frightened condition value caused by the Strike to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} on a critical hit.

Antidote (Moderate).name: 解毒剂（中等） Antidote (Moderate)
Antidote (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在6小时内对抗毒素的强韧豁免检定获得+3物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

2 - Descriptions of Natural Phenomena.prototypeToken: 2 - 自然现象描述 2 - Descriptions of Natural Phenomena

Fourth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.name: 扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第四封信 Fourth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Fourth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特和西奥多拉：


历史学会一定会为这个地方抓狂。它简直一直向下延伸！而地表上几乎没有任何迹象表明地下竟有如此庞大的基础设施。显然这里建造得十分用心，并且有着明确的目的与规划。我得说，这附近的角色可真够古怪的。那个总是笑嘻嘻的家伙，你知道吗，他居然在国际象棋上赢了我！当然，他作弊了。不过话说回来，我也一样。我原以为在地下会发现很多东西，但绝没想到会有一支乐团。他们其实不算差。也许他们会让你加入他们，嗯，西奥多拉？不过我没看到任何管风琴，连羽管键琴也没有。


我想你注意到这一等级西侧的安保检查点了吧？它通往地表！不过你放心，我不打算往那边走。我必须看看这一切的最底部究竟有什么。


恐怕你会发现下一等级的大部分地方一点也不令人愉快。拷问、实验，甚至还有赌博！好吧，当你找到拷问室时，听我一句劝：在那位铁质女人正北方准确四步、正西方七步处那块松动的地砖下面检查一下。
继续前进！


你们非同寻常的叔叔，

扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,


The Historical Society would be in fits over this place. It just keeps going down! And hardly any indication of such extensive infrastructure on the surface. It was obviously constructed with care, and with a specific purpose and plan in mind. Quite an odd lot of characters around hereabouts, I must say. That cheery fellow, did you know, he managed to beat me at chess! Of course, he cheated. But then again, so did I. Of all the things I expected to find below, a musical group was not among them. They aren’t bad, actually. Perhaps they’ll let you join them, eh, Theodora? Although I didn’t see a pipe organ anywhere, nor even a harpsichord.


I suppose you noticed the security checkpoint to the west on this level? It leads to the surface! Not that I’m heading that way, mind. I must see what lies at the bottom of all this.


You’ll find that much of the next level is not at all pleasant, I’m afraid. Torture, experimentation, and even gambling! Well, when you find the torture chamber, you take my advice and check beneath the loose floor tile precisely four paces north and seven west of the ferrous woman.
Ever onward!


Your Exceptional Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Ghost Oil.name: 幽灵油 Ghost Oil
Ghost Oil.description:
装着这种半透明、非实体油液的小瓶总是冷得令人一触即寒。将幽灵油涂抹在你正在持用或携带的一把近战武器上，会使其变得半透明，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽冥}符文的效果，但也会使该武器无法对实体生物造成伤害。将该油涂抹在另一名生物的武器上没有任何效果。该油的效果持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sk5LgfXestDKxCnK]{效果：幽灵油}

The vials containing this translucent, unsubstantial oil are always cold to the touch. Applying ghost oil to a melee weapon you're wielding or carrying causes it to become semitransparent and gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} rune, but it also makes the weapon unable to harm corporeal creatures. The oil has no effect when applied to another creature's weapon. The effect of the oil lasts for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sk5LgfXestDKxCnK]{Effect: Ghost Oil}

Falling Wall Trap.name: 坠落墙壁陷阱 Falling Wall Trap
Falling Wall Trap.tokenName: 尖刺坑洞陷阱 Spiky Pit Trap

Falling Panels.name: 坠落板块 Falling Panels
Falling Panels.description:
触发 当所有PC都位于@JournalEntry[B: Servants' Quarters#B08. Servants’ Rooms]{区域 B8}中前述六个房间中间的走廊的6格长度范围内时。
或

当通往这六个空房间的任意一扇门被打开时也会触发。

效果 6格长走廊的两端都会被金属板封闭。

  • 此外，走廊内也会有金属板落下，将其分隔为三个等长部分，每一部分都与两个房间相连。

  • 当面板落下时，紧邻面板的角色可以尝试进行一次@Check[reflex|dc:24]豁免，以尝试进入相邻区域。

  • 这也会激活房间内的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.outlaws-of-alkenstar-bestiary.BbTS7MMkz0Ob7qAF]{发条保安}。

Trigger When all PCs are in the six-square stretch of corridor in the middle of the aforementioned six rooms in @JournalEntry[B: Servants' Quarters#B08. Servants’ Rooms]{area B8}.
OR

It will also trigger when any of the doors to the six empty rooms is opened.

Effect Both ends of the six-square-long corridor are closed off by metal plates.

  • In addition, metal plates drop down in the corridor itself, sectioning it into three equal parts, each connected to two rooms.

  • Characters next to a panel when it drop downs can attempt to enter an adjacent area by attempting a @Check[reflex|dc:24] save.

  • This also activates the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.outlaws-of-alkenstar-bestiary.BbTS7MMkz0Ob7qAF]{Clockwork Handlers} in the rooms.

Falling Wall Trap.disable:
这些板块被拼凑在一起，具有硬度 5 和 25 点生命值。若它们被摧毁，则可以在区域之间移动。

The panels are cobbled together and have hardness 5 and 25 hit points. If they are destroyed, movement between areas is possible.
Falling Wall Trap.hazarddescription:
封住走廊两端以及每对房间的金属板，将其分隔成3个独立的组。

Metal plates that close off both ends of the corridoor and each pair of rooms to create 3 separate groups.
Falling Wall Trap.prototypeToken: 尖刺陷坑陷阱 Spiky Pit Trap

Incomplete Soulbound Doll (Actor Only).name: 不完整的缚魂娃娃（仅角色） Incomplete Soulbound Doll (Actor Only)
Incomplete Soulbound Doll (Actor Only).tokenName: 未完成的缚魂娃娃（仅角色） Incomplete Soulbound Doll (Actor Only)
Incomplete Soulbound Doll (Actor Only).prototypeToken: 未完成的缚魂娃娃（仅角色） Incomplete Soulbound Doll (Actor Only)

Shrinking Blast.name: 缩小爆破 Shrinking Blast
Shrinking Blast.description:
启动 r 一名玩家角色已在房间内停留3轮

房间内所有人进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:25]，魔法能量从地板中飞射而出

大成功 无事发生
成功 体型缩小1个体型等级，持续1小时
失败 体型缩小2个体型等级，持续1小时
大失败 如失败，但持续24小时

@UUID[Compendium.world.homebrew.Item.1zhLB7sH2Jh8nEmH]{效果: 缩小陷阱 成功}

@UUID[Compendium.world.homebrew.Item.OHnUmHLgRChl34b2]{效果: 缩小陷阱 失败}

@UUID[Compendium.world.homebrew.Item.GTkGW9HrZeVJayAX]{效果: 缩小陷阱 大失败}

Activate r A Player character has been in the room for 3 rounds

Everyone in the room makes a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] as the magical energy flies out from the floor

Critical Success Do nothing
Success Shrink one size category for 1 hour
Failure Shrink two size categories for one hour
Critical Failure Failure but for 24 hours

@UUID[Compendium.world.homebrew.Item.1zhLB7sH2Jh8nEmH]{Effect: Shrinking Trap Success}

@UUID[Compendium.world.homebrew.Item.OHnUmHLgRChl34b2]{Effect: Shrinking Trap Failure}

@UUID[Compendium.world.homebrew.Item.GTkGW9HrZeVJayAX]{Effect: Shrinking Trap Critical Failure}

Cheery Man.name: 笑面人 Cheery Man

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 神秘自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Occult Innate Spells.name: 秘法天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Hallucination.name: 镜花水月 Hallucination
Hallucination.description:
目标会持续将某物侦测为另一物、无法侦测到实际存在的东西，或侦测到并不存在的东西，但这不会改变其信念。你选择上述哪一种效果适用，并决定镜花水月的具体内容。例如，你可以让目标把所有精灵都看成是人类、无法侦测到其兄弟的存在、即使并未携带也能看见自己心爱的怀表在身上，或看见城镇中心有一座高塔。目标可以尝试一次初始的意志豁免，其效果如下。此后，每当目标搜寻或直接与镜花水月互动时，它都会获得一次意志豁免来识破镜花水月。例如，目标每次与精灵互动、意外撞到其兄弟、试图查看自己的怀表，或研究那座高塔时，都可以尝试识破镜花水月。由GM决定在某些情况下，目标可以带有很大的环境加值来尝试识破，例如目标试图攀爬那座不存在的高塔时。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物会感知你所选择的内容，直到它识破为止，但它知道镜花水月是什么。

失败 该生物会感知你所选择的内容，直到它识破为止。

大失败 该生物会感知你所选择的内容，直到它识破为止，且它信任其虚假的感官，在用于识破的豁免上承受-4环境减值。

升阶（6环） 选择以下其一：以最多10个生物为目标，或将该法术的持续时间改为直到你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 选择以下其一：以任意数量的生物为目标，或将该法术的持续时间改为无限。

The target consistently detects one thing as another, can't detect something that's there, or detects something that's not there, though it doesn't alter their beliefs. You choose which of these effects applies, and you determine the specifics of the hallucination. For example, you could make the target see all elves as humans, be unable to detect the presence of their brother, see their beloved pocket watch on their person even when it isn't, or see a tower in the center of town. The target can attempt an initial Will save, with effects below. They also receive a Will save to disbelieve the hallucination every time they Seek or directly interact with the hallucination. For example, the target could attempt to disbelieve the hallucination each time they interacted with an elf, bumped into their brother accidentally, tried to check their pocket watch, or studied the tower. The target can attempt to disbelieve with a large circumstance bonus in situations determined by the GM, such as if the target attempted to climb the nonexistent tower.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves, but it knows what the hallucination is.

Failure The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves.

Critical Failure The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves, and it trusts its false senses, taking a -4 circumstance penalty to saves to disbelieve.

Heightened (6th) Choose to either target up to 10 creatures or change the spell's duration to until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) Choose to either target any number of creatures or change the spell's duration to unlimited.

Shadow Blast.name: 幽影爆破 Shadow Blast
Shadow Blast.description:
你将幽影位面的半真实物质塑造成一次爆发。选择酸蚀、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、穿刺、挥砍或音波伤害，并选择一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]、一个位于120尺内的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]，或一个 @Template[type:line|distance:50]。爆发对区域内的每个生物造成你所选类型的5d8点伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You shape the quasi-real substance of the Shadow Plane into a blast. Choose acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, force, piercing, slashing, or sonic damage, and choose a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] within 120 feet, or a @Template[type:line|distance:50]. The blast deals 5d8 damage of the type you chose to each creature in the area.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮之眼（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。这只眼睛无法移动，但你可以从该点如同使用你正常的视觉感官一样向所有方向视物。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
目标可以在空中翱翔，获得等同于其速度或20英尺（取较高者）的飞行速度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{法术效果：飞行}

升阶（7环） 持续时间增加至1小时。

The target can soar through the air, gaining a fly Speed equal to its Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{Spell Effect: Fly}

Heightened (7th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Suggestion.name: 暗示术 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜言蜜语的言辞令生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一个行动方案，措辞必须让目标觉得这是一条合乎逻辑的行动路线，且不能是自我毁灭的或明显违背目标自身利益的。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是在正常地与其交谈，而不是对其施放法术。

失败 目标立刻遵从你的暗示术。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成一项有限的暗示术内容，或该暗示术变得自我毁灭，或出现其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

强化（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵聆听，如同使用你正常的听觉感官。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Mind Reading (At Will).name: 读心术（随意） Mind Reading (At Will)
Mind Reading (At Will).description:
通过一次粗略的精神接触，你尝试读取目标的思想。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后目标在1小时内暂时免疫你的读心术。

大成功或大失败 当你施放法术时，目标从你这里感知到模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

失败 当你施放法术时，你从目标那里感知到模糊的表层想法，并且你得知它的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

大成功或大失败 如失败，且在法术的持续时间内，你可以维持法术以再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得任何额外的豁免。

With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind. It must attempt a Will save. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your mind reading for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target perceives vague surface thoughts from you when you Cast the Spell.

Success You find out whether the target's Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Failure You perceive vague surface thoughts from the target when you Cast the Spell, and you find out whether its Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Critical Failure As failure, and for the duration of the spell, you can Sustain the Spell to detect the target's surface thoughts again. The target doesn't receive any additional saves.

Nondetection.name: 回避侦测 Nondetection
Nondetection.description:
你竖起防护结界，使目标难以被魔法侦测到。回避侦测会在持续时间内尝试反制所有针对目标或目标的道具施放的侦测、揭示与探知预言系法术，并在此目的下将戏法视为1环法术。若成功反制一个以区域或多个目标为目标的预言系法术，则仅对回避侦测的目标抵消其效果。

You erect protective wards that make the target difficult to detect via magic. Nondetection attempts to counteract all detection, revelation, and scrying divinations made against the target or the target's gear throughout the duration, counting cantrips as 1st-level spells for this purpose. Successfully counteracting a divination that targets an area or multiple targets negates the effects only for nondetection's target.

Vampiric Touch.name: 吸血鬼之触 Vampiric Touch
Vampiric Touch.description:
你的接触会汲取目标的生命精华以强化自身。你对目标造成6d6点负向伤害。你获得等同于目标所受负向伤害一半的临时生命值（在应用抗力等效果之后）。1分钟后，你失去所有剩余的临时生命值。

强化（+1） 伤害增加2d6点。

Your touch leeches the lifeblood out of a target to empower yourself. You deal 6d6 negative damage to the target. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the negative damage the target takes (after applying resistances and the like). You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形态看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于此效果的性质仍使目标的位置显而易见，目标无法使用该隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的非魔法物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Hideous Laughter.name: 狂笑术 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声所淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到无法控制的笑声折磨。它不能使用反应动作。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 且不能使用反应动作。

大失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 且在 1 轮内不能使用动作或反应动作。随后它承受失败的效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laugher. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Invisibility.name: 隐形术 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
披覆于幻象之中，目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，使其对它们而言改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 状态。若目标使用敌对动作，则在该敌对动作完成后法术结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续 1 分钟，但即使目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
对<目标>而言，你的话语如蜜糖般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对<目标>使用敌对动作，该法术结束。法术结束时，<目标>不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑术影响，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能通过世俗手段说服<目标>继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败：成功 <目标>不受影响，并意识到你试图对它施展魅惑术。

成功 <目标>不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害之物而非魅惑术，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 <目标>对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。如果它原本就是友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败：失败 <目标>对你的态度变为乐于助人，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备时。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备时，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以侦测魔法的存在。你不会获得除魔法存在与否之外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。

你仅会在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形术药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（第3环） 你得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的最高等级效果之魔法学派。若多个效果同样强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（第4环） 同第3环，但你还会定位最高等级魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知精确位置，但能将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体之内（若其大于该范围，则缩小到最近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Ghost Sound.name: 幻音术 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物品 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的虚假视觉影像。整个影像必须容纳在该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地活动，但它不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会沿着虚假的瀑布倾泻而下，但不会有任何声响。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜寻动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻象。

升阶（2环）你的影像会发出恰当的声音，产生正常的气味，并且接触起来感觉正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）特征。持续时间增加至1小时。

升阶（5环）如同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Item Facade.name: 物品 外观 Item Facade
Item Facade.description:
你使目标物体的外观与触感看起来仿佛处于更好或更差的物理状态。当你施放该法术时，决定你要让该物体看起来破败不堪还是完美无瑕。使其看起来破败不堪的物品会显得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{损坏}且粗制滥造。完好的物品若被变得更好，看起来就像全新的一样，且高度抛光或保养良好。损坏的物品看起来完好无损且可正常使用。被摧毁的物品无法受到该法术影响。与该物品进行交互的生物可以尝试不相信该幻觉。

升阶（2环） 持续时间为24小时。

升阶（3环） 持续时间为无限。

You make the target object look and feel as though it were in much better or worse physical condition. When you cast this spell, decide whether you want to make the object look decrepit or perfect. An item made to look decrepit appears @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken} and shoddy. An intact item made to look better appears as though it's brand new and highly polished or well maintained. A Broken item appears to be intact and functional. Destroyed items can't be affected by this spell. A creature that Interacts with the item can attempt to disbelieve the illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The duration is 24 hours.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is unlimited.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造一只单独的魔法手，或是隐形或是如幽灵般，它抓住目标物体并将其缓慢移动最多20英尺。由于你是在使物体漂浮，你可以将其向任何方向移动。当你维持法术时，你可以额外将物体移动20英尺。如果法术结束时物体在空中，物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以一个负载为1或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以一个负载为1或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以一个负载为2或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中于目标物体，敞开思维以感知魔法灵光。当施法完成时，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法；若是，你还会得知其魔法学派。

如果该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的等级低于你的阅读灵光法术的等级时，你才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the level of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Sigil.name: 魔法印记 Sigil
Sigil.description:
