你无害地将自己独特的魔法印记（体型约为1平方英寸）置于所选定的目标生物或物体上。该印记可以是可见或隐形的，你可以通过使用一个交互动作来接触目标，将其从一种状态切换为另一种状态。该印记可以通过5分钟的擦洗或刮除工作移除。如果它在一个生物身上，它会在一周内自然淡化。印记淡化前的时间会根据你升阶的等级而增加。

升阶（3环） 该魔法印记改为在1个月后淡化。

升阶（5环） 该魔法印记改为在1年后淡化。

升阶（7环） 该魔法印记永不淡化。

You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object. The mark can be visible or invisible, and you can change it from one state to another by using an Interact action to touch the target. The mark can be scrubbed or scraped off with 5 minutes of work. If it's on a creature, it fades naturally over the course of a week. The time before the mark fades increases depending on your heightened level.

Heightened (3rd) The sigil instead fades after 1 month.

Heightened (5th) The sigil instead fades after 1 year.

Heightened (7th) The sigil never fades.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时所有豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

+3 Status to All Saves vs. Divine Magic.name: 对抗神圣魔法时，所有豁免获得+3状态加值 +3 Status to All Saves vs. Divine Magic

Scoff at the Divine.name: 嘲弄神祇 Scoff at the Divine
Scoff at the Divine.description:
触发 30英尺内的一个生物施放一个神圣法术或使用一个神圣能力。

需求 罗刹王有一个尚未消耗的法术位，可用于施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}。

效果 罗刹王消耗一个可用于施放解除魔法的法术位，并尝试反制触发的法术或能力。

罗刹王在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Scoff at the Divine]]{1d4轮}内无法嘲弄神圣。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet casts a divine spell or uses a divine ability.

Requirements The raja rakshasa has an unexpended spell slot that can be used to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}.

Effect The raja rakshasa expends a spell slot that could be used to cast dispel magic and attempts to counteract the triggering spell or ability.

The raja rakshasa can't Scoff at the Divine for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Scoff at the Divine]]{1d4 rounds}.

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
罗刹王罗刹（特征）会变成任何中型类人生物的外貌。这不会改变罗刹王罗刹（特征）的速度或其打击的攻击与伤害调整值，但可能会改变其打击造成的伤害类型（通常变为钝击）。除非类人形态有獠牙或类似的徒手攻击，否则它通常会失去其獠牙打击。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The raja rakshasa takes on the appearance of any Medium humanoid. This doesn't change the raja rakshasa's Speed or its attack and damage modifiers with its Strikes but might change the damage type its Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). It typically loses its fangs Strike unless the humanoid form has fangs or a similar unarmed attack.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Disturbing Vision.name: 令人不安的幻象 Disturbing Vision
Disturbing Vision.description:
罗刹（特征）王的双眼闪烁绿光，以心灵感应投射一道波动，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]。区域内所有生物都会被来自该罗刹（特征）王某次前世的邪恶堕落景象所侵袭。区域内每个非邪恶生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:29] 意志豁免中成功，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（若为大失败，则还会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}）。这些幻象的持续时间为 [[/br 1d4 #Disturbing Visions Duration]]{1d4 rounds}，在其持续期间，罗刹（特征）王与区域内所有邪恶生物对所有检定获得+1状态加值。罗刹（特征）王只有在先前的幻象结束后，才能再次使用此能力。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.AThOnEYzPO9ssYTB]{效果：扰乱幻象}

The raja rakshasa's eyes flash green as it projects a telepathic wave in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. All creatures in the area are assailed by a vision of evil decadence from one of the rakshasa's past lives. Each non-evil creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:29] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} on a critical failure). The visions last [[/br 1d4 #Disturbing Visions Duration]]{1d4 rounds}, and while they do, the raja rakshasa and all evil creatures in the area gain a +1 status bonus to all checks. The raja rakshasa can use this ability again only once the previous visions end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.AThOnEYzPO9ssYTB]{Effect: Disturbing Vision}

Bloodletting Kukri.name: 放血库克里刀 Bloodletting Kukri

Cape of the Mountebank.name: 江湖骗子斗篷 Cape of the Mountebank
Cape of the Mountebank.description:
这件鲜红与金色相间的斗篷常常编织进闪亮的丝线，用来分散注意力。穿着这件斗篷时，你在欺瞒检定上获得+2物品加值。

启动 D 交互

频率 每日一次

效果 你施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{次元门}。你离开的空间与你出现的空间会被一团团烟雾填满，使烟雾中的任何人直到他们离开烟雾或直到你下个回合结束前都处于隐蔽状态，届时烟雾消散。强风会立刻吹散烟雾。

This bright red-and-gold cape is often interlaced with glittery threads and serves as a distraction. While wearing the cape, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception checks.

Activate D Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}. The space you leave and the one you appear in are filled with puffs of smoke that make anyone within concealed until they leave the smoke or the end of your next turn, at which point the smoke dissipates. Strong winds immediately disperse the smoke.

Cheery Man's Mask.name: 笑面人的面具 Cheery Man's Mask
Cheery Man's Mask.description:
笑面人佩戴的微笑面具。

启动 F（操作）

需求 你的回合开始

频率 每日一次

效果 你将一根手指放到嘴边做出噤声手势。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.G56DJkxlUjFv0C4Z]{时代信标}的效果

A smiling mask worn by the cheery man.

Activate F (manipulate)

Requirement Start of your turn

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring one finger to your mouth in a hushing motion. This has the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.G56DJkxlUjFv0C4Z]{Time Beacon}

Cheery Man.publicNotes:
当不伪装成类人生物时，罗刹（特征）王有一颗兽首。罗刹（特征）王的双手更令人隐隐不安，因为这些邪魔的手指向外弯曲，远离掌心。

在所有类型的罗刹（特征）之中，罗刹（特征）王最为嘲弄宗教。他们理解神圣的力量，却认为自己才是唯一值得凡人生物崇拜的存在；就连他们自身的不朽者也不配获得这等颂扬。罗刹（特征）王常常组成紧密的家族，协力扳倒凡人的城市，或在其中自幽影里统治它们。这样的罗刹（特征）家族往往会吸纳其他种类的邪魔，常以檀荼苏迦作为宠爱的仆从或隐秘的间谍。即使一个罗刹（特征）王家族会为共同目标而协作，内部争斗与彼此背叛也始终是持续的威胁。

罗刹（特征）是邪恶的灵体，它们以类人生物的外貌为披覆，以便在猎物之间不被察觉地行走。它们体现了大多数社会所忌讳的事物，并以它们试图玷污之人的形态，沉溺并大啖这些丑恶行径。罗刹（特征）的种类繁多；下文所呈现的是矮小而阴险的檀荼苏迦罗刹（特征），以及恶名昭彰的罗刹（特征）王——它们是这些邪魔之中分布最广、也最常遭遇的两类。

When not disguised as a humanoid, the raja rakshasa has the head of an animal. The hands of a raja rakshasa are more subtly unsettling, for the fingers of these fiends bend outward, away from the palms.

More than any other types of rakshasa, rajas scoff at religion. They understand the power of the divine, yet they view themselves as the only things worthy of worship from mortal creatures; not even their own immortals are deemed deserving of such glorification. Raja rakshasas often form close-knit families that work together to bring down mortal cities or to rule them from the shadows within. Such families of rakshasas often incorporate other breeds of the fiend, often using dandasukas as favored servants or stealthy spies. Even though a raja family works together to achieve a shared goal, infighting and treachery among their own is a constant threat.

Rakshasas are evil spirits that cloak themselves in the guises of humanoid creatures, that they might walk unseen among their prey. They embody what is taboo among most societies, and in the shape of those they seek to defile, rakshasas gorge themselves on these hideous acts. A wide range of rakshasas exist; presented below are the diminutive, sinister dandasuka rakshasa and the infamous raja rakshasa, who are the most widespread and commonly encountered of these fiends.
Cheery Man.allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. magic, +3 status to all saves vs. divine magic

Belcorra's Grasp.name: 贝科拉之握 Belcorra's Grasp
贝科拉之握 Belcorra's Grasp
Belcorra's Grasp.description:
Ectoplasm并挤压生物，造成 @Damage[(3d8+14)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:26|basic:true|traits:undead,unholy,incorporeal,spirit,ghost]）。在一次失败时，该生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} DC 26）。

Ectoplasm and squeezes the creatures, dealing @Damage[(3d8+14)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:26|basic:true|traits:undead,unholy,incorporeal,spirit,ghost]). On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC 26).

Immobilized.name: 定身 Immobilized
Immobilized.description:
你无法移动。你不能使用任何具有移动（特征）的动作。如果你因某物将你固定在原地而陷入无法移动，并且有外力会将你移出你的空间，则该外力必须成功通过一次检定，其目标为将你固定在原地的效果的DC或将你固定在原地的怪物的相关防御（通常是强韧DC）。

You are incapable of movement. You can't use any actions that have the move trait. If you're immobilized by something holding you in place and an external force would move you out of your space, the force must succeed at a check against either the DC of the effect holding you in place or the relevant defense (usually Fortitude DC) of the monster holding you in place.

Belcorra's Grasp.hazarddescription:
一股巨大的灵质能量波浪流经一个区域，一只巨大的灵质之手在一个生物周围形成并挤压它。

A massive wave of ectoplasmic energy flows through a section and a giant ectoplasmic hand forms around a creature and squeezes it.
Belcorra's Grasp.routine:
在每轮结束时，贝科拉可以从8个扇区中选择一个，沿着该扇区释放一道能量波，对任何被能量波卷入的生物施加如同贝科拉之握般的作用。（你也可以裁定：躲在角落里的PC可以避开这个效果。）

可以像这样制作动画

@UUID[Macro.Fv5QZflsyGrGWjCl]{J20 - Belcorra's Grasp}

At the end of each round, Belcorra can choose one of the 8 slices to send a wave of energy down acting as Belcorra's Grap for any creature caught in the wave. (You might rule that a PC way in the corner can avoid this effect.)

Can be animated like so

@UUID[Macro.Fv5QZflsyGrGWjCl]{J20 - Belcorra's Grasp}
Belcorra's Grasp.stealthdetails:
（受训）注意到灵质凝结

(trained) to notice ectoplasm coalescing

Keppler Credence.name: 开普勒信念 Keppler Credence

Strategic Strike.name: 战略打击 Strategic Strike
Strategic Strike.description:
当你谨慎且深思熟虑地出击时，你会造成一次沉重打击。当你进行一次由于 构思计策 而在你的攻击掷骰中加入你的智力调整值的打击时，你会额外造成 1d6 精确伤害。

随着你的调查员等级提高，你的战略打击也会变得更加致命。在第5、第9、第13和第17等级时，将骰子数量各增加1个。

When you strike carefully and with forethought, you deal a telling blow. When making a Strike that adds your Intelligence modifier on your attack roll due to Devising a Stratagem, you deal an additional 1d6 precision damage.

As your investigator level increases, so too does the deadliness of your strategic strike. Increase the number of dice by one at 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th levels.

Exquisite Sword Cane.name: 精致剑杖 Exquisite Sword Cane

Devise a Stratagem.name: 设计计策 Devise a Stratagem
Devise a Stratagem.description:
频率 每轮一次

你在战斗中评估敌人的弱点，并用其制定对敌人的攻击计划。选择一个你能看见的生物，然后掷骰 1d20。若你在本轮稍后对所选生物进行打击（Strike），你必须用你为“构思计谋（Devise a Stratagem）”所掷出的结果来替代该次打击的攻击掷骰，而非再掷骰。你只会在本轮对该生物进行的第一次打击时进行此替代，而非任何后续攻击。

当你进行此替代时，你也可以将你的智力调整值加入你的攻击掷骰，以替代你的力量或敏捷调整值，但前提是你的打击使用灵巧或娴熟的近战武器，灵巧或娴熟的徒手攻击，一把远程武器（若其为带有投掷特征的近战武器，则必须为灵巧或娴熟），或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TLQErnOpM9Luy7rL]{Sap}。

若你知晓你所选择的生物是你正在追查的线索的目标，你可以将此能力作为自由动作（）使用。

Frequency once per round

You assess a foe's weaknesses in combat and use them to formulate a plan of attack against your enemy. Choose a creature you can see, and roll a d20. If you Strike the chosen creature later this round, you must use the result of the roll you made to Devise a Stratagem for your Strike's attack roll instead of rolling. You make this substitution only for the first Strike you make against the creature this round, not any subsequent attacks.

When you make this substitution, you can also add your Intelligence modifier to your attack roll instead of your Strength or Dexterity modifier, provided your Strike uses an agile or finesse melee weapon, an agile or finesse unarmed attack, a ranged weapon (which must be agile or finesse if it's a melee weapon with the thrown trait) or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TLQErnOpM9Luy7rL]{Sap}.

If you're aware that the creature you choose is the subject of a lead you're pursuing, you can use this ability as a free action.

Keppler Credence.publicNotes:
他们在举止和行为上都无可挑剔地专业。他们是守序中立，总是尽其所能履行他们的契约。他们不介意弄脏自己的手，但会避免不必要的流血——不是出于美德，而是出于一种职业操守。他们穿着精致的深色西装，几乎一模一样。Keppler Credence 戴着一顶宽大的深色帽子，拄着一根剑杖；Kairo Cryde 戴着深色的圆形眼镜，提着一个公文包。Credence 负责
交谈；Cryde 负责文书工作。他们经常用手语交流，因为 Cryde 是哑巴。

在职业方面，Credence 是一名调查员，拥有许多技能，以及一种不可思议的能力，能对人物和局势作出准确的推断，以至于他几乎看起来像有通灵能力。

虽然他们有属性数据，可在本节底部找到，但 Credence 和 Cryde 的设计意图是给玩家带来一种不同于战斗的挑战。首先，他们会竭尽全力避免直接战斗，尽管他们完全有能力击败一个低等级队伍，因为那会引人注目，而且只是很麻烦。其次，队伍可能很难为对 Credence 和 Cryde 直接使用暴力找到正当理由，因为他们通常给人一种在合法行事的印象。例如，如果他们被发现破门闯入某人的房子，他们会出示一份搜查令。（搜查令是伪造的，但只有具有社交的专家熟练度的 PC 才有机会识破这一点。）
此外，Credence 和 Cryde 都非常聪明。如果你像我一样在现实生活中不怎么聪明，你需要用一些技巧来让这一点传达给你的玩家：
- Credence 即使刚见到 PC，也会似乎对他们了解很多，这是他演绎技能的结果
- Cryde 把她的法术 fulus 放在公文包里，而且她似乎对任何特定情境都恰好有最合适的法术
- C&C 会做调查；在他们与 PC 的第一次遭遇之后，他们将会了解队伍的背景、关系和弱点——包括可用于施压或勒索的材料
- C&C 看起来从不会对任何事感到惊讶，并且总给人一种完全掌控局势的感觉
The Consortium Conspiracy consists of

They are both impeccably professional in their mannerisms and behavior. They are lawful neutral, always honoring their contracts to the best of their abilities. They don’t mind getting their hands dirty, but they avoid unnecessary bloodshed – not out of virtue, but out of a sense of professionalism. They dress in fine dark suits, nearly identical. Keppler Credence wears a broad dark hat and carries a sword cane; Kairo Cryde wears dark, circular spectacles and carries a briefcase. Credence does the
talking; Cryde handles the paperwork. They often communicate in sign language because Cryde is mute.

In terms of class, Credence is an investigator with many skills and an uncanny ability to make accurate deductions about people and situations, so that he nearly seems psychic.

Although they have stats, which can be found at the bottom of this section, Credence and Cryde are intended to present a different kind of challenge to the players than combat. For one thing, they will go to great lengths to avoid direct combat, even though they are easily capable of defeating a low-level party, as this would draw attention and is simply messy. For another thing, it may be difficult for the party to justify direct violence against Credence and Cryde since they generally give the appearance of doing things legally. For example, if they are found breaking and entering into someone’s house, they will produce a warrant. (The warrant is fake, but only a PC with Expert proficiency in Society has a chance of detecting this.)
Additionally, Credence and Cryde are both very intelligent. If you, like me, are not very intelligent in real life, you’ll need to use some tricks to get this across to your players:
- Credence will seem to know a lot about the PCs even if they have just met, as a result of his deductive skills
- Cryde keeps her spell fulus in her briefcase, and she seemingly has exactly the right spell for any given situation
- C&C do their research; after their first encounter with the PCs, they will become aware of the party’s backgrounds, relationships, and weaknesses – including material for leverage or blackmail
- C&C never appear to be surprised by anything, and always give the impression of being in full control of the situation
The Consortium Conspiracy consists of

Kairo Cryde.name: 凯罗·克莱德 Kairo Cryde

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备战法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Alarm.name: 魔法警报 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你为一个区域施加防护，以在生物未经你允许进入时提醒你。当你施放魔法警报时，选择一个口令。每当一个小型或更大、具有实体的生物在不说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，魔法警报会按你的选择发出心灵警报（此时该法术获得心灵（特征））或发出如同手铃般音色与音量的可听见警报（此时该法术获得听觉（特征））。任一选项都会自动唤醒你，而铃声会允许区域内的每个生物尝试一次DC 15 察觉检定以醒来。知晓魔法警报的生物必须进行一次潜行检定对抗该法术的法术DC，否则在移动进入该区域时会触发该法术。

升阶（3环） 你可以为哪些生物会令魔法警报响起指定条件——例如，兽人或戴面具的人。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a DC 15 Perception check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify criteria for which creatures sound the alarm spell-for instance, orcs or masked people.

Feather Fall.name: 羽落术 Feather Fall
Feather Fall.description:
触发 射程内的一名生物正在坠落

你使空气本身阻止坠落。目标的坠落减缓至每轮60英尺，并且在法术持续时间内的坠落部分在计算坠落伤害时不计入。如果目标在法术生效期间到达地面，它不会因这次坠落而受到伤害。目标一着地，法术立即结束。

Trigger a creature within range is falling

You cause the air itself to arrest a fall. The target's fall slows to 60 feet per round, and the portion of the fall during the spell's duration doesn't count when calculating falling damage. If the target reaches the ground while the spell is in effect, it takes no damage from the fall. The spell ends as soon as the target lands.

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻觉，使你看起来像另一种身体形状相同、且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、气味或举止。你可以改变你的衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件连衣裙。手持物品不受影响，而你移除的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象伪装等同于为使用欺瞒进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充} 而准备伪装；它无视你因将自己伪装成不同类生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它使你在防止他人看穿你的伪装时，欺瞒检定获得+4状态加值；并且即使你未受训，你也要将你的等级加入其中。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（2环）该法术也会伪装你的声音与气味，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）。

升阶（3环）你可以看起来像任何体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体才能呈现其外貌。该法术也会伪装你的声音与气味，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Jump.name: 跳跃 Jump
Jump.description:
你的双腿涌现出力量，准备跳得又高又远。你可以向任意方向跳跃30英尺而不接触地面。你必须在距你30英尺内的坚实地面空间上落地，否则在你使用下一个动作后就会坠落。

升阶（3环）射程变为接触，目标变为1个被接触的生物，持续时间变为1分钟，使目标在其采取“跃步”动作时可按上述描述进行跳跃。

Your legs surge with strength, ready to leap high and far. You jump 30 feet in any direction without touching the ground. You must land on a space of solid ground within 30 feet of you, or else you fall after using your next action.

Heightened (3rd) The range becomes touch, the target changes to one touched creature, and the duration becomes 1 minute, allowing the target to jump as described whenever it takes the Leap action.

Pest Form.name: 害兽形态 Pest Form
Pest Form.description:
你变形为一个超小型动物的战斗形态，例如猫、昆虫、蜥蜴或老鼠。你可以决定动物的具体类型（例如老鼠或螳螂），但这不会影响该形态的体型或数据。处于该形态时，你获得动物（特征），并且你不能进行打击。你可以解消该法术。

你获得以下数据与能力：

  • AC = 15 + 你的等级。忽略你的护甲的检定减值与速度减值。
  • 速度20英尺。
  • 对物理伤害弱点5。（如果你在此形态下受到物理伤害，你会额外受到5点伤害。）
  • 昏暗视觉与不精确嗅觉30英尺。
  • 特技与隐匿调整值为+10，除非你自己的调整值更高；运动调整值-4。

升阶（4环）你可以变为一个会飞的生物，例如鸟类，这会给予你20英尺的飞行速度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ydsLEGjY89Akc4oZ]{法术效果：害兽形态}

You transform into the battle form of a Tiny animal, such as a cat, insect, lizard, or rat. You can decide the specific type of animal (such as a rat or praying mantis), but this has no effect on the form's Size or statistics. While in this form, you gain the animal trait and you can't make Strikes. You can Dismiss the spell.

You gain the following statistics and abilities:

  • AC = 15 + your level. Ignore your armor's check penalty and Speed reduction.
  • Speed 20 feet.
  • Weakness 5 to physical damage. (If you take physical damage in this form, you take 5 additional damage.)
  • Low-light vision and imprecise scent 30 feet.
  • Acrobatics and Stealth modifiers of +10, unless your own modifier is higher; Athletics modifier -4.

Heightened (4th) You can turn into a flying creature, such as a bird, which grants you a fly Speed of 20 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ydsLEGjY89Akc4oZ]{Spell Effect: Pest Form}

Pocket Library.name: 袖珍图书馆 Pocket Library
Pocket Library.description:
你从世界各地的图书馆收集有关某个特定主题的信息，并将其储存在一个异次元图书馆中。当你施放此法术时，选择任意一个你至少受训、且具有回忆知识动作的技能。

在此法术的持续时间内，当你使用所选技能尝试进行回忆知识检定时，你可以从异次元图书馆中唤出一册典籍。这是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须空出一只手来这么做。典籍出现在你手中，并翻到合适的页面。这使你在该回忆知识检定上获得+1状态加值。若你在该检定上掷出大失败，则改为失败。若掷骰成功且主题是生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。一旦你从你的口袋图书馆中查阅过一本书，法术结束。

升阶（3环） 状态加值提升至+2，且在法术结束前你可以查阅你的口袋图书馆两次。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升至+3，且在法术结束前你可以查阅你的口袋图书馆三次。

升阶（9环） 状态加值提升至+4，且在法术结束前你可以查阅你的口袋图书馆四次。

获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9ZIP6gWSp9OTEu8i]{法术效果：口袋图书馆}

You collect information from the world's libraries about a particular subject and store it in an extradimensional library. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you are at least trained that has the Recall Knowledge action.

During the duration of this spell, you can call forth a tome from the extradimensional library when attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must have a hand free to do so. The tome appears in your hand, open to an appropriate page. This grants you a +1 status bonus on the Recall Knowledge check. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the roll is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference a book from your pocket library, the spell ends.

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2 and you can reference your pocket library twice before the spell ends.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3 you can reference your pocket library three times before the spell ends.

Heightened (9th) The status bonus increases to +4 and you can reference your pocket library four times before the spell ends.

Grants @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9ZIP6gWSp9OTEu8i]{Spell Effect: Pocket Library}

Comprehend Language.name: 通晓语言 Comprehend Language
Comprehend Language.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解其正在听到或阅读的一种单一语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解的语言；否则，随机选择一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Darkness.name: 黑暗 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一层黑暗帷幕，阻止光线在该区域内穿透或发出。光线不会进入该区域，且任何非魔法光源（例如火把或提灯）在区域内都不会发出任何光，即使它们的光照半径本会延伸到黑暗之外亦然。这也会压制你该黑暗术等级或更低等级的魔法光亮术。光线无法穿过，因此区域内的生物无法看见外面。从外部看，它呈现为一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

升阶（4环） 即使具有黑暗视觉（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）的生物，也只能勉强透过黑暗看见。他们将透过黑暗所见的目标视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area. Light does not enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, do not emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the darkness. This also suppresses magical light of your darkness spell's level or lower. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside. From outside, it appears as a globe of pure darkness.

Heightened (4th) Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试一次对抗目标的反制检定。如果你成功反制了一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造出一个大型或更小体型生物的虚假影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且接触起来也令人信服。如果你与该影像之间的距离曾经超过500英尺，法术结束。

该影像不能说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，法术会在适当情况下伪装你的声音。由GM决定，你可能需要尝试一次欺骗或表演检定来模仿该生物。若你试图模仿某个特定的人并与认识那个人的人互动，这尤其可能发生。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合可以使用2个动作，这些动作在你维持法术时由它使用。它的攻击检定使用你的法术攻击掷骰，它的AC使用你的法术DC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够“实体”，可以与其他生物形成夹击。如果该影像被一次攻击命中或豁免失败，法术结束。

该幻象可以通过让目标相信幻象的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外它无法直接影响物理世界。若该虚假生物以一次打击命中，目标受到等于1d4加上你的施法关键能力调整值的精神伤害。这是精神效果。该幻象的打击为非致命。若伤害与怪物影像不相符——例如，一个虚假的大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立即进行一次察觉检定来识破该法术。任何相关的抗力与弱点都会在目标认为它们适用时生效，由GM裁定。例如，若幻象挥舞一把+1 战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害具有抗力的生物，该生物将承受更少的精神伤害。然而，虚假伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他需要特定伤害类型的效果。GM应记录该幻象造成的虚假伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜寻动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻象。当一个生物识破该幻象时，它从先前因此受到的伤害中恢复一半（如果有），并且不再受到该幻象的任何进一步伤害。

升阶（+1） 该影像打击的伤害增加1d4，并且你可创造的生物最大体型提高一级（最大至超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Invisibility.name: 隐形术 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
目标被幻术所笼罩，变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，使其对他们改为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}状态。如果目标使用敌对动作，则法术在该敌对动作完成后结束。

强化（4环） 法术持续1分钟，但即使目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Knock.name: 敲击 Knock
Knock.description:
你使目标更容易被打开。敲击使任何试图用运动或巧手检定打开目标门、锁或容器的生物获得+4状态加值。你可以在施放敲击时作为施法的一部分尝试一次巧手检定来打开目标，并且即使你未受训也可以加入你的等级。

敲击反制@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock}。

You make the target easier to open. Knock grants a +4 status bonus to any creature that tries to open the target door, lock, or container with an Athletics or a Thievery check. You can attempt a Thievery check to open the target as part of casting knock, and you add your level even if you're untrained.

Knock counteracts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock}.

Shrink.name: 缩小 Shrink
Shrink.description:
你扭曲空间使一个生物变得更小。目标缩小并成为超小体型。其装备也会随之缩小，但如果被移除则会恢复到原本的体型。该生物的触及变为0英尺。该法术对超小生物没有效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.LXf1Cqi1zyo4DaLv]{法术效果：缩小}

升阶（6环） 该法术最多可以以10个生物为目标。

You warp space to make a creature smaller. The target shrinks to become Tiny in size. Its equipment shrinks with it but returns to its original size if removed. The creature's reach changes to 0 feet. This spell has no effect on a Tiny creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.LXf1Cqi1zyo4DaLv]{Spell Effect: Shrink}

Heightened (6th) The spell can target up to 10 creatures.

Glyph of Warding.name: 守卫刻文 Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description:
你通过将一个敌对法术束缚进一个符文来制作一个陷阱。在施放该法术时，你还要施放一个更低法术等级的法术以将其储存在刻文中。被储存的法术必须需要3个动作或更少即可施放，具有敌对效果，并以一个生物为目标或具有一个区域。你可以为刻文设定一个口令、一个触发，或两者皆有。任何移动、打开或触碰目标容器，或进入目标区域且未说出口令，或符合触发条件的生物，都会启动刻文，释放其中的有害法术。

一旦法术被储存在刻文中，刻文获得该法术的所有特征。如果被储存的法术以一个或多个生物为目标，它就以触发刻文的生物为目标。如果它具有一个区域，该区域以触发刻文的生物为中心。守卫刻文的持续时间在刻文被触发时结束。刻文被视为一个魔法陷阱，使用你的法术DC来进行察觉检定以发现它，以及巧手检定以解除它；这两项检定都要求尝试者受过训练才能成功。

你可以解消守卫刻文。你在同一时间最多能维持的守卫刻文数量等于你的施法能力调整值。

You craft a trap by binding a hostile spell into a symbol. While Casting this Spell, you also Cast a Spell of a lower spell level to store in the glyph. The stored spell must take 3 actions or fewer to cast, have a hostile effect, and target one creature or have an area. You can set a password, a trigger, or both for the glyph. Any creature that moves, opens, or touches the target container or enters the target area that doesn't speak the password or that matches the trigger activates the glyph, releasing the harmful spell within.

Once a spell is stored in the glyph, the glyph gains all the traits of that spell. If the stored spell targets one or more creatures, it targets the creature that set off the glyph. If it has an area, that area is centered on the creature that set off the glyph. Glyph of warding's duration ends when the glyph is triggered. The glyph counts as a magical trap, using your spell DC for both the Perception check to notice it and the Thievery check to disable it; both checks require the creature attempting them to be trained in order to succeed.

You can Dismiss glyph of warding. The maximum number of glyphs of warding you can have active at a time is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的力量。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将额外的动作用于打击和疾行动作。

升阶（7环） 你可以以最多6个生物为目标。

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

Invisibility Sphere.name: 隐形术球体 Invisibility Sphere
Invisibility Sphere.description:
你和所有目标都是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，但彼此之间除外，只要你们仍处于该法术的区域内。如果一个因该法术而隐形的生物离开该法术的区域，它会变得可见，并且即使它返回该法术的区域也仍保持可见。如果任何因该法术而隐形的生物使用了敌对动作，则该法术在敌对动作完成后结束。

在探索时，很容易缓慢地一起移动并保持隐形。然而在战斗中这不可行。一旦遭遇开始，生物保持隐形至多直到第一轮结束，此时该法术结束。

升阶（5环） 持续时间增加至1小时。

You and all targets are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} except to each other as long as you remain within the spell's area. If a creature made invisible by this spell leaves the spell's area, it becomes visible and remains so even if it returns to the spell's area. If any creature made invisible by this spell uses a hostile action, the spell ends after the hostile action is completed.

While exploring, it's easy to move together slowly and remain invisible. This is untenable in a battle, however. Once an encounter begins, creatures remain invisible until at most the end of the first round, at which point the spell ends.

Heightened (5th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Locate.name: 定位术 Locate
Locate.description:
你获知目标（如果你选择了某个特定的物体，比如“我母亲的剑”）或最近的目标（如果你选择了一类物体，比如“剑”）的方向。如果目标是某个特定的物体，你必须用自己的感官直接观察过它。如果是一类物体，你仍然需要对该类物体有准确的心理图像。如果你与目标之间有铅或流动的水，这个法术无法用定位术定位该物体。这意味着如果最近的那件物体被铅或流动的水阻隔，你可能会找到更远处的同类物体。

升阶（5环） 你可以以特定的生物或族裔为目标，而非物体，但你必须曾与想要作为目标的生物或族裔见过面或近距离见过。

You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords"). If the target is a specific object, you must have observed it directly with your own senses. If it's a type of object, you still need to have an accurate mental image of the type of object. If there's lead or running water between you and the target, this spell can't locate the object. This means you might find a type of object farther away if the nearest one is behind lead or running water.

Heightened (5th) You can target a specific creature or ancestry instead of an object, but you must have met or seen up close the creature or ancestry you want to target.

Secret Page.name: 秘密页面 Secret Page
Secret Page.description:
你将目标的文本改成完全不同的文本。如果该文本是一本法术书或一张卷轴，你可以将其改成显示一个你所知晓且不高于secret page等级的法术。替换后的法术不能被施放，也不能用于准备法术。你也可以将文本变形成你写过的或你拥有许可的其他文本。你可以指定一个密码，使触摸页面的生物能够在两种文本之间来回切换。你在施放该法术时必须选择替换文本以及密码（如果有）。

You change the target's text to different text entirely. If the text is a spellbook or a scroll, you can change it to show a spell you know of secret page's level or lower. The replacement spell cannot be cast or used to prepare a spell. You can also transform the text into some other text you have written or have access to. You can specify a password that allows a creature touching the page to change the text back and forth. You must choose the replacement text and the password, if any, when you Cast the Spell.

Shrink Item.name: 缩物术 Shrink Item
Shrink Item.description:
你将目标缩小到大约硬币大小。这会将其负载降低至可忽略不计。你可以解消该法术，并且如果你把该物体扔到坚固的表面上，该法术也会结束。该物体在恢复到正常体型的过程中不能用于攻击或造成伤害。如果法术结束时没有足够空间让该物体恢复到正常体型，则该法术的持续时间会继续，直到该物体处于一个足以容纳其正常体型的位置。

You shrink the target to roughly the size of a coin. This reduces it to negligible Bulk. You can Dismiss the spell, and the spell ends if you toss the object onto a solid surface. The object can't be used to attack or cause damage during the process of it returning to normal size. If there isn't room for the object to return to normal size when the spell ends, the spell's duration continues until the object is in a location large enough to accommodate its normal size.

Lightning Bolt.name: 闪电束 Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
一道闪电从你手中向外劈出，造成 4d12 电击伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

A bolt of lightning strikes outward from your hand, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮眼（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。该眼睛无法移动，但你可以从那个点以仿佛使用你正常的视觉感官那样向所有方向观察。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

Dimension Door.name: 次元门 Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description:
打开一扇绕过正常空间的门，你会立即将自己以及你穿戴和持有的任何物品从你当前的空间传送到你可见的射程内一处空旷的空间。若这会将另一名生物一同带来——即使你把它装在一个异次元容器里——该法术会失效。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至1英里。你不需要能够看见你的目的地，只要你过去曾去过那里，并且知道它相对你的位置与距离即可。你暂时免疫1小时。

Opening a door that bypasses normal space, you instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to a clear space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you-even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container-the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
目标可以在空中翱翔，获得等同于其速度或20英尺的飞行速度，以较高者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{法术效果：飞行}

升阶（7环） 持续时间增加至1小时。

The target can soar through the air, gaining a fly Speed equal to its Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{Spell Effect: Fly}

Heightened (7th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你会排斥那些会妨碍生物或使其移动减缓的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标无视那些会使其速度获得环境减值的效果。当其尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}一个令其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果时，其自动成功，除非该效果是魔法且等级高于行动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Veil.name: 隐匿之纱 Veil
Veil.description:
你将这些目标伪装成其他具有相同体型且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。该伪装可以躲藏目标的身份，或让他们看起来像是其他族裔，但其精确度不足以冒充特定个体。该法术不会改变声音、气味或举止。你为每个目标选择伪装；例如，你可以让一个目标看起来像矮人，另一个看起来像精灵。施放隐匿之纱在“冒充（Impersonate）”动作的用途上视为建立伪装。它允许目标无视因伪装成不同类生物而可能承受的任何环境减值，并使目标在进行欺瞒检定以防止他人看穿其伪装时获得+4状态加值，且即使未受训也能加入其等级。你可以解消任意一个或全部这些伪装。

强化（5环） 该法术也会伪装目标的声音与气味；它获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

强化（7环） 目标可以看起来像任意与其相同体型的生物，甚至是特定个体。你必须见过某个个体才能复现其外貌。该法术也会伪装目标的声音与气味；它获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

You disguise the targets as other creatures of the same body shape and roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds). The disguise can hide the targets' identities or let them appear to be of another ancestry, but it's not precise enough to impersonate specific individuals. The spell doesn't change voice, scent, or mannerisms. You choose the disguise for each target; for example, you could make one target appear to be a dwarf and another an elf. Casting veil counts as setting up a disguise for the purpose of the Impersonate action. It allows the target to ignore any circumstance penalties they might take for being disguised as dissimilar creatures, and it gives the targets a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through their disguises, and add their level even if untrained. You can Dismiss any or all of these disguises.

Heightened (5th) The spell also disguises the targets' voices and scents; it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (7th) The targets can appear as any creature of the same size, even specific individuals. You must have seen an individual to reproduce their appearance. The spell also disguises the targets' voices and scents; it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Chromatic Ray.name: 虹彩射线 Chromatic Ray
Chromatic Ray.description:
你向敌人射出一道彩色光线，随着光线的颜色不同产生不同的魔法效果。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若命中，掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} 以确定你施放的是哪一道光束。若该光线造成伤害，则在大成功或大失败命中时该伤害加倍。任何适用于某道光线的额外特征都会在颜色名称之后、括号中列出。

  1. 红色（火焰）该光线对目标造成 [[/r 30[fire]]] 伤害。
  2. 橙色（酸液）该光线对目标造成 [[/r 40[acid]]] 伤害。
  3. 黄色（电击）该光线对目标造成 [[/r 50[electricity]]] 伤害。
  4. 绿色（毒素）该光线对目标造成 [[/r 25[poison]]] 伤害，且目标必须成功通过一次强韧豁免，否则获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} 持续1分钟（大成功或大失败：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}）。

升阶（6环） [[/r 40[fire]]]{红色}、[[/r 50[acid]]]{橙色}、[[/r 60[electricity]]]{黄色}与[[/r 35[poison]]]{绿色}的伤害各增加10。掷骰 [[/r 1d8]]{1d8} 以决定光线的颜色，使用上文1–4的结果，以及下文5–8的结果。

  1. 蓝色该光线具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Flesh to Stone}法术的效果。在大成功或大失败命中时，只要目标仍因flesh to stone效果而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}，目标就会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}。
  2. 靛色（情绪，失能，精神）该光线具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{困惑术}法术的效果。在大成功或大失败命中时，改为具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{心灵扭曲}的效果。
  3. 紫色目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} 持续1分钟。它还必须成功通过一次意志豁免，否则将被传送至远离你、直线距离120尺的位置（若那里没有足够空间使其出现，则其出现在最近的空旷空间）；这是一种传送效果。
  4. 强烈色彩目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 直到你下个回合结束；若你的攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败命中，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}。再次掷骰并叠加另一种颜色的效果（若掷出8则重掷）。

You send out a ray of colored light streaming toward your enemy, with a magical effect depending on the ray's color. Make a spell attack roll. If you hit, roll [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} to see which beam you cast. If the ray deals damage, that damage is doubled on a critical hit. Any additional traits that apply to a ray are listed in parentheses just after the name of the color.

  1. Red (fire) The ray deals [[/r 30[fire]]] damage to the target.
  2. Orange (acid) The ray deals [[/r 40[acid]]] damage to the target.
  3. Yellow (electricity) The ray deals [[/r 50[electricity]]] damage to the target.
  4. Green (poison) The ray deals [[/r 25[poison]]] damage to the target, and the target must succeed at a Fortitude save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} on a critical failure).

Heightened (6th) The damage for [[/r 40[fire]]]{Red}, [[/r 50[acid]]]{Orange}, [[/r 60[electricity]]]{Yellow}, and [[/r 35[poison]]]{Green} each increase by 10. Roll [[/r 1d8]]{1d8} to determine the ray's color, using the results for 1-4 above and the results for 5-8 below.

  1. Blue The ray has the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Flesh to Stone} spell. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} as long as it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} by the flesh to stone effect.
  2. Indigo (emotion, incapacitation, mental) The ray has the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} spell. On a critical hit, it has the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} instead.
  3. Violet The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} for 1 minute. It must also succeed at a will save or be teleported 120 feet directly away from you (if there isn't room for it to appear there, it appears in the nearest open space); this is a teleportation effect.
  4. Intense Color The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if your attack roll was a critical hit. Roll again and add the effects of another color (rerolling results of 8).

Wall of Fire.name: 火墙 Wall of Fire
Wall of Fire.description:
你升起一道炽焰之墙，灼烧穿过它的生物。你创造一道5英尺厚的火焰墙，其形态为：一条最长60英尺、10英尺高的直线；或一圈同样高度、半径10英尺、厚度5英尺的火焰环。墙在两种形态下都垂直矗立；若你愿意，墙可以更短或更矮。墙两侧的所有事物，对于位于对侧的生物而言，均处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。任何穿过墙的生物，或在其回合开始时占据墙之区域的生物，受到4d6点火焰伤害。

强化（+1） 火焰伤害增加1d6。

You raise a blazing wall that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of flame in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of flame with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 1d6.

Approximate.name: 近似 Approximate
Approximate.description:
区域 1立方英尺

你的魔法迅速流过一个区域，帮助你计数并编目。说出你在该区域内要寻找的某一种特定类型的物体。你会立刻估算出在目标区域内清晰可见的所选物体的数量。该数字会四舍五入到最高位。例如，你可以看着一堆180枚铜钱币，而你会得知其中大约有200枚钱币，但你无法确定确切是180枚钱币。

你说出的物体类型可以随你所愿地具体或笼统——“有凹痕的铜钱币”和“钱币”一样可行——但其区分特征必须一眼就能看出来，并且该法术会自动被伪装成其他物体的物体所欺骗。例如，该法术会将镀金的铜钱币登记为金币，而不是铜钱币

Area 1 cubic foot

Your magic quickly flows over an area to help you count and catalog. Name a particular type of object you are looking for within the area. You gain an instant estimate of the quantity of the chosen objects that are clearly visible within the target area. The number is rounded to the largest digit. For example, you could look at a pile of 180 copper coins, and you would learn that it held about 200 coins, but you couldn't determine there were exactly 180 coins.

The type of object you name can be as specific or general as you like-"dented copper coins" is as viable as "coins"-but the distinguishing features must be obvious at a glance, and the spell is automatically fooled by objects disguised as other objects. For instance, the spell would register copper coins plated in gold as gold coins, not copper coins

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，登记魔法的存在。除了魔法的存在与否之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及正在持续的法术。你只有在该幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形术药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你也能锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小至一个5英尺立方体以内（若目标大于该范围，则为最接近的区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Figment.name: 拟像 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造一个简单的幻觉声音或影像。声音会为该法术添加听觉（特征），且声音不能包含可辨识的词语或复杂的音乐。影像会添加视觉（特征），其尺寸不得大于一个 5 尺立方体，并且若在 15 尺内观看，会明显粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你可以用该幻觉尝试进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造分心}，使你的欺瞒检定获得 +2 环境加值。若该尝试对某个生物失败，则该生物识破该幻象。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：幻象}

You create a simple illusory sound or vision. A sound adds the auditory trait to the spell and the sound can't include intelligible words or elaborate music. A vision adds the visual trait, can be no larger than a 5-foot cube, and is clearly crude and undetailed if viewed from within 15 feet. When you Cast or Sustain the Spell, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} with the illusion, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your Deception check. If the attempt fails against a creature, that creature disbelieves the figment.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{Spell Effect: Figment}

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你轻声动唇，但这些词语不会从你口中传出，而是直接传递到目标的耳中。其他人听到你的话并不会比你正常动唇时更清楚，但目标能听见你的话，就像他们正站在你身旁一样。目标可以用反应动作（）给出简短回应，或者如果他们愿意，也可以在他们下个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且处于射程内才能这么做。若他们回应，他们的回应会像原本的传讯术一样，直接传到你的耳中。

高度强化（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you. The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Phase Bolt.name: 相位闪电 Phase Bolt
Phase Bolt.description:
你伸出手指，投射出一道魔法能量箭矢，在抵达目标前不断在位相间断续闪烁。对你的目标AC进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰；若目标的AC具有任何环境加值（例如来自护盾术或掩蔽），则将该加值对本次攻击减少2。成功时，你造成3d4穿刺伤害。大成功时，目标承受双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 该箭矢的伤害增加1d4。

You point your finger and project a bolt of magical energy that stutters in and out of phase until it reaches the target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against your target's AC; if the target has any circumstance bonuses to AC (such as from a shield or cover), reduce that bonus by 2 for this attack. On a success, you deal 3d4 piercing damage. On a critical success, the target takes double damage.

Heightened (+1) The bolt's damage increases by 1d4.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法听从你的指挥。只要你维持法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 使1磅的非生物材料变凉、变暖或调味。
  • 举起 缓慢地 将一个无人持用、负载为轻或更低的物体抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法器，也不能作为法术的消耗或成本。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一个负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体造成的任何实际改变（超出以上所述者）只会在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the spell. Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or locus or cost for a spell.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the spell.

Time Sense.name: 时代感知 Time Sense
Time Sense.description:
当你施放该法术时，你获得完美的时间感。你可以确切得知当前是什么时间，精确到秒。你也可以改为获得对日历的完美感知（若你在该区域有所知识）——如果你受训于自然，你可以确切得知距离日出还有多久，以及距离下一个至日还有多少天。若你受训于天文学传说，你可以精确得知任何已知且可预测的天文合相何时开始与结束，诸如此类。

在你施放time sense的同一回合中，你可以对一次需要极其精确计时的攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免检定或技能检定获得+1状态加值。若你选择获得此加值，你在1小时内无法再次获得它。

When you Cast the Spell, you gain a perfect sense of time. You can learn exactly what time it is, down to the second. You can instead choose to gain a perfect sense of the calendar if you have knowledge in that area-if you're trained in Nature, you can learn exactly how long it is until sunrise and how many days until the next solstice. If you're trained in Astronomy Lore, you can learn precisely when any known predictable astronomical conjunction will begin and end, and so on.

You can gain a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check you take on the same turn you cast time sense that requires extremely precise timing. If you choose to gain this bonus, you can't gain it again for 1 hour.

Distracting Chatter.name: 分心絮语 Distracting Chatter
Distracting Chatter.description:
你用分散注意力的听觉幻象轰击一个目标，用重叠的言语、低语、尖叫与喃喃自语所构成的混乱喧嚣包围对方。目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，进行纯听觉的察觉检定时承受-2状态减值，并且必须在使用听觉能力或言语法术成分时于 @Check[type:flat|dc:5] 中成功。类似地，试图以听觉效果影响该目标的生物也必须在 @Check[type:flat|dc:5] 中成功，否则该次尝试失败。持续时间取决于目标的意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 持续时间为1轮。

失败 持续时间为3轮。

大失败 持续时间为1分钟。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You bombard a target with distracting auditory illusions, surrounding them with a tumultuous cacophony of overlapping speech, whispers, screams, and muttering. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, takes a -2 status penalty to purely auditory Perception checks, and must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] to use auditory abilities or verbal spell components. Similarly, a creature who attempts to affect the target with an auditory effect must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] or the attempt fails. The duration depends on the target's Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The duration is 1 round.

Failure The duration is 3 rounds.

Critical Failure The duration is 1 minute.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to five creatures.

Warrior's Regret.name: 战士之悔 Warrior's Regret
Warrior's Regret.description:
悔恨啃噬着目标的心智，因其暴力而惩罚它，直到它停止敌意。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败中的大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 在其下一回合结束时，目标每对在该回合中被其故意造成过伤害的不同生物承受 1d8 伤害（若其伤害了 1 个生物则为 1d8，若其伤害了 2 个不同生物则为 2d8，依此类推）。若其伤害了 4 个不同生物，则最大为 4d8。

失败 如成功，但诅咒会在目标每个回合结束时对其造成伤害，并持续直到目标花费完整一轮未故意对另一个生物造成伤害。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 如成功，但诅咒会在目标每个回合结束时对其造成伤害，并持续直到目标花费 24 小时为其所认为的罪孽赎罪。

升阶（+2） 目标在该回合中每对其造成伤害的每个生物所承受的心灵伤害量增加 1d8，且目标每回合可承受的最大伤害增加 4d8。

Regret eats away at the target's mind, punishing it for its violence until it ceases its hostility. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success At the end of its next turn, the target takes 1d8 damage per different creature it intentionally damaged on that turn (1d8 if it damaged one creature, 2d8 if it damaged two different creatures, and so on). The maximum is 4d8 if it damaged 4 different creatures.

Failure As success, except the curse damages the target at the end of each of its turns and lasts until the target spends a complete round without intentionally damaging another creature.

Critical Failure As success, except the curse damages the target at the end of each of its turns and lasts until the target spends 24 hours atoning for its perceived sins.

Heightened (+2) The amount of mental damage the target takes for each creature it damaged that turn increases by 1d8, and the maximum damage the target can take per turn increases by 4d8.

Splinter Volley.name: 碎片齐射 Splinter Volley
Splinter Volley.description:
你向敌人发射一阵碎片齐射。对单一生物进行一次法术攻击掷骰。命中时，碎片造成4d6穿刺伤害。碎片在大成功或大失败命中时造成双倍伤害，并造成[[/r (floor(@item.level/2))[bleed]]]伤害。你可以在施放此法术时花费第3个动作，使你向两个不同的目标而非一个发射碎片。这些攻击各自都会增加你的多重攻击减值，但在你为碎片齐射进行完两次法术攻击掷骰之前，你不会增加你的多重攻击减值。

升阶（+2） 将对每个目标造成的伤害提高4d6，并将持续流血伤害提高1。

You launch a volley of splinters at your foes. Make a spell attack roll against a single creature. On a hit, the splinters deal 4d6 piercing damage. The splinters deal double damage on a critical hit and [[/r (floor(@item.level/2))[bleed]]] damage. You can spend a third action while casting this spell to fire splinters at two different targets instead of one. These attacks each increase your multiple attack penalty, but you don't increase your multiple attack penalty until after you make both spell attack rolls for splinter volley.

Heightened (+2) Increase the damage dealt to each target by 4d6 and the persistent bleed damage by 1.

Replicate.name: 复制 Replicate
Replicate.description:
你创造一个虚幻的魔法分身，在外表和行为上都与目标非常相似。该分身仅限于移动、交互、说出简短句子以及其他类似的基础任务。它无法施放法术、攻击或使用任何复杂的技能。

该虚幻复制体是你的仆从。你可以在维持法术的一部分来对分身下达新的命令。只要法术持续，且分身在你1英里范围内，你就可以以心灵感应对复制体下达命令。你可以用一个单动作在使用你自己的感官与复制体的感官之间切换，该单动作具有专注（特征）。虚幻复制体拥有与原本生物相同的属性数据，但它不具有原本的任何物品加值，并且它的生命值只有原本的四分之一。若分身的生命值降至0，则法术结束。

升阶（+1） 目标的最高等级提高2。

You create an illusory magical double that physically looks and behaves very similarly to the target. This double is limited to moving, Interacting, speaking short sentences, and other similar basic tasks. It is unable to cast spells, attack, or use any complex skills.

The illusory duplicate is your minion. You can issue new commands to the double as part of Sustaining the Spell. You can command the duplicate telepathically as long as the spell lasts, provided it's within 1 mile of you. You can switch between using your own senses and the duplicate's senses with a single action, which has the concentrate trait. The illusory duplicate has the same statistics as the original creature, except it doesn't have any of the original's item bonuses, and it has one quarter of the original's Hit Points. If the double's Hit Points are reduced to 0, the spell ends.

Heightened (+1) The maximum level of the target increases by 2.

Creation.name: 创造 Creation
Creation.description:
你从魔法能量中召唤出一个临时的物体。它必须由土或植物衍生的物质构成（例如木材、纸张、砖块或石头），并且体积不超过5立方英尺。它不能依赖精细的工艺或复杂的可动部件，绝不会满足成本或类似要求，也不能由贵重材料或稀有度为罕见或更高的材料制成。它显然是临时召唤出来的，因此不能被出售或冒充为真正的物品。该法术获得与所创造物品相符的适当特征，通常为土、植物或木头。

升阶（5环） 该物品为金属，并且可以包含常见矿物，例如长石或石英。若用于创造金属物体，则该法术获得金（特征）

You conjure a temporary object from magical energy. It must consist of earthen or plant-derived matter (such as wood, paper, brick, or stone) and be 5 cubic feet or smaller. It can't rely on intricate artistry or complex moving parts, never fulfills a cost or the like, and can't be made of precious materials or materials with a rarity of uncommon or higher. It is obviously temporarily conjured, and thus can't be sold or passed off as a genuine item. The spell gains the appropriate trait for the item created, typically earth, plant, or wood.

Heightened (5th) The item is metal and can include common minerals, like feldspar or quartz. The spell gains the metal trait if used to create a metal object

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵聆听，就如同使用你正常的听觉感官一样。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Kairo Cryde.publicNotes:
艾米丽是一名法师，她使用符箓来施放她的法术，也就是写有符号的纸条。如果你不想学习符箓规则，只需将她的施法风格描述为使用这些纸张即可。这基本上就像从卷轴施放一样，但不需要言语成分。她还有一只名叫卡利斯托的书法龙魔宠，它经常以一支金色的钢笔形态出现。

Emily is a wizard who casts her spells using fulus, or strips of paper with symbols written upon them. If you don’t want to learn the fulu rules, simply flavor her spellcasting as using these papers. It’s pretty much like casting from scrolls, but without the need for verbal components. She also has a calligraphy wyrm familiar named Callisto, who often takes the form of a golden fountain pen.

Aesephna Menhemes, The Huntress.name: 牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯，女猎手 Aesephna Menhemes, The Huntress

Erastil's Blessings.name: 埃拉斯蒂尔的祝福 Erastil's Blessings
Erastil's Blessings.description:
被动。每位英雄可以选择其一把武器，使其在本次战斗中获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{神圣}武器属性符文的效果。即使该武器已经达到其属性符文数量上限，此效果依然生效，但不会与既有的神圣符文叠加。

Passive. Each hero may select one of their weapons to gain the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{Holy} weapon property rune for this battle. This works even if the weapon is already at its maximum number of property runes, but does not stack with pre-existing Holy runes.

Effect: The Huntress' Blessing.name: 效果：女猎手的祝福 Effect: The Huntress' Blessing
Effect: The Huntress' Blessing.description:
由埃斯菲娜·门赫梅斯的灵魂授予

被动。每位英雄可以选择其一把武器，使其在本场战斗中获得神圣武器属性符文的效果。即使该武器已达到其属性符文的最大数量，此项仍然生效，但不会与既有的神圣符文叠加。

主动——我们的瞄准无比精准。 A 如同法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}

Granted by Aesphena Menhemes' Spirit

Passive. Each hero may select one of their weapons to gain the effects of the Holy weapon property rune for this battle. This works even if the weapon is already at its maximum number of property runes, but does not stack with pre-existing Holy runes.

Active—Our Aim is True. A as the spell @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}

Our Aim is True.name: 我们的目标必然命中 Our Aim is True
Our Aim is True.description:
由 @UUID[Item.OJyUU0FDLbLPpaVW]{效果：女猎手的祝福} 赋予

如同法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{真实目标}

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{真实目标}

Granted by @UUID[Item.OJyUU0FDLbLPpaVW]{Effect: The Huntress' Blessing}

As the spell @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}

[Roseguard] Activation Available.name: [玫瑰团] 启动可用 [Roseguard] Activation Available
[Roseguard] Activation Available.description:
切换此项以切换显示其启用可用的效果

Toggle this to toggle the effect that show their activation is available

Vol Rajani, The Rose Knight.name: 沃尔·拉贾尼，玫瑰骑士 Vol Rajani, The Rose Knight
Vol Rajani, The Rose Knight.tokenName: 玫瑰骑士 The Rose Knight

Effect: The Rose Knight's Blessing.name: 效果：蔷薇骑士的祝福 Effect: The Rose Knight's Blessing
Effect: The Rose Knight's Blessing.description:
由沃尔·拉贾尼的灵魂授予

被动。获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.KAVf7AmRnbCAHrkT]{Reactive Strike}

主动——荆棘的不屈。 R @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uGXWkR2h8q9MRzEM]{Heroic Defiance}，如同守护者专注法术，但作为反应动作（）

Granted by Vol Rajani's Spirit

Passive. Grant @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.KAVf7AmRnbCAHrkT]{Reactive Strike}

Active—Thorn's Defiance. R @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uGXWkR2h8q9MRzEM]{Heroic Defiance}, as the champion focus spell, except as a reaction

Reactive Strike.name: 反应打击 Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
触发 一个位于你触及范围内的生物使用一个操作动作或移动动作，进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你猛击一个露出破绽的敌人。对触发生物进行一次近战打击。若你的攻击为大成功且触发为操作动作，你就会扰乱该动作。此打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此打击。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You lash out at a foe that leaves an opening. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If your attack is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光虚弱 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
处于阳光下时，缚灵将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 2}状态。

While in sunlight, a wraith is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}.

Grip of Fear.name: 恐惧术之握 Grip of Fear
Grip of Fear.description:
缚灵将手探入相邻生物的胸膛，紧握其心脏。目标受到 @Damage[6d6[mental]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[will|dc:24|basic] 意志 豁免。若大失败，该生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 直到缚灵下一回合开始。

The wraith reaches into an adjacent creature's chest, gripping their heart. The target takes @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage with a @Check[will|dc:24|basic] save. On a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} until the start of the wraith's next turn.

Robes of Welcome.name: 欢迎长袍 Robes of Welcome
Robes of Welcome.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 缚灵用长袍裹住一个相邻的活体生物，使其暴露于虚空的拥抱之中。若任意生物被缚灵的虚空的拥抱所诅咒，则缚灵无法将虚空的拥抱施加于另一个生物。

Frequency once per round

Effect The wraith wraps its robes around an adjacent living creature, exposing it to void's embrace. If any creature is cursed by the wraith's void's embrace, the wraith can't impose void's embrace on another creature.

Void's Embrace.name: 虚空的拥抱 Void's Embrace
Void's Embrace.description:
如果受害者在日光下成功通过针对此诅咒的豁免检定，则诅咒结束。当你受此诅咒影响时，你会无视诅咒你的缚灵的抗力；

豁免检定 @Check[will|dc:24]

阶段 1 受害者在任何光照下均为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}（1小时）

阶段 2 受害者获得生命感知30尺，但在任何光照下均为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}（1小时）

阶段 3 同阶段2，但该生物还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.TTCw5NusiSSkJU1x]{虚空治疗}（1小时）

阶段 4 受害者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 且无法醒来（1天）

阶段 5 该生物死亡并成为一只缚灵，其躯体崩解为灰烬

If the victim succeeds at a saving throw against this curse while in sunlight, the curse ends. While you have this curse, you bypass the resistance of the wraith that cursed you;

Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:24]

Stage 1 the victim is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} in any light (1 hour)

Stage 2 the victim gains lifesense 30 feet but is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} in any light (1 hour)

Stage 3 as stage 2, but the creature also has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.TTCw5NusiSSkJU1x]{Void Healing} (1 hour)

Stage 4 the victim becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and can't awaken (1 day)

Stage 5 the creature dies and becomes a wraith, its body crumbling to ash

Agonizing Despair (At Will).name: 哀悔摧心（随意） Agonizing Despair (At Will)
Agonizing Despair (At Will).description:
你的目标的心智坠入一口深邃的恐惧之井，过于专注于根深蒂固的恐惧术，以至于痛苦不堪。目标进行一次意志豁免，并承受 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标承受全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标承受双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

高度化（+1） 将伤害提高 @Damage[2d6[mental]]。

Your target's mind tumbles down a deep well of dread, dwelling so intently on deep-seated fears that it's painful. The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage with a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by @Damage[2d6[mental]].

Despair.name: 绝望灵光 Despair
Despair.description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{绝望灵光}的效果
你对区域内的生物施加绝望。每个生物的效果由其 @Check[will|dc:26|traits:emotion,mental] 豁免决定。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 持续1轮，该生物不能使用反应动作（）且必须在其回合开始时再尝试一次豁免；若失败，则该回合中其为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，因为其无法控制地抽泣。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为1分钟。

大成功或大失败 同失败，且该生物自动为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

Is the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{Wave of Despair}
You inflict despair on creatures in the area. The effects for each creature are determined by its @Check[will|dc:26|traits:emotion,mental] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success For 1 round, the creature can't use reactions and must attempt another save at the start of its turn; on a failure, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn as it sobs uncontrollably.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute.

Aesphena's Wrath (Lvl 6).publicNotes:
缚灵是恶毒的不死生物，会汲取生命并躲避光亮术。它们阴影般的形体披覆着无形的长袍，仿佛官职的徽记；长袍上点缀着窥视的眼睛，映照出它们对生者的裁断。缚灵可能由污秽的魔法造就，或因直接暴露于虚空而诞生，但更多时候，它们源自规模惨烈的死亡。当悲剧之巨，连现实都不忍目睹时，虚空的短暂显现便会在一群黑暗中留下无数缚灵。缚灵的存在充满空无与匮乏，它们渴望将他人也召向同样的空无——这正是虚空的写照。

缚灵能在任何能安全与生者接触的地点游荡，寻找那些值得成为新缚灵之人，并处理掉其余的人；然而它们对日光的脆弱使其受限于世界的阴影之处——在那里，它们能与黑暗环境无缝融为一体，然后悄然吞没猎物。缚灵对“谁值得”的看法各不相同，但它们通常会挑选那些本就更接近虚空的人：或因形而上的联系，或因目睹无数死亡而受其浸染。以此方式诞生的新缚灵会携带这些性相，而其余人格则会在暴露于虚空后被扭曲或剥蚀殆尽。

缚灵会在死亡与暴行司空见惯之地与同类聚集——被战争蹂躏的乡野、由犯罪霸主把持的大都会地下世界，或恶魔仪式的场所。在这些地方，生者最好待在光亮术之中。缚灵足够聪明，会在战斗中利用自身的无形特性，因此它们偏好曲折的洞窟或带有走廊的建筑，并避开开阔区域。

Wraiths are malevolent undead who drain life and shun light. Their shadowy forms are covered by insubstantial robes that they wear like a badge of office and marked with peering eyes that reflect their judgment of the living. A wraith can be created by foul magic or direct exposure to the Void, but more often they are the result of death on a tragic scale. When a tragedy is too great for even reality to witness, a temporary manifestation of the Void can leave behind countless wraiths in a horde of darkness. A wraith's existence is one of emptiness and need, with a desire to call others to the same emptiness exemplified by the Void.

Wraiths can haunt any location where they can safely interact with the living, looking for those worthy to become new wraiths and disposing of the rest, though their vulnerability to sunlight confines them to the shadowy places of the world—places where they can blend in seamlessly with their dark surroundings before silently engulfing their prey. Wraiths' opinions on who is worthy vary, but they typically choose those closest to the Void already, whether from a metaphysical connection or exposure to countless deaths. A new wraith created this way carries these aspects, with the rest of their personality warped or scoured away by exposure to the Void.

Wraiths gather with others of their kind in places where death and mayhem are commonplace—countrysides ravaged by war, metropolitan underworlds run by criminal overlords, or sites of fiendish rituals. In these places, the living do well to keep to the light. Wraiths are smart enough to take advantage of their incorporeality in combat, so they keep to tortuous caverns or structures with hallways, and avoid open areas.

Your target's mind tumbles down a deep well of dread, dwelling so intently on deep-seated fears that it's painful. The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage with a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by @Damage[2d6[mental]].

Despair.name: 绝望灵光 Despair
Despair.description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{Wave of Despair}的效果
你对区域内的生物施加绝望。每个生物的效果由其 @Check[will|dc:26|traits:emotion,mental] 豁免决定。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 持续1轮，该生物无法使用反应动作（），且必须在其回合开始时尝试另一次豁免；若失败，该生物在该回合中获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，因为它无法控制地抽泣。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为1分钟。

大失败 同失败，且该生物自动获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

Is the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{Wave of Despair}
You inflict despair on creatures in the area. The effects for each creature are determined by its @Check[will|dc:26|traits:emotion,mental] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success For 1 round, the creature can't use reactions and must attempt another save at the start of its turn; on a failure, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn as it sobs uncontrollably.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute.

Aesphena's Wrath (Lvl 7).publicNotes:
缚灵是恶毒的不死生物，会汲取生命并避开光亮术。它们朦胧的形体披覆着无实体的长袍，如同官职徽记；其上点缀着窥视的眼睛，映照出它们对生者的裁决。缚灵可能由邪秽魔法或直接暴露于虚空而诞生，但更多时候，它们源自悲剧规模的死亡。当一场悲剧大到连现实都无法目睹时，虚空的短暂显现会在黑暗的群潮中遗留无数缚灵。缚灵的存在充满空无与匮乏，并渴望将他者召入同样的空无——这份空无由虚空所彰显。

缚灵能在任何能安全与生者互动的地点徘徊，寻找那些足以成为新缚灵之人，并处理掉其余者；然而它们对阳光的脆弱使其受限于世界的阴影之处——在那儿，它们能与黑暗环境无缝融合，继而无声吞没猎物。缚灵对“何者有资格”的看法各不相同，但它们通常选择那些早已更接近虚空者，无论是因形而上的联系，还是因目睹过无数死亡。以这种方式诞生的新缚灵会携带这些性相，而其余人格则因暴露于虚空而扭曲或被彻底磨灭。

缚灵会在死亡与祸乱司空见惯之地与同类聚集——被战争蹂躏的乡野、由犯罪霸主掌控的大都会地下世界，或邪魔仪式的遗址。在这些地方，生者最好紧守于光亮术之中。缚灵聪明到足以在战斗中利用其无形体之利，因此它们会栖身于曲折的洞窟或有走廊的建筑结构中，并避开开阔区域。

Wraiths are malevolent undead who drain life and shun light. Their shadowy forms are covered by insubstantial robes that they wear like a badge of office and marked with peering eyes that reflect their judgment of the living. A wraith can be created by foul magic or direct exposure to the Void, but more often they are the result of death on a tragic scale. When a tragedy is too great for even reality to witness, a temporary manifestation of the Void can leave behind countless wraiths in a horde of darkness. A wraith's existence is one of emptiness and need, with a desire to call others to the same emptiness exemplified by the Void.

Wraiths can haunt any location where they can safely interact with the living, looking for those worthy to become new wraiths and disposing of the rest, though their vulnerability to sunlight confines them to the shadowy places of the world—places where they can blend in seamlessly with their dark surroundings before silently engulfing their prey. Wraiths' opinions on who is worthy vary, but they typically choose those closest to the Void already, whether from a metaphysical connection or exposure to countless deaths. A new wraith created this way carries these aspects, with the rest of their personality warped or scoured away by exposure to the Void.

Wraiths gather with others of their kind in places where death and mayhem are commonplace—countrysides ravaged by war, metropolitan underworlds run by criminal overlords, or sites of fiendish rituals. In these places, the living do well to keep to the light. Wraiths are smart enough to take advantage of their incorporeality in combat, so they keep to tortuous caverns or structures with hallways, and avoid open areas.
