+1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality.name: 对抗生命力的所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Draining Presence.name: 枯竭威压 Draining Presence
Draining Presence.description:
10英尺。进入该灵光的生物必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:26]豁免，否则会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 1}。在离开该灵光1分钟后恢复。该流失（状态）值可与汲取生命所造成的流失值叠加，但不能与多个汲取存在灵光叠加。

成功通过其豁免的生物在24小时内暂时免疫汲取存在。

10 feet. A creature entering the aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. It recovers after it has been out of the aura for 1 minute. This drained condition value is cumulative with the drained value caused by drain life, but not with multiple draining presence auras.

A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune to draining presence for 24 hours.

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光虚弱 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
惧栗缚灵在阳光下会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}。

A dread wraith caught in sunlight is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}.

Absorb Wraith.name: 吸收缚灵 Absorb Wraith
Absorb Wraith.description:
惧栗缚灵将手伸向100尺内的另一个缚灵生物。目标缚灵消散并以直线飞向惧栗缚灵，对直线上的每个生物造成 @Damage[6d10[void]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] 豁免）。

惧栗缚灵吸收目标缚灵的精粹，获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，并在等同于被吸收缚灵等级的若干轮内，其飞行速度获得+10尺状态加值。它只能用其额外动作进行飞行或打击。

不情愿的目标可以尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:28] 意志豁免以抵抗被吸收。

The dread wraith extends its hand toward another wraith creature within 100 feet. The target wraith dissolves and streaks toward the dread wraith in a straight line, dealing @Damage[6d10[void]] damage to each creature along the line (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] save).

The dread wraith absorbs the essence of the target wraith, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and gaining a +10-foot status bonus to its fly Speed for a number of rounds equal to the level of the absorbed wraith. It can use its extra action only to Fly or Strike.

An unwilling target can attempt a @Check[will|dc:28] save to resist being absorbed.

Drain Life.name: 汲取生命 Drain Life
Drain Life.description:
当惧栗缚灵以其幽魂之手打击对活体生物造成伤害时，缚灵获得[[/r 10 #Temporary Hit Points]]{10临时生命值}，且目标必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:28]豁免，否则将变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1（状态）}。此后缚灵造成的进一步伤害在豁免失败时会使流失（状态）的数值增加1，最高至流失 4（状态）。

When the dread wraith damages a living creature with its spectral hand Strike, the wraith gains [[/r 10 #Temporary Hit Points]]{10 temporary Hit Points} and the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. Further damage dealt by the wraith increases the drained condition value by 1 on a failed save, to a maximum of drained 4.

Wraith Spawn.name: 缚灵衍体 Wraith Spawn
Wraith Spawn.description:
被缚灵的幽魂之手打击（Strike）杀死的活体类人生物，会在[[/gmr 1d4 #Wraith Spawn Transformation]]{1d4 轮}后作为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Gu0cJHGwPd547OtC]{缚灵衍生体}再度崛起。该缚灵衍生体受杀死它的惧栗缚灵的命令。它不具有汲取生命或缚灵衍生体能力。若该缚灵衍生体的创造者死亡，缚灵衍生体将成为完全体且自主的缚灵；它重获自由意志，并获得汲取生命与缚灵衍生体能力。

A living humanoid slain by a wraith's spectral hand Strike rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Gu0cJHGwPd547OtC]{Wraith Spawn} after [[/gmr 1d4 #Wraith Spawn Transformation]]{1d4 rounds}. This wraith spawn is under the command of the dread wraith that killed it. It doesn't have drain life or wraith spawn. If the creator of the wraith spawn dies, the wraith spawn becomes a full-fledged, autonomous wraith; it regains its free will and gains drain life and wraith spawn.

Despair.name: 绝望灵光 Despair
Despair.description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{Wave of Despair}的效果
你对区域内的生物施加绝望。每个生物的效果由其@Check[will|dc:32|traits:emotion,mental]豁免决定。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 持续1轮，该生物无法使用反应动作（）并必须在其回合开始时再尝试一次豁免；若失败，该生物在该回合中为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，因为它无法控制地啜泣。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为1分钟。

大失败 同失败，且该生物在1分钟内自动为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。

Is the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{Wave of Despair}
You inflict despair on creatures in the area. The effects for each creature are determined by its @Check[will|dc:32|traits:emotion,mental] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success For 1 round, the creature can't use reactions and must attempt another save at the start of its turn; on a failure, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn as it sobs uncontrollably.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute.

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Agonizing Despair.name: 哀悔摧心 Agonizing Despair
Agonizing Despair.description:
你的目标的心智坠入一口深邃的恐惧之井，专注于根深蒂固的恐惧术到令人痛苦的程度。目标承受 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害，并进行一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受一半伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标承受全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标承受双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

升阶（+1） 将伤害提高 @Damage[2d6[mental]]。

Your target's mind tumbles down a deep well of dread, dwelling so intently on deep-seated fears that it's painful. The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage with a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by @Damage[2d6[mental]].

Aesphena's Wrath (Lvl 8).publicNotes:
这些凶险的灵体残骸源自邪恶军阀或嗜血将军，他们是高耸的幽魂，由幽影与死亡凝成。与其他缚灵一样，惧栗缚灵出没于世界的阴暗之处，但惧栗缚灵更可能进行长途旅行以播撒恐惧或积累影响力，穿越洒满阳光的土地时往往会依附于幽暗的林间空地或不祥的遗迹。惧栗缚灵往往傲慢，很少与同类结成群体，而更倾向于以支配术统御普通缚灵的群体。然而，格外强大的死灵法师可能会强迫成群的惧栗缚灵为其效劳；而某个特别恶毒的目标——例如铲除光亮术与生命的堡垒——也可能将数个惧栗缚灵吸引到一起，共同为同一目的行动。

These menacing spiritual remnants of wicked warlords or bloodthirsty generals are towering specters of shadow and death. Like other wraiths, dread wraiths haunt the shadowy places of the world, but dread wraiths are more likely to travel greater distances to sow terror or amass influence, often sticking to dark glades or sinister ruins when journeying across sun-dappled lands. Dread wraiths tends to be arrogant and rarely form a pack with others of their kind, preferring instead to dominate groups of ordinary wraiths. A particularly powerful necromancer might compel packs of dread wraiths into service, however, while a particularly malevolent goal-such as to eradicate a bastion of light and life-might draw several dread wraiths together in a common purpose.
Aesphena's Wrath (Lvl 8).allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. vitality
Aesphena's Wrath (Lvl 8).prototypeToken: 埃斯菲娜之怒 Aesphena's Wrath

Belcorra Haruvex (Upgraded).tokenName: 贝科拉·哈鲁维克斯 Belcorra Haruvex

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 神秘自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Sorcerer Bloodline Spells.name: 术士血脉法术 Sorcerer Bloodline Spells

Legend Lore.name: 通晓传奇 Legend Lore
Legend Lore.description:
你尝试了解与某个特定主题有关的有用传奇，该主题必须是一位重要的人物、地点或事物。如果主题在场，将你的主要技能检定的成功等级提高一级。如果在尝试该仪式之前你对主题只有模糊的信息，将你的主要技能检定的成功等级降低一级。如果你有一个在场的主题但几乎没有到底线信息，这些调整值会相互抵消。

大成功或大失败成功 在仪式结束后的1小时里，你背诵有关该主题的传奇、故事与传闻。这些信息大多连贯，较之那些随时代被夸大的内容，更强调更准确或更有用的传奇。

成功 在仪式结束后的1小时里，你背诵有关该主题的神秘传奇、故事与传闻。这些内容为进一步调查提供有用信息，但通常不完整或晦涩难解。正如传奇的本质，你很可能会了解到多个相互矛盾的版本。

失败 你未能学到任何有用的传奇。

大成功或大失败失败 你的心智迷失在过去之中。除执行如呼吸与睡眠等必要行为外，你在1周内无法感知或回应当前的任何事物。然而，当你回归时，你可以将你的一项技能重训为一项基于你不受控制地所见过去知识的传闻技能，就如同你花费了1周进行重训一般。

You attempt to learn useful legends about a particular subject, which must be an important person, place, or thing. If the subject is present, increase the degree of success of your primary skill check by one step. If you have only vague information about the subject before attempting the ritual, decrease the degree of success of your primary skill check by one step. These modifiers cancel each other out if you have a subject present with little to no baseline information.

Critical Success You recite legends, tales, and lore about the subject over the course of an hour after the ritual ends. The information is mostly coherent, emphasizing more accurate or useful legends over those exaggerated over time.

Success You recite mysterious legends, tales, and lore about the subject over the course of an hour after the ritual ends. These provide useful information for further inquiry but are generally incomplete or enigmatic. As is the nature of legends, you are likely to learn multiple contradictory versions.

Failure You fail to learn any useful legends.

Critical Failure Your mind becomes lost in the past. You can't sense or respond to anything in the present for 1 week except to perform necessities like breathing and sleeping. When you return, however, you can retrain one of your skills into a Lore based on the knowledge of the past you were uncontrollably viewing, as if you had spent 1 week retraining.

Teleportation Circle.name: 传送法阵 Teleportation Circle
Teleportation Circle.description:
你在地面上创造一个直径10英尺的圆环，它会作为通往一个在仪式进行时确定的目的地的传送门。你在仪式的一部分中指定传送的目的地。这个目的地无法更改。目的地必须是在1,000英里内且与传送法阵位于同一位面上的地点。你必须能够精确辨识该地点——既要能根据其相对于你创造传送法阵地点的位置来辨识，也要能根据目的地的外观（或其他可辨识特征）来辨识。目的地也必须是一个直径10英尺且不与任何坚固结构重叠的圆环，但它可以位于有害或危险的地方。

尝试为该仪式进行生存检定的次要施法者，可以位于目的地的精确地点，而不是与你一同待在起点。如果次要施法者在目的地的检定成功，且你掷骰为成功，则该仪式改为大成功或大失败中的大成功。

当圆环处于激活状态时，任何移动到完全处于圆环内的生物都会立即被传送到目的地。不愿被传送的生物可以尝试进行意志豁免以抵抗效果。如果它仍停留在圆环内，则该生物必须在其每个回合结束时再次尝试该豁免。

传送法阵通常只能单向通行，不过你可以将费用加倍，使传送能双向运作。

大成功或大失败中的大成功 你创造了传送法阵，且它极其精确，无论跨越的距离多远。旅行者会准确抵达指定地点。

成功 同大成功或大失败中的大成功，但传送法阵的目的地略有偏差，会偏离目标约等于行进距离的1%，最多偏离10英里。

失败 传送法阵无法运作。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 传送法阵严重失准。它会通向一个随机目的地，与起点的距离大致相同，并且发生其他异常事故的概率会大得多。

升阶（9环） 费用提高至2,000 gp，持续时间提高至1个月，且目的地可以是同一颗星球上的任何地点。

升阶（10环） 费用提高至10,000 gp，持续时间为无限，且目的地可以是同一颗星球上的任何地点。

You create a 10-foot-diameter circle on the ground, which acts as a portal to a destination determined at the time of the ritual. You designate the destination of the teleportation as part of the ritual. This destination can't be changed. The destination must be a location within 1,000 miles and be on the same plane as the teleportation circle. You must be able to identify the location precisely both by its position relative to the location where you create the teleportation circle and by the destination's appearance (or other identifying features). The destination must also be a 10-foot-diameter circle that doesn't overlap with any solid structures, but it can be a place that is harmful or dangerous.

A secondary caster attempting a Survival check for this ritual can be located at the exact site of the destination, instead of with you at the point of origin. If the secondary succeeds at their check at the destination and you roll a success, the ritual is a critical success instead.

While the circle is active, any creature that moves to be fully within the circle is instantly teleported to the destination. A creature that is unwilling to be teleported can attempt a Will save to resist the effect. If it remains in the circle, the creature must attempt this save again at the end of each of its turns.

The teleportation circle normally goes only in one direction, though you can double the Cost to make the teleportation work in both directions.

Critical Success You create the teleportation circle, and it's extremely precise, regardless of the distance traveled. Travelers arrive exactly at the designated point.

Success As a critical success, but the destination of the teleportation circle is slightly inaccurate, and is off target by roughly 1 percent of the distance traveled, to a maximum of 10 miles off target.

Failure The teleportation circle doesn't function.

Critical Failure The teleportation circle is wildly inaccurate. It leads to a random destination roughly the same distance from the origin point, and the chances of some other unusual mishap are much greater.

Heightened (9th) The cost increases to 2,000 gp, the duration increases to 1 month, and the destination can be anywhere on the same planet.

Heightened (10th) The cost increases to 10,000 gp, the duration is unlimited, and the destination can be anywhere on the same planet.

Feeblemind.name: 弱智术 Feeblemind
Feeblemind.description:
你会大幅削弱目标的心智能力。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。此诅咒的效果只能通过移除诅咒或其他以诅咒为目标的效果移除。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} 1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}，持续时间为无限。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标的智力被永久降低到低于动物的水平，并将其魅力、智力和感知调整值视为-5。它失去所有需要心智能力的职业能力，包括所有施法能力。如果目标是一名PC，则其变为由GM控制的NPC。

You drastically reduce the target's mental faculties. The target must attempt a Will save. The effects of this curse can be removed only through remove curse or another effect that targets curses.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} with an unlimited duration.

Critical Failure The target's intellect is permanently reduced below that of an animal, and it treats its Charisma, Intelligence, and Wisdom modifiers as -5. It loses all class abilities that require mental faculties, including all spellcasting. If the target is a PC, they become an NPC under the GM's control.

Phantasmal Calamity.name: 魅影灾祸 Phantasmal Calamity
Phantasmal Calamity.description:
末日般毁灭的幻象充斥区域内每个生物的心智。该幻象造成11d6精神伤害（基础意志豁免）。在大失败时，该生物还必须在一次反射豁免中成功，否则会相信自己被困住（卡在裂缝中、在海上漂流，或其他与其幻象相符的命运）。如果它第二次豁免失败，它还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned}，持续1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的意志豁免，并在成功时识破该幻觉并从震慑（状态）中恢复。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

A vision of apocalyptic destruction fills the mind of each creature in the area. The vision deals 11d6 mental damage (basic Will save). On a critical failure, the creature must also succeed at a Reflex save or believe it's trapped (stuck in a fissure, adrift at sea, or some other fate in keeping with its vision). If it fails the second save, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new Will save at the end of each of its turns, and on a success, it disbelieves the illusion and recovers from the Stunned condition.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Planar Binding.name: 异界誓缚 Planar Binding
Planar Binding.description:
你召唤出一名异界生物，其等级不高于异界誓缚仪式等级的两倍，并试图与其讨价还价。尝试进行制造检定的次要施法者会绘制一道守护图阵，以防该异界生物在讨价还价期间发动攻击或离开；若该施法者失败或大成功或大失败，则不会产生次要技能检定在失败或大成功或大失败时的通常效果，取而代之的是：异界生物可以选择发动攻击或离开，而非进行谈判。你也可以省略此步骤，从而无需进行制造检定，并得到相同结果（例如你正在召唤一名你信任的善良异界生物）。若你对其使用任何敌对动作，或守护图阵被破坏，该生物同样可以发动攻击或离开。图阵完成后，你与各次要施法者分别站到图阵边缘能量汇聚的特定位置。

你在守护之内召来该异界生物，并与其协商交易，通常是以报酬换取它为你执行一项任务。完全不愿谈判的生物可以尝试一次意志豁免，以留在其家乡位面。大多数善良与中立的异界生物认为自己有更重要的事要做，不会迎合凡人的突发奇想，并会要求一份可观的赋礼，尤其当你的任务包含显著风险时。邪恶的异界生物更可能以较低代价接受交易，只要这能让它们在物质位面大肆破坏，或在途中对世界施加邪恶。金钱价格通常从“一项短小简单任务所需、等同于该生物等级的消耗品物品成本”，到“说服该生物与你并肩作战所需、等同于该生物等级或更高的永久魔法物品”。然而，有些异界生物可能想要钱以外的报酬，例如要求你允许它对你施放一发@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Q690d3mw3TUrKX7E]{指使术}，以便你在未来偿还一项未指明的恩惠，或通过地狱契约取得你的灵魂所有权。若在你陈述理由后、在合理时长内仍无法达成协议，该异界生物可在任意时刻返回其来处。

大成功或大失败你召来该异界生物，并将其束缚在守护之内，最长可达整整一天，之后它才会返回家乡；你可以以“将其留在守护中整整一天”相威胁，从而有机会谈到更好的条件。

成功你召来该异界生物。

失败你未能召来该异界生物。

大成功或大失败你召来了某个黑暗而可怖之物，它不受你的守护束缚，并立刻试图摧毁你。

You call forth an extraplanar creature of a level no greater than double that of the planar binding ritual's level and attempt to bargain with it. The secondary caster attempting the Crafting check creates a warding diagram to prevent the extraplanar creature from attacking or leaving during the bargain; if that caster fails or critically fails, then instead of the usual effects of a failure or critical failure of the secondary skill check, the extraplanar creature can attack or leave instead of negotiate. You can also leave out this step, removing the need for a Crafting check, with the same result (if you're summoning a good extraplanar creature you trust, for example). The creature can also attack or leave if you use any hostile action against it or if the warding diagram breaks. Once the diagram is complete, you and the secondary casters each take your places at specific points at the diagram's edge where power concentrates.

You conjure the extraplanar creature within your wards and negotiate a deal with it, generally to perform a task for you in exchange for payment. A creature that doesn't wish to negotiate at all can attempt a Will save to stay on its home plane. Most good and neutral extraplanar creatures feel that they have something better to do than cater to the whims of mortals and require a significant gift, especially if your task poses significant risks. Evil extraplanar creatures are more likely to accept a bargain for a lower cost as long as it allows them to wreak havoc on the Material Plane or inflict evil upon the world along the way. Monetary prices usually range from the cost of a consumable item of the creature's level for a short and simple task to a permanent magic item of the creature's level or more to persuade the creature to fight alongside you. However, some extraplanar creatures may want payments other than money, such as permission to cast a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Q690d3mw3TUrKX7E]{Geas} on you to fulfill an unspecified later favor or obtain ownership of your soul via an infernal contract. If you can't come to an agreement in a reasonable length of time after you've made your case, the extraplanar creature can return from whence it came at any time.

Critical Success You call the extraplanar creature and bind it in the wards for up to a full day before it returns home, potentially allowing you to negotiate a better deal by threatening to leave it in the wards for the full day.

Success You call the extraplanar creature.

Failure You fail to call the extraplanar creature.

Critical Failure You call something dark and horrible, unbound by your wards, and it immediately attempts to destroy you.

True Seeing.name: 真视术 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你能如实看清60英尺内的事物。GM会对区域内任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于判断你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定对抗一个变形法术时成功，你就能看见该生物的真实形态，但你并不会终止该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Black Tentacles.name: 黑触手 Black Tentacles
Black Tentacles.description:
区域 邻接于一处平坦表面的20英尺爆发

油腻的黑触手升起，试图捕获区域内的生物。对区域内每个生物的强韧DC进行法术攻击掷骰。你成功命中的任意生物将获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}状态，并受到3d6钝击伤害。每当一个生物在区域内结束其回合时，若触手尚未尝试擒抱该生物，则触手会尝试擒抱该生物；并且触手对任何已经被擒抱的生物造成@Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

触手的逃脱DC等于你的法术DC。生物可以攻击一根触手以试图挣脱其擒抱。其AC等于你的法术DC，并且若其受到12点或更多伤害则会被摧毁。即使被摧毁，额外的触手仍会在区域内继续生长，直到持续时间结束。你可以解消该法术。

Area 20-foot burst adjacent to a flat surface

Oily black tentacles rise up and attempt to capture creatures in the area. Make spell attack rolls against the Fortitude DC of each creature in the area. Any creature you succeed against is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} and takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage. Whenever a creature ends its turn in the area, the tentacles attempt to grab that creature if they haven't already, and they deal @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage to any creature already Grabbed.

The tentacles' Escape DC is equal to your spell DC. A creature can attack a tentacle in an attempt to release its grip. Its AC is equal to your spell DC, and it is destroyed if it takes 12 or more damage. Even if destroyed, additional tentacles continue to grow in the area until the duration ends. You can Dismiss the spell.

Crushing Despair.name: 极度绝望 Crushing Despair
Crushing Despair.description:
你对区域内的生物施加绝望灵光。每个生物的效果由其意志豁免决定。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 持续1轮，该生物不能使用反应动作（），并且必须在其回合开始时再尝试一次豁免；若失败，则它在该回合中因无法控制地抽泣而成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为1分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，并且该生物在1分钟内自动成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

升阶（7环） 区域增加为60尺锥形。

You inflict despair on creatures in the area. The effects for each creature are determined by its Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success For 1 round, the creature can't use reactions and must attempt another save at the start of its turn; on a failure, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn as it sobs uncontrollably.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute.

Heightened (7th) The area increases to a 60-foot cone.

Illusory Scene.name: 幻象场景 Illusory Scene
Illusory Scene.description:
你塑造一幅想象中的场景，其中包含至多10个彼此独立的生物或物体，体型可各不相同，但都必须位于该法术的区域内。这些要素会发出恰当的声音与气味，并且触感也与真实无异。幻象场景中的要素无法说话。不同于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} 法术，你场景中的生物不具备战斗能力与数据。你的场景不包含对其周遭环境的改变，不过你可以将该场景置于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Mirage} 法术的幻觉环境之中。

当你创造该场景时，你可以选择让它静止不动或依照程序运行。静止场景虽然固定不移，但仍包含基本的自然移动。例如，风吹拂一张幻象纸片会使其沙沙作响。一个程序最长可达1分钟，并在结束后重复。例如，你可以创造两个兽人互相搏斗的场景，而每次重复时战斗都会以相同方式进行。若你创建循环，则两名战斗者会在场景开始与结束时回到相同位置，但你可以平滑该程序，使人难以分辨循环何时结束与开始。任何人若观察该场景超过几分钟，几乎总会注意到它在循环。你在创造该幻觉后无法更改该程序。

任何接触该影像任意部分的生物，或使用搜寻动作检视它的生物，都可以尝试不相信你的幻觉。若其与幻觉的某一部分发生互动，则只会不相信那一部分。只有在大成功时才会不相信整个场景。

升阶（6环） 你场景中的生物或物体可以说话。你在创建程序时必须为每个角色说出特定台词。该法术会为每个角色伪装你的声音。

升阶（8环） 同6环版本，且持续时间为无限。

You form an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area. These elements generate appropriate sounds and smells, and they feel right to the touch. Elements of an illusory scene are incapable of speech. Unlike with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} spell, creatures in your scene lack combat abilities and statistics. Your scene doesn't include changes to the environment around it, though you can place your scene within the illusory environment of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Mirage} spell.

When you create the scene, you can choose to have it be static or follow a program. Though a static scene is stationary, it includes basic natural movement. For example, wind blowing on an illusory piece of paper would rustle it. A program can be up to 1 minute long and repeats when finished. For instance, you could create a scene of two orcs fighting each other, and the fight would go the same way for each repetition. If you create a loop, the two fighters end up in the same place at the start of the scene and at the end of it, but you can smooth the program so it's hard to tell when the loop ends and begins. Anyone observing the scene for more than a few minutes almost always notices it looping. You're unable to alter the program after you create the illusion.

Any creature that touches any part of the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. If they interact with a portion of the illusion, they disbelieve only that portion. They disbelieve the entire scene only on a critical success.

Heightened (6th) Creatures or objects in your scene can speak. You must speak the specific lines for each actor when creating your program. The spell disguises your voice for each actor.

Heightened (8th) As the 6th-rank version, and the duration is unlimited.

Tongues.name: 巧言术 Tongues
Tongues.description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论其语言如何，并且也能说出其他生物的语言。当处于由多种生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标不知道那是什么语言。

强化（第7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你以怪异的冲动扰乱你的目标，使其随机行动。其效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标语无伦次地胡言乱语，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束该困惑术。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标陷入 Confused 1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前结束。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Globe of Invulnerability.name: 法术无效结界 Globe of Invulnerability
Globe of Invulnerability.description:
你在自己周围创造一个不可移动的球体，它尝试反制来自球体外、其区域或目标进入球体内的任何法术，如同该球体是一个法术环级比其实际法术环级低 1 的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法} 法术。

如果反制尝试成功，它只会阻止原本会进入球体的那一部分法术（因此如果该法术还有位于球体外的目标，或其部分区域在球体之外，那些目标或那部分区域仍会照常受到影响）。

你必须在一个连续且开阔的空间中形成该球体，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术将失效（不过在施放该法术后，生物可以进入球体）。

You create an immobile globe around yourself that attempts to counteract any spell from outside the globe whose area or targets enter into the globe, as if the globe were a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} spell 1 rank lower than its actual spell rank.

If the counteract attempt succeeds, it prevents only the portion of the spell that would have entered the globe (so if the spell also has targets outside the globe, or part of its area is beyond the globe, those targets or that area is affected normally).

You must form the sphere in an unbroken open space, so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost (though creatures can enter the globe after the spell is cast).

Phantasmal Killer.name: 魅影杀手 Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description:
你创造出一个对目标而言最可怕的生物的幻象。只有该法术的目标能看见这个杀手，不过你能看见那幻象模糊的形状向前疾驰并发动攻击。杀手的效果取决于目标的意志豁免结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到4d6点精神伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标受到8d6点精神伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标恐惧到可能会死。它必须尝试一次强韧豁免；若目标豁免失败，则其死亡。若强韧豁免成功，目标受到12d6点精神伤害，获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}直到其下一回合结束，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}。此效果具有失能（特征）特征。

升阶（+1） 失败时的伤害增加2d6，大失败时的伤害增加3d6。

You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target. Only the spell's target can see the killer, though you can see the vague shape of the illusion as it races forth to attack. The effect of the killer is based on the outcome of the target's Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes 4d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes 8d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is so afraid it might die. It must attempt a Fortitude save; if the target fails, it dies. On a successful Fortitude save, the target takes 12d6 mental damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} until the end of its next turn, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}. This effect has the incapacitation trait.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 on a failure and by 3d6 on a critical failure.

Spell Immunity.name: 法术免疫 Spell Immunity
Spell Immunity.description:
你保护一个生物免受单一法术的效果。选择一个法术，并在言语成分的一部分中大声说出其名称。法术免疫会在法术免疫的目标成为该命名法术的目标或处于该法术的区域内时，尝试反制该法术。以法术免疫成功反制一个以区域或多个目标为目标的法术时，只会使法术免疫所影响的目标免受其效果。

You ward a creature against the effects of a single spell. Choose a spell and name it aloud as part of the verbal component. Spell immunity attempts to counteract that spell whenever spell immunity's target is the target of the named spell or in that spell's area. Successfully counteracting a spell that targets an area or multiple targets with spell immunity negates the effects only for the target affected by spell immunity.

Aberrant Whispers.name: 怪异耳语 Aberrant Whispers
Aberrant Whispers.description:
你用一种未知的语言吟诵词句，侵袭附近生物的心智。每个目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。无论其豁免结果如何，每个目标随后在1分钟内暂时免疫。

你可以增加施放该法术所需的动作数量（最多总计3个动作）。每增加1个额外动作，散发的半径增加5尺；在3个动作时最多额外增加10尺。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}。

升阶（+3） 初始半径增加5尺。

You utter phrases in an unknown tongue, assaulting the minds of those nearby. Each target must attempt a Will save. Regardless of the result of its save, each target is then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

You can increase the number of actions it takes to Cast the Spell (to a maximum of 3 actions total). For each additional action, increase the emanation's radius by 5 feet, to a maximum of 10 extra feet for 3 actions.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}.

Heightened (+3) The initial radius increases by 5 feet.

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
通过一次粗略的精神接触，你尝试读取目标的心智。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后，该目标在1小时内对你的读心术获得暂时免疫。

大成功 当你施放法术时，目标会从你那里感知到含糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

失败 当你施放法术时，你从目标那里感知到含糊的表层想法，并得知其智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术的持续时间内，你可以维持该法术以再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会再获得任何额外的豁免。

With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind. It must attempt a Will save. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your mind reading for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target perceives vague surface thoughts from you when you Cast the Spell.

Success You find out whether the target's Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Failure You perceive vague surface thoughts from the target when you Cast the Spell, and you find out whether its Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Critical Failure As failure, and for the duration of the spell, you can Sustain the Spell to detect the target's surface thoughts again. The target doesn't receive any additional saves.

Nondetection.name: 回避侦测 Nondetection
Nondetection.description:
你竖立防护结界，使目标难以通过魔法侦测。回避侦测在持续时间内尝试反制所有针对目标或目标的道具施放的侦测、揭示与探知类预言系法术，为此目的将戏法视为1环法术。成功反制一个以区域或多个目标为目标的预言系法术时，仅对回避侦测的目标抵消其效果。

You erect protective wards that make the target difficult to detect via magic. Nondetection attempts to counteract all detection, revelation, and scrying divinations made against the target or the target's gear throughout the duration, counting cantrips as 1st-rank spells for this purpose. Successfully counteracting a divination that targets an area or multiple targets negates the effects only for nondetection's target.

Paralyze.name: 麻痹术 Paralyze
Paralyze.description:
你阻断了目标的运动冲动，使其无法离开心智，威胁要将目标冻结在原地。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}，持续时间为 1 轮。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标获得麻痹，持续时间为 4 轮。在其每个回合结束时，它可以尝试一次新的意志豁免，使剩余持续时间减少 1 轮，或在大成功或大失败 成功时完全结束该效果。

强化（7环） 你最多可以以 10 个生物为目标。

You block the target's motor impulses before they can leave its mind, threatening to freeze the target in place. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target is Paralyzed for 4 rounds. At the end of each of its turns, it can attempt a new Will save to reduce the remaining duration by 1 round, or end it entirely on a critical success.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Vampiric Touch.name: 吸血鬼之触 Vampiric Touch
Vampiric Touch.description:
你的接触从一个目标身上汲取生命之血来强化你自己。你对目标造成6d6虚空伤害。你获得等同于目标所受虚空伤害一半的临时生命值（在应用抗力等效果之后）。1分钟后，你失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

Your touch leeches the lifeblood out of a target to empower yourself. You deal 6d6 void damage to the target. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the void damage the target takes (after applying resistances and the like). You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Death Knell.name: 死亡丧钟 Death Knell
Death Knell.description:
你将一名濒死的生物的生命彻底掐灭。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。若因此杀死它，你获得10点临时HP，以及+1状态加值于攻击和伤害掷骰，持续10分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} 数值增加1。

失败 目标死亡。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.98XT2QUk6wvXIqf7]{法术效果：死亡丧钟}

You snuff the life out of a creature on the brink of death. The target must attempt a Will save. If this kills it, you gain 10 temporary HP and a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} value increases by 1.

Failure The target dies.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.98XT2QUk6wvXIqf7]{Spell Effect: Death Knell}

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。如果你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为同类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是神器或类似物品，你将自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

See Invisibility.name: 识破隐形 See Invisibility
See Invisibility.description:
你可以看见@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物和物体。它们在你眼中呈现为半透明的轮廓，并且对你而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{遮蔽}状态。

升阶（5环）该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见者}

You can see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and objects. They appear to you as translucent shapes, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you.

Heightened (5th) The spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Telekinetic Maneuver.name: 念动战技 Telekinetic Maneuver
Telekinetic Maneuver.description:
随着一阵念动力量的迸发，你移动一个敌人或他们携带的某件物品。你可以尝试对目标进行缴械、推撞或绊摔，使用法术攻击掷骰代替运动检定。

With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry. You can attempt to Disarm, Shove, or Trip the target using a spell attack roll instead of an Athletics check.

Touch of Idiocy.name: 愚者之触 Touch of Idiocy
Touch of Idiocy.description:
你使目标的心智变得迟钝；目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}。

You dull the target's mind; the target must attempt a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}.

Daze.name: 眩晕术 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智变得混乱，并用一道精神冲击使其眩晕。该冲击造成等同于你施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Ghost Sound.name: 幻音术 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个由简单声音组成的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他精细的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造一只单独的魔法手，其外观可以是隐形或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并缓慢移动，最多移动20英尺。由于你在使物体漂浮，你可以将其向任何方向移动。当你维持法术时，你可以让物体额外移动20英尺。如果法术结束时物体仍在空中，物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为2或更低的物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你轻声用嘴形说出话语，但它们不会从你的口中发出，而是直接传送到目标的耳中。其他人听不见你的话语，效果并不比你正常只动嘴形更好；但目标能听见你的话语，就如同他们正站在你身旁一样。

目标可以用反应动作（）给出简短回应，或若他们愿意，则可在其下个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能够看见你且在射程内才能这么做。若他们回应，他们的回应会像最初的传讯术一样，直接传到你的耳中。

强化（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Mindlink.name: 讯息传递 Mindlink
Mindlink.description:
你将自己的心灵与目标的心灵连接，并在一瞬间向该目标以精神方式传达原本需要10分钟才能交流的信息量。

You link your mind to the target's mind and mentally impart to that target an amount of information in an instant that could otherwise be communicated in 10 minutes.

Ray of Enfeeblement.name: 衰弱射线 Ray of Enfeeblement
Ray of Enfeeblement.description:
一道削弱敌人力量的射线从你手中闪现。对该目标尝试一次远程法术攻击。若你成功，则该生物进行一次强韧豁免以决定该法术的效果。若你的攻击掷骰为大成功，则使用其豁免结果降低一个成功等级后的结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}。

A ray that saps a foe's strength flashes from your hand. Attempt a ranged spell attack against the target. If you succeed, that creature attempts a Fortitude save to determine the spell's effect. If your attack roll is a critical success, use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of its save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，打开思维以感知魔法灵光。当施放完成时，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法；若是，你还会得知其魔法学派。

如果该物体是幻象，只有在其效果的等级低于你的阅读灵光法术的阶位时，你才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法力场护盾术。这视为使用“举起护盾”动作，使你在你下个回合开始前获得 +1 环境加值至 AC，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

当该法术处于效果期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾术使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{护盾格挡} 反应动作（）。该护盾术具有 硬度 5。在你使用护盾格挡之后，该法术结束且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。与普通的护盾格挡不同，你可以用该法术的 反应动作（）对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{力场弹幕} 法术。

升阶该法术会提高护盾术的 硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（3环） 该护盾术具有 硬度 10。

升阶（5环） 该护盾术具有 硬度 15。

升阶（7环） 该护盾术具有 硬度 20。

升阶（9环） 该护盾术具有 硬度 25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Spider Sting.name: 蜘蛛刺击 Spider Sting
Spider Sting.description:
你以魔法复制蜘蛛的毒刺。你对被触碰的生物造成1d4穿刺伤害，并使其感染蜘蛛毒液。目标必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害。

失败 目标感染蜘蛛毒液，处于阶段1。

大失败 目标感染蜘蛛毒液，处于阶段2。

蜘蛛毒液（毒素）

等级 1

最大持续时间 4轮

阶段1 1d4毒素伤害以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1轮）

阶段2 1d4毒素伤害以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（1轮）

You magically duplicate a spider's venomous sting. You deal 1d4 piercing damage to the touched creature and afflict it with spider venom. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage.

Failure The target is afflicted with spider venom at stage 1.

Critical Failure The target is afflicted with spider venom at stage 2.

Spider Venom (poison)

Level 1

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 1d4 poison damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 1d4 poison damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一个松散的、无人持用的物体掷向目标；该物体必须在射程内且负载不超过1。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害（取决于你掷出的物体），伤害等于1d6加上你的施法能力调整值。被掷出的物品不具有任何会影响该攻击或该伤害的特定特征或魔法属性。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage-as appropriate for the object you hurled-equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Tentacular Limbs.name: 触手肢体 Tentacular Limbs
Tentacular Limbs.description:
你的手臂变成又长又柔韧的触手，使你在施放射程为接触的法术以及用手臂进行徒手打击（例如拳击和爪击）时的触及增加至10尺。这不会改变你的近战武器攻击的触及。在持续时间内，每当你施法时，你可以为该法术的施放额外增加一个动作，以暂时将你的触及延伸至20尺来传递该法术。

升阶（+2） 当你为一个法术额外增加一个动作以暂时延伸你的触及时，你的触及再额外增加10尺来传递该法术。

Your arms turn into long, pliable tentacles, increasing your reach when you're delivering touch range spells and making unarmed Strikes with your arms (such as fist and claw Strikes) to 10 feet. This doesn't change the reach of your melee weapon attacks. During the duration, whenever you Cast a Spell, you can add an additional action to that spell's casting to temporarily extend your reach to 20 feet to deliver that spell.

Heightened (+2) When you add an additional action to a spell to temporarily extend your reach, your reach increases by an additional 10 feet to deliver that spell.

True Strike.name: 克敌机先 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你下一次打击精准命中。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该攻击掷骰掷两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击无视对该攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：必中打击}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Magic Sense.name: 魔法感知 Magic Sense
Magic Sense.description:
贝科拉能感知魔法灵光的存在，仿佛她总是在使用一个1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法} 法术。当她 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{（Seeks）动作} 时，她在所见之物上获得3环侦测魔法法术的益处。

Belcorra can sense the presence of magic auras as though she were always using a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} spell. When she @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seeks}, she gains the benefits of a 3rd-rank detect magic spell on things she sees.

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
憎恨魔窟的最低三个等级

典型的幽灵（特征）只能离开其被杀之处或其出没之地一小段距离。典型的限制是120英尺。有些幽灵（特征）并非受束缚于某个地点，而是受束缚于对其而言特殊的房间、建筑、物品或生物。

Lowest three levels of the Abomination Vaults

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时，所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当贝科拉被摧毁时，她会在空无之窟内于[[/br 2d4 #Rejuvenation]]{2d4天}后重新成形（不过她可以通过使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.CTiLugp5ptSItEqN]{乌木支点镜片}，以宁布洛斯本质的微光为自己赋能来缩短该时间）。

贝科拉只有在她对艾巴萨罗姆完成全部复仇，或宁布洛斯吞噬她的灵魂时，才能被永久摧毁。

When Belcorra is destroyed, she re-forms in [[/br 2d4 #Rejuvenation]]{2d4 days} within the Empty Vault (though she can reduce that time by empowering herself with glimmers of Nhimbaloth's essence using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.CTiLugp5ptSItEqN]{Ebon Fulcrum Lens}).

Belcorra can only be permanently destroyed if she enacts her full revenge on Absalom or if Nhimbaloth devours her soul.

Blood Magic.name: 血统奥秘 Blood Magic
Blood Magic.description:
每当贝科拉施放一个术士血脉法术或一个异怪血脉授予法术时，她可以给予自己或该法术的一个目标在1轮内对意志豁免检定获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.4GAJHkurmZ1ttKDv]{效果：血统奥秘}

Each time Belcorra casts a sorcerer bloodline spell or an aberrant bloodline granted spell, she can grant herself or a target of the spell a +2 status bonus to Will saving throws for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.4GAJHkurmZ1ttKDv]{Effect: Blood Magic}

Corrupting Gaze.name: 腐化凝视 Corrupting Gaze
Corrupting Gaze.description:
贝科拉凝视她在30英尺内能看见的一个生物。该目标受到 @Damage[9d6[mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:33|basic] 豁免）。

未能通过其豁免的生物还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 状态，持续1分钟。

Belcorra stares at a creature she can see within 30 feet. The target takes @Damage[9d6[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:33|basic] save).

A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute.

Haunted Lighthouse.name: 作祟灯塔 Haunted Lighthouse
Haunted Lighthouse.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

效果 贝科拉将她的存在延伸至凄凉灯塔最低的三个等级，直到她下个回合结束。她可以以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.9qV49KjZujZnSp6w]{全域视野} 的增益进行视物，并且可以从该区域内任意表面发起幽灵手攻击或使用特殊能力。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Effect Belcorra extends her presence throughout the lowest three levels of Gauntlight until the end of her next turn. She can see with the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.9qV49KjZujZnSp6w]{All-Around Vision} and can make ghostly hand attacks or use special abilities originating from any surface in this area.

Quickened Casting.name: 迅捷施法 Quickened Casting
Quickened Casting.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 如果贝科拉的下一个动作是施放一个4环或更低环阶的术士法术，她将施放该法术所需的动作数量减少1（最低1个动作）。

Frequency once per day

Effect If Belcorra's next action is to cast a sorcerer spell of 4th rank or lower, she reduces the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

Warp Mind.name: 心灵扭曲 Warp Mind
Warp Mind.description:
你扰乱一个生物的精神机能与感官输入。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。无论该豁免结果如何，目标随后在10分钟内暂时免疫。心灵扭曲的效果会瞬间发生，因此@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}以及其他能够反制法术的效果都无法反制这些效果。然而，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{许愿术}仪式以及能够移除非魔法效果的能力仍然可以反制这些效果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在其下个回合的第一个动作中具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）}状态。

失败 目标陷入困惑（状态）1分钟。

大失败 目标永久陷入困惑（状态）。

You scramble a creature's mental faculties and sensory input. The target must attempt a Will saving throw. Regardless of the result of that save, the target is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes. Warp mind's effects happen instantly, so @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} and other effects that counteract spells can't counteract them. However, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish} rituals and abilities that can remove non-magical effects can still counteract the effects.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target spends the first action on its next turn with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} condition.

Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is Confused permanently.

Mask of Terror.name: 惊骇假面 Mask of Terror
Mask of Terror.description:
目标看起来像一个残忍可怖的生物。该效果对每位观察者都是独特的，因此人类看着目标可能会看到一个长着血淋淋獠牙的恶魔，但恶魔观察目标时可能会看到一个散发光辉的天使面容。

当任何生物试图对目标进行敌对动作时，该生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后它会暂时免疫，直到其下个回合结束。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在使用其动作之前变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}，且其动作失败并被浪费。

升阶（8环） 你可以以最多5个生物为目标。若一个生物使用会同时影响多个目标的敌对动作或反应动作（），它仅需针对惊骇假面尝试一次豁免。

The target appears to be a gruesome and terrifying creature. The effect is unique to each observer, so a human viewing the target might see a demon with bloody fangs, but a demon observing the target might see a glowing angelic visage.

When any creature attempts a hostile action against the target, the creature must attempt a Will save. It is then temporarily immune until the end of its next turn.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} before using its action.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, and its action fails and is wasted.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 5 creatures. If a creature uses a hostile action or reaction that affects multiple targets simultaneously, it needs to attempt only one save against mask of terror.

Tempest of Shades.name: 怨影风暴 Tempest of Shades
Tempest of Shades.description:
你引导不死之力，短暂召唤出一个由被敌人与你的盟友所杀的复仇亡者融合而成的聚合体。该聚合体显现为一场由无实体、嚎叫面孔组成的巨大龙卷风。它占据一个巨型生物的空间，并具有60尺的速度。

抵达（负能量）死亡漩涡 每个处于60尺发散范围内的敌方生物必须进行一次强韧豁免，结果如下。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}。

离去（情绪，恐惧术，精神）永恒哀嚎 复仇亡者发出一声痛苦的尖啸。你所有位于100尺发散范围内的敌人必须进行 @Check[will|name:Tempest of Shades Depart|traits:necromancy,emotion,fear,mental] 豁免，结果如下。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

大成功或大失败 该生物陷入 frightened 3。它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续1轮或直到它不再 frightened（以先发生者为准）。

You channel the forces of undeath to briefly call forth an amalgam of the vengeful dead slain by your enemies and allies alike. This amalgam manifests as a large tornado of insubstantial, howling faces. It occupies the space of a Huge creature and has a Speed of 60 feet.

Arrive (negative) Vortex of Death Each enemy creature within a 60-foot emanation must attempt a Fortitude save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.

Depart (emotion, fear, mental) Howl of Eternity The vengeful dead lets out an anguished scream. All your enemies within a 100-foot emanation must attempt @Check[will|name:Tempest of Shades Depart|traits:necromancy,emotion,fear,mental] saves with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Critical Failure The creature is frightened 3. It's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round or until it's no longer frightened, whichever comes first.

Belcorra's Grasp.name: 贝科拉之握 Belcorra's Grasp
Belcorra's Grasp.description:
在每轮结束时

使用 @UUID[Actor.G1jTwKmilYfjRcrh]{贝科拉之握} 危害，向房间的 8 个扇区之一释放一波抓握之手。


动画 @UUID[Macro.Fv5QZflsyGrGWjCl]{J20 - 贝科拉之握}

At the end of every round

Use the @UUID[Actor.G1jTwKmilYfjRcrh]{Belcorra's Grasp} hazard to send a wave of grabbing hands down one of the 8 slices of the room.


Animation @UUID[Macro.Fv5QZflsyGrGWjCl]{J20 - Belcorra's Grasp}

Effect: Belcorra's Vulnerability.name: 效果：贝科拉的弱点 Effect: Belcorra's Vulnerability
Effect: Belcorra's Vulnerability.description:
将她标记为浅绿色，即Nhimabaloth的颜色，以显示当她处于或低于半生命值时，她对透镜的脆弱性。

Marks her a light green, the color of Nhimabaloth to show he vulnerability to the lenses when she is at or below half health.

Belcorra Haruvex (Upgraded).privateNotes:
在他们穿越《憎恨魔窟》最底层的跋涉中，英雄们很可能在最终获得足以彻底击败贝科拉所需的支点镜片之前，就会多次与她交锋。她从她的微灵盟友那里得知英雄们的情报；此后，你可以在她的出现最能制造紧张气氛的时机使用她。她在地城的每一层至少应发动一次攻击，频繁时甚至每隔几天就来一次。在冒险的终幕之前，你不该让贝科拉与其他生物并肩作战——她单打独斗就足够棘手！

贝科拉每次发动攻击，都会对英雄们的战斗方式了解得更多，并据此调整她的战术与她的准备。她可能施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tgIhRUFtgDSELpJE]{法术免疫}来保护自己免受英雄们最有效的法术影响，施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真知术}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{看见隐形}以确保他们始终在她视线之内，或用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}来反制他们的魔法防护。她嘲弄英雄们的失败，并对他们的成功暴怒——记住，自从她在“凄凉灯塔遗迹”中试射凄凉灯塔光束以来，她就一直知晓他们的存在。

第一次攻击一旦贝科拉察觉到英雄们的存在，她就会去搜寻他们，穿行于凄凉灯塔足迹之中（区域A37与B28）。她会在远处施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0XP2XOxT9VSiXFDr]{魅影灾祸}后撤退；必要时她会穿墙移动，让英雄们无法追上。

第二次攻击贝科拉想让英雄们惧怕她，因此第二次她会更近距离地接近他们，并使用单一目标法术，例如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5BbU1V6wGSGbrmRD]{别在意}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlcrVRqW1MSKJ5IC]{魅影杀手}，同时要求英雄们逃离她的《憎恨魔窟》。信息传达完毕后，她只会再战斗几轮便撤退。

后续攻击一旦英雄们找回一枚支点镜片或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JwHNSaiwwqF7VCC5]{支点晶格}，贝科拉便会将英雄们视为真正的威胁，但她的怒火会压过她的谨慎。她会倾尽全力发动攻击，将她的腐化凝视与鬼手配合法术一并使用。若她击倒了一名英雄，她便会撤退，并自信他们会就此放过她。

利用代理人贝科拉在《憎恨魔窟》内有数个活着的盟友，包括透肌魔人邪教与贝科拉之子。她可能派这些团体去追击英雄们，并坚持让他们告知英雄们：他们是在奉贝科拉之命行事。所幸这两个团体都无法集结大量人手，因此英雄们应当能应付他们的袭击。

杀害盟友若英雄们建立同盟，例如与附近的卡利格尼或卓尔结盟，贝科拉便会得知。她很清楚自己不该去正面挑战像加鲁杜或夸拉这类强大且根深蒂固的领袖，但她可能谋杀几名守卫，或引导怪物去他们最能对英雄盟友造成伤害的地方。对贝科拉而言，留下某些证据很重要（通常是一名受伤的幸存者），以便让英雄们知道这场袭击是由她一手策划。

身处足迹之中由于她的作祟灯塔能力，贝科拉在与进入凄凉灯塔足迹（区域A37与B28）的英雄作战时最为有效。

最终攻击如果英雄们在抵达空无之窟前不久击败了贝科拉，她会借助@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.CTiLugp5ptSItEqN]{乌木支点镜片}的力量来加速她的复生，以便能在她的圣所迎战他们。贝科拉在空无之窟中绝不会投降或逃跑。英雄们也可能在尚未具备永久击败她的能力时就与她在此交锋；在这种情况下，他们将需要撤退，收集支点镜片，再回来与她对决。只要英雄们能够将宁比拉洛斯的凝视聚焦于贝科拉身上，他们就能彻底击败这名术士。

During their trek through the lowest levels of the Abomination Vaults, the heroes likely face Belcorra several times before they finally acquire the fulcrum lenses they need to defeat her for good. She learns about them from her wisp allies and you can thereafter use her whenever her appearance might cause the most tension. She should attack at least once on each dungeon level, as often as every couple of days. You shouldn't have Belcorra fight alongside other creatures until the adventure's finale-she's tough enough on her own!

Each time Belcorra attacks, she learns more about how the heroes fight and adapts her tactics and her preparations. She might cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tgIhRUFtgDSELpJE]{Spell Immunity} to protect herself from the heroes' most effective spells, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} to keep them in sight, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} to counter their magical defenses. She mocks the heroes for their failures and rages at their successes-remember, she has been aware of them since her test firing of Gauntlight's beam in "Ruins of Gauntlight."

First Attack As soon as Belcorra realizes the heroes' presence, she seeks them out, traveling through the Gauntlight footprint (areas A37 and B28). She casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0XP2XOxT9VSiXFDr]{Phantasmal Calamity} at a distance and retreats, moving through walls if necessary so the heroes can't follow.

Second Attack Belcorra wants the heroes to fear her, so she approaches them more closely the second time and uses single-target spells like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5BbU1V6wGSGbrmRD]{Never Mind} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlcrVRqW1MSKJ5IC]{Phantasmal Killer} while demanding the heroes flee her Abomination Vaults. With her message delivered, she retreats after only a few rounds.

Later Attacks Once the heroes have recovered a fulcrum lens or the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JwHNSaiwwqF7VCC5]{Fulcrum Lattice}, Belcorra considers the heroes an actual threat, but her anger overrides her caution. She attacks with her full might, using her Corrupting Gaze and ghostly hand along with her spells. If she defeats a hero, she retreats, confident that they'll leave her alone.

Leveraging Agents Belcorra has several living allies within the Abomination Vaults, including the urdefhan cult and the Children of Belcorra. She might send these groups after the heroes, insisting they let the heroes know they're acting on Belcorra's orders. Fortunately, neither group can muster large numbers, so the heroes should be able to manage an attack from them.

Killing Allies Belcorra learns if the heroes make alliances, such as with nearby calignis or drow. She knows better than to face powerful, entrenched leaders like Galudu or Quara, but she might murder a few guards or direct monsters where they can most damage the heroes' allies. It's important to Belcorra that she leave some evidence (usually a single, injured survivor) to let the heroes know she had orchestrated the attack.

In the Footprint Belcorra is most effective fighting the heroes who enter the Gauntlight footprint (areas A37 and B28) due to her Haunted Lighthouse ability.

The Final Attack If the heroes defeat Belcorra shortly before they reach the Empty Vault, she uses the power of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.CTiLugp5ptSItEqN]{Ebon Fulcrum Lens} to hasten her rejuvenation so she can face them in her sanctum. Belcorra doesn't ever surrender or flee in the Empty Vault. The heroes could possibly face her there without yet having the ability to permanently defeat her. In this case, they'll need to retreat to collect the fulcrum lenses and return to face her again. Once the heroes can focus Nhimbaloth's gaze upon Belcorra, they can defeat the sorcerer for good.

女性幽灵术士
Female ghost sorcerer

Trapfinding Chicken.name: 寻陷鸡 Trapfinding Chicken

This chicken is good for detecting traps.

Bag of Weasels.name: 鼬鼠袋 Bag of Weasels
Bag of Weasels.description:
这件物品看起来并且运作方式如同一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.jaEEvuQ32GjAa8jy]{宽敞袋（I型）}，直到你试图从袋中取出一件物品为止。每当你从鼬鼠袋中取出一件物品时，进行一次@Check[flat|dc:11]。若成功，你如常取回该物品。若失败，你取出的物品会转化为一只鼬鼠；这不会影响神器、诅咒物品或其他难以摧毁的物品。

这只鼬鼠使用鼬鼠的数据或巨鼠的数据，并散发出魔法灵光。鼬鼠对你毫无忠诚，通常会尽快尝试逃脱。若该鼬鼠被反制，它会转化回从鼬鼠袋中取出的原本物品。若它死亡或被杀死，鼬鼠会消失，而该物品将被永久摧毁。由于鼬鼠是由物品转化而来，你不会获得任何你从攻击生物、击败生物、对生物造成伤害或类似行为中会获得的益处，但你会获得任何你从摧毁物品中会获得的益处。

This item appears to be and functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.jaEEvuQ32GjAa8jy]{Spacious Pouch (Type I)}, until you try to retrieve an item from the bag. Whenever you retrieve an item from the bag of weasels, roll a @Check[flat|dc:11]. On a success, you retrieve the item as normal. On a failure, the item you retrieve is transformed into a weasel; this doesn't affect artifacts, cursed items, or other hard-to-destroy items.

This weasel uses either the weasel statistics or a giant rat statistics and exudes an aura of magic. The weasel has no loyalty to you and typically attempts to escape as quickly as possible. If the weasel is counteracted, it transforms back into the original item that was taken from the bag of weasels. If it dies or is slain, the weasel disappears and the item is permanently destroyed. Because the weasel is a transformed item, you don't gain any benefit you would receive from attacking a creature, defeating one, damaging one, or the like, but you do gain any benefit you would gain from destroying an item.

[[/r 1d10]]

结果

1 - 3

你受到 @Damage[(1d8)[poison]] 伤害

4 - 6

无事发生

你恢复 @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] 生命值。

You take @Damage[(1d8)[poison]] damage

Nothing Happens

Fourth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.name: 扎奇厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第四封信 Fourth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Fourth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：


历史学会要是见到这个地方，肯定会激动得发疯。它就是一直向下延伸！而在地表几乎看不出有如此庞大的基础设施痕迹。显然这里是精心建造的，并且带着明确的目的与计划。恕我直言，这附近的角色也真是怪人一箩筐。那个乐呵呵的家伙，你知道吗，他居然在国际象棋上赢了我！当然，他作弊了。不过话说回来，我也作弊了。在我原以为会在地下找到的种种事物之中，竟然还有一支乐团，这可不在其列。他们其实并不差。也许他们会让你加入他们，嗯，西奥多拉？虽然我哪儿也没见到管风琴，甚至连一架羽管键琴都没有。


我想你注意到了这一等级西侧的安保检查点吧？它通往地表！不过你放心，我可不打算往那边走。我必须看看这一切的底部究竟有什么。


恐怕你会发现，下一等级的大部分一点也不令人愉快。拷问、实验，甚至还有赌博！嗯，当你找到拷问室时，听我一句劝：在那位铁质女人以北正好四步、以西七步处的那块松动地砖下方检查。
永远前行！


你那非同寻常的叔叔，

扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,


The Historical Society would be in fits over this place. It just keeps going down! And hardly any indication of such extensive infrastructure on the surface. It was obviously constructed with care, and with a specific purpose and plan in mind. Quite an odd lot of characters around hereabouts, I must say. That cheery fellow, did you know, he managed to beat me at chess! Of course, he cheated. But then again, so did I. Of all the things I expected to find below, a musical group was not among them. They aren’t bad, actually. Perhaps they’ll let you join them, eh, Theodora? Although I didn’t see a pipe organ anywhere, nor even a harpsichord.


I suppose you noticed the security checkpoint to the west on this level? It leads to the surface! Not that I’m heading that way, mind. I must see what lies at the bottom of all this.


You’ll find that much of the next level is not at all pleasant, I’m afraid. Torture, experimentation, and even gambling! Well, when you find the torture chamber, you take my advice and check beneath the loose floor tile precisely four paces north and seven west of the ferrous woman.
Ever onward!


Your Exceptional Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Third Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第三封信 Third Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Third Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特和西奥多拉：


你们有没有注意到那根巨大的中央立柱有什么古怪之处？它几乎坚不可摧。多么有趣！这里有深邃的魔法在发挥作用。我希望东边的那个狼男没有给你们添什么麻烦。或者说，我希望你们没有给他添什么麻烦。他看起来相当悲伤。要我说，他需要的是呼吸点新鲜空气。这里下面的霉味可真重。


说到“必须”，你们真的必须去看看下方的斗技场！它就在那座大楼梯间的正南方。夏洛特，我敢肯定你会玩得很开心。也许你已经解决了这里西北方那间密室里的那些野兽。尽管放心，下面有大量怪物，其中包括许多经历了骇人实验的不幸者。


这个地方曾经风光得多。下方一层的中部附近聚集着若干处废弃的起居区。其中有一处并没有你们希望的那么“废弃”！这让我想起老奶奶菲莉丝做的菜。我在从那一处起逆时针数的第三间卧室里给你们留了点东西。


永远前行！


你们爱探究的叔叔，撒迦利亚斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,


Have you noticed anything odd about that great central column? It is quite indestructible. How interesting! There is deep magic at work here. I hope that wolf man over to the east didn’t give you any trouble. That is, I hope you didn’t give him any trouble. He seems rather sad. I say, what he needs is some fresh air. It is rather musty down here.


And speaking of must, you simply must have a look at the arena below! It is straight south from the large stairwell. Charlotte, I am sure you will have a wonderful time. Perhaps you have already taken care of those beasts in the secret chamber northwest of here. Rest assured, there are numerous monsters below, including many unfortunates who have undergone abhorrent experimentation.


This place has seen better days. A number of abandoned living quarters are clustered together near the middle of the level below. One of them is not quite as abandoned as you might hope! It reminds me of old granny Phyllis’s cooking. I left something for you in the third bedroom counter-clockwise from that one.


Ever onward!


Your Inquisitive Uncle, Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Seventh Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire.name: 扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第七封信 Seventh Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Seventh Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire.description:
我最亲爱的夏洛特和西奥多拉：

恐怕我在这里惹上了一点麻烦。我正匆匆写下这封信，但我的追兵或许在我写信的同时就已逼近。我不愿承认，但在没有等你们就独自下到这么深的地方，或许确实有些鲁莽。

不过，别怕！我确信自己曾从比这更糟的险境中脱身。你们看，下面有一间旧狩猎小屋，而我似乎不小心惊动了一群卡利尼武者。

看来我们已经抵达幽暗地域的上层区域。附近所有建筑似乎都是刻意围绕着中央石柱建造的。我有理由相信它确实有一个基座，而且这个基座就在不远的下方。人们只能猜测其中会藏着什么秘密、什么谜团！

若你们下到较低的等级，给你们一点建议：卓尔还能讲道理；透肌魔人则不能。一如既往，当心怪物，不过下面的怪物尤为凶猛。此外，还有一位力量非凡的幽魂在这些洞窟中徘徊。你们或许已经注意到了。她似乎正为某事而愤怒。
啊，看来我的时代所剩无几了。夏洛特和西奥多拉，我深深爱着你们两人。


永远向前！

你们愈发谨慎的叔叔，

扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

I am afraid I may be in a spot of bother, here. I am hastily writing this letter, but my pursuers may be closing in even as I do so. I hate to admit it, but it may have been a bit reckless of me to come down this far without waiting for you.

Never fear, however! I have come out of worse scrapes than this, I am sure. There is an old hunting lodge down below, you see, and I seem to have inadvertently disturbed a group of caligni warriors.

It seems we have reached an upper region of the Darklands. All structures nearby seem built intentionally around the central column. I have reason to believe that it does indeed have a base, and that this base is not far below. One can only speculate what secrets, what mysteries it may contain!

A bit of advice if you descend to the lower level: the drow can be reasoned with; the urdefhan can not. As usual, beware of monsters, but they are particularly fierce below. As well, a ghostly spirit of extraordinary power prowls these caverns. You may have noticed. She is rather angry about something.
Ah, it seems that my time is running out. Charlotte and Theodora, I love you both dearly.


Ever onward!

Your Increasingly Cautious Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire

First Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎克修斯·夸格迈尔三世博士的第一封信 First Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
First Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：

我怀着十足的信心写下此信——相信你们会先找到这封信，随后找到我本人。我确信你们没有忘记我教给你们的那一课：永远要检定画作的背面！而这幅画上甚至还有一只老虎。啊，夏洛特，你过去可喜欢老虎了。这里真是个非凡之地！又如此出人意料。等你们找到这封信时，想必已经观察到此处并不怎么欢迎访客。无妨！像你们这样德高望重的历史学会成员，想必不会被这点微不足道的困难吓倒。再往下走一点，你们甚至可能会遇到一两张友善的面孔。正如我一直说的那样：并非所有图书馆员都想吞噬你们腐烂的血肉。

你们也许还要小心幽灵，而且不是像你们旧日那位住在庄园的姑婆莫德那样友善的幽灵。可怜的灵魂们！却又如此令人愉悦地阴森。此外，还有一个相当蠕动不安的实体在这一带游荡，我建议你们以极其谨慎的方式与之接触。

下方的馆藏既丰富又令人惊讶。我知道你可能想顺道来看看，西奥多拉，但恐怕诗歌区有些单薄。尽管如此，知识就是力量，而我已将二者都藏在某本你必定熟悉的巨著之中。那是贤者扬·德雷利·科莱的第三部正式获承认的论文集，我知道你在求学过程中曾接触过他的作品。插图付之阙如，实在可惜，但译文相当不错。我把它留在东方的阅览隔间之间。你们应该会发现它很有帮助。

我知道你们会谨慎地搜寻隐藏的通道。我自己也记下了不少，想必你们已发现与这幅画相邻的那扇暗门。一个体面的历史学会成员绝不会放过任何线索！也正因如此，我必须继续深入。也许你们会追上来！我这双老腿早已不如从前了。

我想，那些迷人却不友好的机关之一正在靠近，因此我必须向你们致以祝福。

永远向前！

爱你们的叔叔，扎凯乌斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

It is with the utmost confidence that I write – confidence that you will find first this letter, and later myself. I am certain that you have not forgotten the lesson I taught you: always check the backs of paintings! And this one even has a tiger on it. Ah, you used to love tigers, Charlotte. What a remarkable place this is! And so unexpected. You will already have observed, by the time you find this, that it is not particularly welcoming. No matter! Esteemed members of the Historical Society such as yourselves will not be fazed by such trifling difficulties, I am sure. A bit further down you may even find one or two friendly faces. It is just as I have always said: not all librarians are out to devour your rotting flesh.

You might also be cautious of ghosts, and not friendly ones like your old great-aunt Maud back at the manor. Poor souls! And so delightfully macabre. Furthermore, a rather squirmy entity is roaming about these parts, with whom I advise an approach of considerable caution.

The collection below is as extensive as it is surprising. I know you might wish to stop by and have a look, Theodora, but I’m afraid the poetry section is a bit slim. Nevertheless, knowledge is power, and I have hidden both within a certain tome you are bound to be familiar with. It is the third formally accepted treatise of Jan Dreli Kolai the Sage, whose work I know you have encountered in the course of your studies. The illustrations are lacking, alas, but the translation is quite good. I left it amid the carrels to the east. You should find it helpful.

I know that you will be careful to search for hidden passageways. I have noted quite a few myself, as doubtless you have the secret door adjacent to this painting. A respectable member of the Historical Society leaves no stone unturned! Which is why I must proceed further. Perhaps you will catch up! My old legs aren’t what they used to be.

I believe one of those fascinating but unfriendly mechanisms is approaching, so I must wish you well.

Ever Onward!

Your Affectionate Uncle, Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Sixth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎凯厄斯·奎格迈尔三世博士的第六封信 Sixth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Sixth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：

亲爱的孩子们，当我们带着这些发现回去汇报时，历史学会一定会对我们羡慕不已！我已经迫不及待想看到卡莱尔教授那张浮肿的脸会是什么表情了。那根不可摧毁的中央立柱——它究竟向下延伸到多深？直到土的中心吗？其中死灵能量显著增加这一点无疑令人担忧。

希望你们已经准备好迎接一次景色的变化，不过我不会破坏惊喜。我只会说，我的下一封信将藏在一株非常巨大的担子菌标本之中。它会在梯子附近（你们见到梯子就会知道是哪一架），而且很可能是唯一一株标有我们这高贵而光荣的学会徽记的同类标本。

下面的危险既多且杂。我建议你们特别留意 A.O.U.S.，我相信你们还记得课上所学，这代表“体型异常的两栖动物”。当心水。提防头顶的幽影。事实上，要提防一切。

永远前行！

你们越来越谨慎的叔叔，

扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

My dears, we shall be the envy of the Historical Society when we report back with these findings! I can’t wait to see the look on Professor Carlisle’s bloated face. That indestructible central column – just how far down does it go? To the center of the earth? The noticeable increase in necromantic energy within it is cause for concern, without doubt.

I hope you are prepared for a change in scenery, but I won’t spoil the surprise. I will only say that my next letter will be concealed within a very large specimen of basidiomycota. It will be near the ladder (you’ll know the ladder when you see it), and very likely the only such specimen to be marked with the symbol of our good and honorable society.

Many and diverse are the dangers below. I suggest you keep particular watch for A.O.U.S., which, as I’m sure you remember from your lessons, means Amphibians Of Unusual Size. Be wary of the water. Be wary of the shadows overhead. Be wary, in fact, of everything.

Ever onward!

Your Increasingly Cautious Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire

Second Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.name: 扎凯厄斯·奎格迈尔三世博士的第二封信 Second Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Second Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire I.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉：

祝贺你们解决了那些讨厌的食尸鬼。你们见到那个友善的了吗？这间屋里的幽灵（特征）可以说有点神志不清，不过只要你们假装坐下来做些工作，她就会让你们相安无事。唉，我曾在这里待上一两天，尽管确实总有发生骚扰的可能。就在此处正北的那座神殿真是别有一番气象，不过祭司们很敏感。


不过天哪，多么壮观的图书馆！我想你会想留下来四处看看，西奥多拉。事实上，你或许想特别留意这间屋里幽灵（特征）的移动。


我本不愿剥夺你们探索发现的乐趣，但要知道，我们下面那位多得数不清的朋友相当喜欢毒药，而且他似乎对此免疫。哦，哈，哈哈！那段楼梯！妙极了。如今在陵墓与神殿里，能见到那样真正的职业风范可不多。但在那儿务必万分小心。记住我告诉过你们的：从你尚未准备好面对的事物面前撤退，并不丢人。就像你一样，夏洛特——当你才十号的时候就去对付那只河流龙兽！可怜的生物。它才该逃走。


我把一样有用的东西留在一瓶特别上好的扎摩诔干白之中。至于年份，恕我无法置评。就算是我，也没那么老！我写这些时，那幽灵（特征）正从我肩后张望。我想她并没有留意。可怜的灵魂。


永远向前！


你们博学的叔叔，

扎凯厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora,

Congratulations on dealing with those pesky ghouls. Did you meet the friendly one? The ghost in this room is a bit off her rocker, so to speak, but she’ll leave you well enough alone if you pretend to sit and do some work. Why, I stayed here for a day or two, though indeed there is always a chance of a disturbance. That temple just north of here really is something, though the priests are touchy.


But my, what a library! I expect you’ll want to stay and have a look around, Theodora. You may want to pay particular attention to the movements of the ghost in this very room, in fact.


Now I would hate to deprive you of the joy of discovery, but be aware that our multitudinous friend below rather enjoys poison, to which he seems to be immune. And oh, ho ho! That staircase! Marvelous. It’s rare to see true class like that in tombs and temples these days. But do be extremely cautious there. Remember what I have told you: there is no dishonor in fleeing from something you are not prepared to face just yet. Just like you, Charlotte, with that river drake when you were only ten! Poor creature. It should have fled.


I left something helpful in a bottle of a particularly good Jalmeray dry white. I’m afraid I cannot comment on the vintage. Even I am not quite that old! That ghost is looking over my shoulder as I write. I don’t think she’s paying attention, though. Poor soul.


Ever onward!


Your Scholarly Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Fifth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.name: 扎凯乌斯·奎格迈尔三世博士的第五封信 Fifth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire III
Fifth Letter of Dr. Zaccheus Quagmire II.description:
最亲爱的夏洛特与西奥多拉， 


多么奇妙的发展！你们知道我一向受不了邪魔，通常而言——还记得老鸬鹚上校那次事件吗？不过魔鬼倒也没那么糟，至少就其本性而言是如此。只要他们觉得能从你身上得到些什么，就不会立刻跳到要杀了你——而这，我亲爱的孩子们，就是最基本的经济学。哎呀，他们几乎算得上文明了。


不过，他们很可能终究会在某个时刻动手杀你，所以要为此做好准备。至少这里又暖和又舒适！我敢肯定你们俩在竞技场等级的桑拿里玩得很尽兴，尽管同伴颇为可疑。唔，我把下一封信放在这下面最暖和的房间里，就在那个圆环正下方。要知道，我还在里面和魔鬼们就异界传送门背后的理论进行了一场精彩的讨论。当然，那是在他们开始试图杀我之前——正如我在上文提到的那样。


我相信你们会喜欢见到那位魔鬼头目。人们总爱谈论什么天国的唱诗班、天使的合唱团之类的玩意儿，可你从没听人提过那些更为地狱的歌者。无需恐惧术，你们很快就会在这里大饱耳福！这地方竟会如此音乐缭绕，真叫人意外。正如我一直所说：绝不要仅凭其最上层的肮脏废墟，就去评判一座阴森的多等级地下超级复合体。


永远向前！


你们善于闪躲的叔叔，

扎该厄斯·夸格迈尔三世博士

Dearest Charlotte and Theodora, 


What a curious development! You know how I just can’t stand fiends, generally – remember the incident with old Colonel Cormorant? But devils aren’t so bad, as far as they go. They won’t jump straight to killing you if they think they can get something from you – and that, my dears, is basic economics. Why, they’re nearly civilized.


They will, however, most likely get around to killing you at some point, so be ready for that. At least it’s nice and warm down here! I’m sure you two enjoyed the sauna on the arena level, despite the questionable company. Well, I left my next letter in the warmest room down here, right under the circle. Why, I had a fine discussion with the devils in there about the theory behind extraplanar portals. That was before they got around to trying to kill me, of course, as I mentioned above.


I’m sure you’ll enjoy meeting the boss devil. You always hear talk about heavenly choirs and angelic choruses and whatnot, but you never hear about the more infernal vocalists. Never fear, you’ll get an earful down here! What a musical place this is turning out to be. It is just as I have always said: never judge a sinister multi-level subterranean supercomplex by the squalid ruination of its uppermost level.


Ever onward!


Your Evasive Uncle,

Dr. Zacchaeus Quagmire III

Thresholds of Truth.name: 真理的门槛 Thresholds of Truth
Thresholds of Truth.description:
扎马夫迪安的法术书真理的门槛曾经是一部直白的奥术与神秘学学识论著，收录了数个实用的法术。然而，它被添加了大量批注，使得原文难以阅读。很显然，扎马夫迪安想要阻止骇物生物操纵无辜的心智，但对那些追寻危险或晦涩学识的人而言，这本法术书却是一座宝藏宝库。书商莫尔利宾特目前将此书收藏于怪谈故事。

真理的门槛提供@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.JBPXisA4IdXI9gVn]{骇物研究者}变体的许可，并包含以下法术：

即使未进行灌注，也可以将其作为护盾使用（硬度7，HP 30，BT 15）。若该护盾“破损”，书中内容不会受损，但必须将封面完全修复，才能再次将其作为护盾使用。

启动–防御符文 A （专注，操作）

效果 你可以不进行举起该护盾，而改为启动封面上的防御符文。这使持用者获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JOdOpbPDl7nqvJUm]{Dispelling Globe}（等级3，[[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{反制检定+15}）的益处，但仅影响对持用者施放的法术，持续至其下个回合开始。

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JOdOpbPDl7nqvJUm]

Zarmavdian's spellbook, Thresholds of Truth, was once a straightforward treatise on arcane and occult lore containing several useful spells. It's been so heavily annotated, however, that the original text is hard to read. It's clear that Zarmavdian wanted to prevent eldritch creatures from manipulating innocent minds, but his spellbook is a treasure trove for those seeking dangerous or inscrutable lore. The bookseller Morlibint currently keeps this book in his collection at Odd Stories.

Thresholds of Truth provides access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.JBPXisA4IdXI9gVn]{Eldritch Researcher} archetype and contains the following spells:

This grants the wielder the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JOdOpbPDl7nqvJUm]{Dispelling Globe} (Level 3, [[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{Counteract Check +15}) that only affects spell cast on the wielder until the start of their next turn.
