Rosa Argentis.name: 银色玫瑰 Rosa Argentis
Rosa Argentis.description:
银色玫瑰是玫瑰骑士之刃，也是拉贾尼斯家族的祖传武器。这把美丽的+1 银制强击长剑以玫瑰与荆棘的纹饰精心打造。由拉贾尼持用时，它会获得额外威能。

当你挥舞它时，你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}的检定时获得+2物品加值。

银色玫瑰为一把+1 强击长剑（若由拉贾尼挥舞则为+2）。

启动—繁花乱舞 2

频率 每分钟一次

效果 对射程内三个不同的敌人各进行一次攻击。计算此能力的多重攻击减值（MAP）时，将该剑视为灵巧。

启动—面纱绽放 2 (专注，操作)

频率 每小时一次

需求 仅能由拉贾尼持用

效果 获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]{朦胧术}的效果

The Rosa Argentis is the blade of the Rose Knight and the ancestral weapon of the Rajanis. This beautiful +1 silver striking longsword is artfully worked with a rose-and-thorns motif. It gains additional powers in the hands of a Rajani.

While wielding it, you gain a +2 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}.

The Rosa Argentis is a +1 striking longsword (+2 if wielded by a Rajani).

Activate—Flurry of Flowers 2

Frequency once per minute

Effect Make three attacks against three different enemies in range. The sword is treated as Agile when calculating MAP for this ability.

Activate—Blossom Veil 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Requirement Only can be used in the hands of a Rajani

Effect Gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]{Blur}

Rosa Argentis (Awakened).name: 银色玫瑰（觉醒） Rosa Argentis (Awakened)
Rosa Argentis (Awakened).description:
银色玫瑰是玫瑰骑士之刃，也是拉贾尼斯人（Rajanis）的祖传武器。这把美丽的+2 银制强效强力长剑以玫瑰与荆棘的主题精工打造。在拉贾尼手中，它会获得额外力量。

当你持用它时，你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}的检定时获得+2 物品加值。

银色玫瑰是一把+2 强效强力长剑

启动—繁花连击 2

频率 每分钟一次

效果 对射程内三个不同的敌人各进行一次攻击，共进行三次攻击。在计算此能力的多重攻击减值（MAP）时，将此剑视为灵巧。

启动—面纱绽放 2 (专注，操控)

频率 每小时一次

需求 仅能在拉贾尼手中使用

效果 获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]{朦胧术}的效果

启动—穿刺荆棘 2

效果 此能力如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.0B39GdScyZMPWalX]{强力攻击}般运作，但它也会无视伤害抗力、掩蔽与隐蔽。然而，它要求银色玫瑰的持用者必须正在擒抱该次攻击的目标，或正被该目标擒抱。

While wielding it, you gain a +2 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}.

The Rosa Argentis is a +2 greater striking longsword

Activate—Flurry of Flowers 2

Frequency once per minute

Effect Make three attacks against three different enemies in range. The sword is treated as Agile when calculating MAP for this ability.

Activate—Blossom Veil 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Requirement Only can be used in the hands of a Rajani

Effect Gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]{Blur}

Activate—Piercing Thorn 2

Effect This ability functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.0B39GdScyZMPWalX]{Power Attack}, but it also ignores damage resistance, cover, and concealment. However, it requires that the wielder of the Rosa Argentis is either grappling or being grappled by the target of this attack.

Aid the Ritual.name: 援助仪式 Aid the Ritual
Aid the Ritual.description:
用法 当你位于主仪式圆环30英尺内时，进行一次你受训的技能的 @Check[dc:25|type:arcana]、@Check[dc:25|type:occultism|showDC:none] 或 @Check[dc:25|type:religion|showDC:none] 检定。

如果玩家成功协助该仪式，仪式盟友在位于仪式圆环30英尺内时获得+1状态加值至AC与豁免。该区域也会被昏暗光照照亮，从而解除任何黑暗效果。两种效果持续1轮。

@UUID[Item.gwhPV4Ml0T569mWm]{效果：仪式已协助}

大成功或大失败 将完成仪式所需的时间减少2轮

成功 将完成仪式所需的时间减少1轮

Usage @Check[dc:25|type:arcana], @Check[dc:25|type:occultism|showDC:none], or @Check[dc:25|type:religion|showDC:none] check in a skill you're proficient in when you are within 30 feet of the main ritual circle.

If a player has succeeds in aiding the ritual allies gain +1 status bonus to AC and saves while within 30 feet of the ritual circle. The area is also illuminated with dim light which dispels any darkness effects. Both effects last for 1 round.

@UUID[Item.gwhPV4Ml0T569mWm]{Effect: Ritual Aided}

Critical Success Reduce the time to complete the ritual by 2 rounds

Success Reduce the time to complete the ritual by 1 round

Effect: Ritual Aided.name: 效果：获得仪式协助 Effect: Ritual Aided
Effect: Ritual Aided.description:
如果一名玩家成功协助该仪式，盟友在仪式法阵30英尺内时，AC与豁免获得+1状态加值。该区域也会被昏暗光照照亮，从而解除任何黑暗术效果。两种效果持续1轮

If a player has succeeds in aiding the ritual allies gain +1 status bonus to AC and saves while within 30 feet of the ritual circle. The area is also illuminated with dim light which dispels any darkness effects. Both effects last for 1 round

Effect: Ritual Defense.name: 效果：仪式防御 Effect: Ritual Defense
Effect: Ritual Defense.description:
如果一名玩家成功协助该仪式，盟友在仪式法阵30尺内时，其AC与豁免获得+1状态加值。

If a player has succeeds in aiding the ritual allies gain +1 status bonus to AC and saves while within 30 feet of the ritual circle.

Cailean Key (Activated).name: 凯连之钥（启动） Cailean Key (Activated)
Cailean Key (Activated).description:
这把古怪钥匙的弓形柄端顶着一只啤酒酒壶。这把钥匙可在尝试开锁时替代盗贼工具使用，并为巧手检定提供+1物品加值。

若万能钥匙因检定中的大成功或大失败导致其损坏，它将如同普通盗贼工具一样运作，并在完全修复前失去其增益。

启动—松动锁具 F 交互

频率 每日一次

触发 你尝试开锁但尚未掷骰

效果 该钥匙对你正尝试撬开的锁施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock}法术。

启动—自由移动 D 交互

频率 每日一次

效果 该钥匙施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement}法术。

A flagon of ale tops the bow of this odd key. This key can be used in place of thieves' tools when attempting to Pick a Lock, and it grants a +1 item bonus to the Thievery check.

If the skeleton key becomes broken due to a critical failure on the check, it works as normal thieves' tools and loses its benefits until repaired.

Activate—Loosen Lock F Interact

Frequency once per day

Trigger You attempt to Pick a Lock but haven't rolled yet

Effect The key casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock} on the lock you're trying to pick.

Activate—Free Movement D Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect The key casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement}.

Cloak of the Huntress.name: 女猎手斗篷 Cloak of the Huntress
Cloak of the Huntress.description:
这件精致的灰褐色斗篷曾由牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯——女猎手——穿戴。

穿戴者在隐匿检定上获得+2物品加值。此外，这件斗篷赋予穿戴者@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{猎杀目标}以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.mzkkj9LEWjJPBhaq]{猎手优势-精准}专长。若穿戴者已拥有猎手优势-精准，则改为使来自猎手优势的精准伤害提高[[/r 1d8]]。

@UUID[Item.nMYvGuwnw2DQk3DW]{效果：女猎手斗篷}

This fine grey-brown cloak once worn by Aesephna Menhemes, the Huntress.

The wearer gains +2 item bonus to stealth checks. In addition This cloak grants the wearer the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{Hunt Prey} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.mzkkj9LEWjJPBhaq]{Hunter's Edge (Precision)} feat. If the wearer already has Hunter's Edge (Precision) this instead increases the precision damage from Hunter's Edge by [[/r 1d8]].

@UUID[Item.nMYvGuwnw2DQk3DW]{Effect: Cloak of the Huntress}

Cloak of the Huntress (Awakened).name: 女猎手斗篷（觉醒） Cloak of the Huntress (Awakened)
Cloak of the Huntress (Awakened).description:
这件精致的灰褐色斗篷曾由牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯——女猎手——穿戴；当她的胸针与她的透镜接触时，它由胸针中衍生而出。

穿戴者获得 +2 物品加值于隐匿检定。此外，这件斗篷赋予穿戴者 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{猎杀目标}与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.mzkkj9LEWjJPBhaq]{猎手优势-精准} 专长。若穿戴者已拥有猎手优势-精准，则改为使猎手优势的精准伤害提高 [[/r 1d8]]。

@UUID[Item.nMYvGuwnw2DQk3DW]{效果: 女猎手斗篷}

启动—猎手优势 A（专注，幸运，听觉）

频率 每日一次

效果 你说出暗语：“现在你将灭亡”，随后斗篷赋予你力量，使你能以先天法术施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike}。

启动—无法追踪 R（幻术，操控，视觉，精神）

频率 每日一次

效果 你戏剧性地挥动斗篷，一抹误解的阴影落在目标身上，仿佛你以先天法术施放了 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.iohRnd4gUCmJlh54]{迷失方向}。

This fine grey-brown cloak once worn by Aesephna Menhemes, the Huntress, and was spawned out of her brooch when it came into contact with her lens.

The wearer gains +2 item bonus to stealth checks. In addition This cloak grants the wearer the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{Hunt Prey} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.mzkkj9LEWjJPBhaq]{Hunter's Edge (Precision)} feat. If the wearer already has Hunter's Edge (Precision) this instead increases the precision damage from Hunter's Edge by [[/r 1d8]].

@UUID[Item.nMYvGuwnw2DQk3DW]{Effect: Cloak of the Huntress}

Activate—Hunter's Edge A (concentrate, fortune, auditory)

Frequency once per day

Effect You speak the code phrase; "Now You Shall Perish", and then the cloak empowers you allowing you to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} as an innate spell.

Activate—Untraceable R (illusion, manipulate, visual, mental)

Frequency once per day

Effect You swing the cloak dramatically and a shade of misunderstanding falls over the target as if you had cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.iohRnd4gUCmJlh54]{Lose the Path} as an innate spell.

Effect: Cloak of the Huntress.name: 效果：女猎手斗篷 Effect: Cloak of the Huntress
Effect: Cloak of the Huntress.description:
此外，这件斗篷给予穿戴者 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{猎杀目标} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.mzkkj9LEWjJPBhaq]{猎手优势（精准）} 专长。如果穿戴者已经拥有猎手优势（精准），则改为使来自猎手优势的精准伤害提高 [[/r 1d8]]。

In addition This cloak grants the wearer the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{Hunt Prey} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.mzkkj9LEWjJPBhaq]{Hunter's Edge (Precision)} feat. If the wearer already has Hunter's Edge (Precision) this instead increases the precision damage from Hunter's Edge by [[/r 1d8]].

由奥塔里·伊尔维什蒂的灵魂授予

被动。所有速度以及逃脱检定+5

主动——一为全。 T 如同法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gtWxTfMbIN5RHQw6]{一为全，全为一}

Granted by Otari Ilveshti's Spirit

Passive. +5 to all speeds and to Escape checks

Active—All For One. T as the spell @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gtWxTfMbIN5RHQw6]{All is One, One is All}

Effect: The Rose Knight's Blessing.description:
由沃尔·拉贾尼的灵魂授予

被动。 获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.KAVf7AmRnbCAHrkT]{Reactive Strike}

主动—荆棘的抗命。 R @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uGXWkR2h8q9MRzEM]{Heroic Defiance}，如同圣武士的专注法术，但作为一个反应动作（）

Granted by Vol Rajani's Spirit

Passive. Grant @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.KAVf7AmRnbCAHrkT]{Reactive Strike}

Active—Thorn's Defiance. R @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uGXWkR2h8q9MRzEM]{Heroic Defiance}, as the champion focus spell, except as a reaction

Effect: The Watchful One's Blessing.name: 效果：警觉者的祝福 Effect: The Watchful One's Blessing
Effect: The Watchful One's Blessing.description:
由扎马夫迪安的灵魂授予

被动。 意志豁免+2

主动——停止世界。 T 与法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1dsahW4g1ggXtypx]{Freeze Time} 类似，但不同之处在于，当时间恢复流动前，队伍中的每个成员（包括启动此能力者）都获得两个动作 D 。

Granted by Zarmavdian's Spirit

Passive. +2 to Will Saves

Active—Stop The World. T similar to the spell @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1dsahW4g1ggXtypx]{Freeze Time}, except that each member of the party, including the one who activated this ability, gets two actions D before time resumes.

Effect: The Huntress' Blessing.name: 效果：女猎手的祝福 Effect: The Huntress' Blessing
Effect: The Huntress' Blessing.description:
由牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯的灵魂赐予

被动。每位英雄可以选择其一把武器，使其在本场战斗中获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{神圣}武器属性符文的效果。即使该武器已达到其属性符文的最大数量也仍然生效，但不会与既有的神圣符文叠加。

主动—我们的瞄准真实无误。 A 如同法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{真实目标}

Granted by Aesephna Menhemes' Spirit

Passive. Each hero may select one of their weapons to gain the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{Holy} weapon property rune for this battle. This works even if the weapon is already at its maximum number of property runes, but does not stack with pre-existing Holy runes.

Cape of the Mountebank.name: 江湖骗子斗篷 Cape of the Mountebank
Cape of the Mountebank.description:
这件明亮的红金色披风经常交织着闪亮丝线，用于分散注意力。穿着该披风时，你在欺瞒检定中获得+2物品加值。

启动 D 交互

频率 每日一次

效果 你施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{次元门}。你离开的空间与出现的空间都会充满一团团烟雾，使烟雾范围内的任何生物在离开烟雾之前或直到你下个回合结束为止均处于隐蔽，届时烟雾消散。强风会立即吹散烟雾。

次元门

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]

This bright red-and-gold cape is often interlaced with glittery threads and serves as a distraction. While wearing the cape, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception checks.

Activate D Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}. The space you leave and the one you appear in are filled with puffs of smoke that make anyone within concealed until they leave the smoke or the end of your next turn, at which point the smoke dissipates. Strong winds immediately disperse the smoke.

Dimension Door

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]

Cheery Man's Mask.name: 笑面人的面具 Cheery Man's Mask
Cheery Man's Mask.description:
笑面人佩戴的一副微笑面具。

启动 F（操作）

需求 你的回合开始

频率 每日一次

效果 你将一根手指放到嘴边，做出示意安静的动作。这具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.G56DJkxlUjFv0C4Z]{时代信标} 的效果

A smiling mask worn by the cheery man.

Activate F (manipulate)

Requirement Start of your turn

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring one finger to your mouth in a hushing motion. This has the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.G56DJkxlUjFv0C4Z]{Time Beacon}

Boon: Elemental Transaction.name: 恩惠：元素交易 Boon: Elemental Transaction
Boon: Elemental Transaction.description:
PC可以牺牲自己的一部分最大生命值来获得能量抗力，按1比1换算。每种元素最多+10抗力（并减少10生命值）。

PCs can sacrifice some of their maximum hit points to gain energy resistance, with a 1-to-1 conversion. Maximum +10 resistance (and minus 10 hp) per element.

Effect: Belcorra's Vulnerability.name: 效果：贝科拉的弱点 Effect: Belcorra's Vulnerability
Effect: Belcorra's Vulnerability.description:
将她标记为浅绿色，即Nhimabaloth的颜色，以在她的生命值处于或低于一半时显示她对透镜的脆弱性。

Marks her a light green, the color of Nhimabaloth to show he vulnerability to the lenses when she is at or below half health.

Erastil's Blessing.name: 埃拉斯蒂尔的祝福 Erastil's Blessing
Erastil's Blessing.description:
使用者可在接下来 1 小时内随意施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} 法术。

The user may cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} at will once in the next hour.

Ring of Transposition.name: 移位戒指 Ring of Transposition
Ring of Transposition.description:
一枚久远失落恋人的戒指。

启动——“交换！” 2 命令

频率 每日一次

效果 你喊出“交换”，并在对方位于100尺内时，与佩戴配对戒指的同伴互换位置。

Ring of a long lost lover.

Activate—Switch! 2 command

Frequency once per day

Effect You call out "Switch" and change places with your partner wearing the matching ring if they are within 100 ft.
